Five years and numerous startup stories later, we can confidently say that we’ve really hit the mark.

And this dent is something that should be recorded, documented, and celebrated.

That’s exactly what Startup Pedia does.

Every. Single. Day.

Description:
Women in Tech is an international organization on a mission to close the gender gap and to help women embrace technology. We promote girls’ and women’s empowerment around the world, with a focus on Sustainable Development Goal 5b: harnessing technologies. With our Head Office in Paris, we are a Global Movement with chapters in 6 continents, counting over 200.000 members.

The aim is to educate, equip and empower women and girls with the necessary skills, confidence and opportunities to succeed in STEM career fields.

We are the only organization for women in tech that has programs for every stage of a woman’s career lifecycle: from the classroom to the boardroom.

OUR MANIFESTO
Women are Tech's most untapped resource. 

Not only is creating diverse teams ethical, and will drive more economic growth, but future proofing the job opportunities of women will ensure sustainable communities worldwide.

Women in Tech is a global movement of people fighting for gender equality in STEAM. We create impact through action to build confidence and set women up for success. 

Because when women rise, we all rise.

Name: OMR
Description:
At OMR, we see ourselves as an online marketing platform for industry professionals by industry professionals. In just over 8 years, we have grown from one-day workshop in Hamburg, Germany to a diversified platform that gives voice to the latest industry-wide trends and innovations. Our range of products include the annual OMR Festival with big-name international speakers, stellar networking opportunities and unique industry insights, our German and English-language blogs, our weekly podcasts, monthly reports, jobs portal, and many more. Our diversified product portfolio has reinforced our market position as an international event and media brand for the latest marketing trends and insights in Germany and beyond. 


OMR Festival
Learn, network and party with over 60,000 industry movers and shakers! The annual OMR Festival takes place annually in May in the beautiful northern European port city of Hamburg, Germany. A must for anyone who’s anyone in the industry or wants to make a name for themselves—network with other pros, stay up-to-date in an ever-changing industry and load up on actionable insights and inspiration from the biggest names and players.


OMR Daily
The OMR blog Daily is our home for digital marketing topics. The OMR editorial team delivers interesting, inspiring and intriguing content on a regular basis tackling a wide range of topics analysis, profiles of success stories, growth hacks, exclusive interviews and everything in between. Our mission is to create unique content not found anywhere else.

OMR Podcast
Go inside the minds of the biggest names in digital and tech—with the OMR Podcast with OMR founder and CEO Philipp Westermeyer. Germany’s largest podcast on all things digital marketing, Philipp sits down every week with founders, CEOs and stars from all corners of the digital marketing universe.

Name: WomenTech Network
Description:
WomenTech Network strives to be the leading global organization for women in tech and allies by providing opportunities for professional growth, networking, and career advancement.

Our values are diversity, inclusion, empowerment, and collaboration. We strive to create an environment where everyone feels welcome and supported. We believe that by working together, we can achieve our goal of making the tech industry more diverse and inclusive for all.

WomenTech Goals
- Help women in tech to grow professionally and identify career growth opportunities.
- Give recognition to the successes of women in tech and empower them to become leaders and role models in their field.
- Increase the number of women in tech and leadership positions within technology companies and create a more diverse and inclusive tech industry.
- Provide a network and safe space for women in tech to connect with each other and collaborate.
- Inspire community leaders who are passionate about making a difference to build local women in tech initiatives for underrepresented groups in tech.
- Stay a relevant and leading resource for women in tech globally.
- Have fun along the way!

We achieve these goals by:

- Organizing conferences, networking events, and workshops.
- Recognizing the achievements of women in tech through awards and scholarships.
- Providing mentorship programs, career advice, and resources to help women succeed in tech.
- Working with diverse and inclusive companies and organizations to become more diverse, and inclusive and help them hire and retain tech talent.
- Advocate for diversity and inclusion in the tech industry by working with the press and media on powerful content.
- Collaborate with other organizations to create a more inclusive tech industry for all.
- Connecting women in tech with each other through our community and career platform.

Name: Startup Story
Description:
Startup Story is on a mission to amplify the voices of startups and make their stories resonate with the world. We believe that every startup has a unique tale to tell, and we're dedicated to creating a platform that not only showcases their journeys but also inspires the next generation of entrepreneurs.

Our vision is to empower young minds to pursue their entrepreneurial dreams by shining a spotlight on their remarkable achievements. We understand that entrepreneurship knows no boundaries, and that's why we are committed to being inclusive and embracing startups from all regions. Whether they emerge from bustling cities or untapped tier 2 and 3 areas, we believe in giving every entrepreneur the opportunity to be heard and celebrated.

Through our platform, we bring to light the challenges, triumphs, and invaluable lessons that go into building a successful business. These stories serve as a powerful source of education and inspiration for a wider audience, shedding light on the untold stories of perseverance, resilience, and innovation.

In particular, we have a special focus on entrepreneurs hailing from tier 2 and 3 cities. We understand the unique hurdles they face and are determined to provide them with the recognition and support they deserve. By giving these budding entrepreneurs a voice, we aim to bridge the gap and bring them one step closer to achieving their dreams.

At Startup Story, we believe in the transformative power of storytelling. We are dedicated to nurturing a vibrant startup ecosystem, where every entrepreneur is given the platform they need to thrive. Join us in our journey of discovery, inspiration, and empowerment as we unlock the potential of startups and pave the way for a brighter future of entrepreneurship. Together, let's celebrate the resilience and creativity of startups, and make their stories an inspiration for generations to come.

Name: Calcio e Finanza
Description:
Calcio e Finanza (www.calcioefinanza.it) è è la prima testata giornalistica italiana online dedicata agli aspetti economici e finanziari del calcio e dello sport.

Calcio e Finanza rappresenta un unicum nel panorama dell’informazione digitale italiana. Coniugando l’approccio del giornalismo finanziario alle tematiche sportive Calcio e Finanza è un punto di riferimento per gli addetti ai lavori della sport industry italiana, ma anche una guida per il grande pubblico di tifosi e appassionati, sempre più attenti agli aspetti economici e finanziari del calcio e dello sport.

Calcio e Finanza è diretta da Luciano Mondellini, giornalista con oltre 20 anni di esperienza nell’informazione economico-finanziaria e sui temi dello sport business, che guida un team di giornalisti e collaboratori che vantano una profonda conoscenza delle dinamiche economiche del calcio e dello sport.

Calcio e Finanza fa capo a Fair Play Media, digital media company guidata dal CEO, Andrea Di Biase, specializzata nella creazione di contenuti multimediali e di analisi economiche sul business dello sport attraverso la video factory Fair Play Studio e l’ufficio studi Fair Play Advisory.

Name: Digital News Asia
Description:
Digital News Asia (DNA) is an independent news portal that covers the entire ICT ecosystem, including industry and public policy issues, new technologies, business trends and developments, entrepreneurs and startups, as well as the movers and shakers in the industry.
  
Who we are: A group of respected and award winning technology and business journalists.

Why we are doing this: We want to see the ICT industry in South-East Asia grow and develop and believe we can help this by providing insightful and analytical coverage of the ICT ecosystem in these countries.

We will cover the tech ecosystem in an analytical and critical manner without fear and favour. We aim to be the Fourth Estate for the tech ecosystem in the countries we cover.

What we do: DNA will provide coverage on industry issues, business models, public policy, entrepreneurs, startups and funding, new technology as well as business trends and developments, research and ground-breaking projects, and last but not least, profiles on the movers and shakers in the industry.

There will be an emphasis on enterprise tech, but from a customer and not a vendor viewpoint, including how organisations are using ICT to address business concerns and objectives.

How we are doing it: Primarily through the content on this website. DNA will also publish special reports and white papers, and will organise forums and roundtables on issues of interest to the ICT ecosystem.

Name: ACM SIGGRAPH
Description:
Founded in 1969, ACM SIGGRAPH has grown from a handful of computer graphics enthusiasts to a diverse group of researchers, artists, developers, filmmakers, scientists, and other professionals who share an interest in computer graphics and interactive techniques. Our community values excellence, passion, integrity, volunteerism, and cross-disciplinary interaction. We sponsor not only the annual SIGGRAPH conferences, but also focused symposia, chapters in cities throughout the world, awards, grants, educational resources, online resources, a public policy program, traveling art show, and the SIGGRAPH Video Review.

When researchers, artists, and technologists collide, inspiration creates progress. SIGGRAPH conference content – whether invited or submitted – is selected by a jury of experts who find the most transformative advancements across computer graphics and interactive techniques. The result: participants leave with the information and relationships they need to advance themselves and their fields.

For more details on membership or to learn about our upcoming conferences, visit SIGGRAPH.org.

Name: DC Thomson
Description:
DC Thomson is a family-owned business headquartered in Scotland, with a presence in London and across the globe. A 200-year-old company that is purpose led and future focused. And our purpose is clear: to champion, entertain and bring together our communities.  

We are home to some of the UK’s best loved media brands that have been the voice of our communities for generations – from the iconic Beano, Stylist and People’s Friend to the UK’s biggest puzzle brand Puzzler and a portfolio of regional newspapers and radio stations including two of the top three best-selling regional dailies in the UK - The Press and Journal and The Courier. We have a thriving genealogy community (Findmypast), a trusted technology solutions business (Brightsolid) and a global marketing agency (Fifth Ring). From our long-established media brand, Energy Voice, an influential authority in the global energy conversation, we launched E-FWD, a membership organisation where the industry’s forward thinkers are coming together to drive the movement to secure, clean energy.

We have the influence and ambition to make a real difference towards tackling the critical issues of our time. Assets and knowledge built over decades of supporting high growth, innovative businesses allow us to make bold, long-term visionary decisions. DC Thomson is backing businesses that are making an impact in energy transition, water technology, the circular economy and food security amongst others. 

Philanthropy and supporting the communities we live and work in is part of DC Thomson’s DNA, both through our brands and the Thomson family trust – The Northwood Charitable Trust.
 
At DC Thomson, we are modernising and ambitious, investing in technology and talent, and building brands for the digital age. A trusted partner that is driving positive change, inspiring innovation, and fuelling growth and success and a transformative business where people, partners and communities feel part of something extraordinary.

Name: AccuWeather
Description:
AccuWeather, recognized and documented as the most accurate source of weather forecasts and warnings in the world, has saved tens of thousands of lives, prevented hundreds of thousands of injuries, and saved tens of billions of dollars in property damage. 

Today, AccuWeather is the most recognized and most used source of weather forecasts and warnings in the world, known to billions, and is proven and verified to be the most accurate. Digitally, AccuWeather is the #1 weather destination in the world and one of the top destination sites that exist globally.

AccuWeather forecasts appear on digital signage, in 700 newspapers, are heard on over 400 radio stations, and viewed on 100 television stations. The AccuWeather Network reaches 35 million households, and its AccuWeather NOW streaming service is available to more than 200 million active users on many platforms, including Roku, Xumo, Red Box, LG, Amazon, and Freevee.

AccuWeather For Business serves more than half of the Fortune 500 companies and thousands of other businesses and government agencies globally who pay for the most accurate weather forecasts from any source.

AccuWeather's story is one of a fanatical dedication to Superior Accuracy, detail, creativity, innovation, entrepreneurship, service, and the loyalty and commitment of scores of people who have joined AccuWeather’s center of excellence, including many who have dedicated their entire careers to AccuWeather.

Dr. Joel N. Myers, Founder and Executive Chairman, established AccuWeather in 1962 and is considered the “father of modern commercial meteorology.” Myers, a leading creative thinker and visionary, has been named “the most accurate man in weather” by The New York Times and one of the top entrepreneurs in American history by Entrepreneur’s Encyclopedia of Entrepreneurs.

Description:

Name: Michigan Central
Description:
Michigan Central is a hub in Detroit dedicated to advancing new technologies and programs that address barriers to greater social, economic, and physical mobility. Anchored by the iconic, reimagined Michigan Central Station, Michigan Central is both a convening place and a call-to-action - for city, regional and international inventors and investors, academics and entrepreneurs, civil society voices and government leaders, and business owners and corporate partners - to advance a more sustainable, equitable future through a community-based approach to mobility solutions. 

This vibrant 30-acre site nestled between the Corktown and Southwest Detroit neighborhoods will serve as a destination for Detroiters and visitors alike - inviting people to shop, dine out, attend concerts and live events, and participate in educational programming, while innovators create in purpose-built spaces with smart infrastructure and embedded technology.

Building on Detroit’s rich history as an engine of change, the transformative project aims to strengthen the city’s existing fabric of community and electrify its economy, while inspiring collective action on the most pressing challenges at the intersection of mobility and society worldwide. The right mobility solutions have massive potential to change the world for the better. Creating them will take the world’s best minds, working together, at Michigan Central.

Name: T2mobile NG
Description:
Emerging Markets Telecommunication Services Limited (EMTS), now trading as T2 -Your Digital Lifestyle Partner (formerly 9mobile), is a proudly Nigerian private limited liability company empowered by a Unified Access Service License from the Federal Government of Nigeria in March 2007 to provide a broad range of telecommunication services nationwide, spanning voice, data, and enterprise solutions.
Formerly operating as Etisalat Nigeria, the network’s first official call was made on March 13, 2008, and commercial operations commenced on October 23, 2008, with the groundbreaking ‘0809uchoose’ offering, which for the first time in Nigeria’s telecom history, allowed customers to choose and own their preferred unique mobile numbers.
In July 2017, the company rebranded to 9mobile, a bold identity that celebrated resilience, creativity, and the vibrant spirit of Nigeria-especially the youth. Over the years, 9mobile became known for its Naija-centric approach, delivering innovation, quality service, and exceptional customer experiences.
Today, the brand has evolved, transitioning from 9mobile to T2-to reflect a renewed commitment to powering the digital lifestyles of Nigerians. T2 is not just a telecom operator; it is an enabler of connections, opportunities, and everyday possibilities, leveraging cutting-edge technology to transform how people live, work, and play.
Innovation remains at the heart of T2’s mission-finding new ways to solve everyday challenges, create richer experiences, and keep Nigerians connected to what matters most. From its first call to its new chapter as T2, the company continues its remarkable journey of staying true to its promise.

Name: KrindżedIn Polska
Description:
KrindżedIn Polska to strona o charakterze satyrycznym. Natomiast wszystkie publikowane na niej posty są prawdziwe, chociaż w większości zanonimizowane. Codziennie dostarczamy Wam krindżu naszego powszedniego wprost z polskiego LinkedIna. KrindżedIn Polska  jedyne miejsce, gdzie Twoje daily scrollowanie po LinkedInie może skończyć się nagłym wybuchem śmiechu, łzami zażenowania lub decyzją o kasacji konta.

---------

 Bardzo Ważny Regulamin KrindżedIn Polska: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/krind%C5%BCedin-polska-regulamin-strony-krind%C5%BCedin-polska-xypfc

---------

 O czym tu piszemy? O LinkedInie, ale takim, jaki jest naprawdę:
 Posty motywacyjne z piekła rodem – bo "sky is the limit", ale twoja wypłata i zdrowie psychiczne już nie.
 Mądrości z polskiego LinkedIn – screeny postów, po których przeczytaniu będziesz mieć ochotę na egzorcyzmy wege salcesonem.
 Mój Stary To Fanatyk Krindżerstwa na LinkedIn – nasza pasta i jednocześnie biuletyn, lidersko-motywacyjny "Zbuntowany Anioł" polskiego LinkedIn, osadzony w realiach polskiej rodziny klasy średniej. Mamy nadzieję, że doczekamy się Netfliksowej ekranizacji.
 Krindż miesiąca – historie tak absurdalne, że nie wymyśliłby ich nawet AI - wybierane przez Was.
 LinkedIn-Polo - myzyczne wrzutki na bazie postów, inspirowane sorrytellingiem i linkedinowymi mądrościami

 Jak możesz dołożyć swoją cegiełkę do tego bagienka?
Przesyłaj nam krindżowe posty w wiadomościach. Anonimowość gwarantowana na wyższym poziomie niż w polskich służbach specjalnych.

 Uwaga: Możesz nas czytać z poczuciem humoru lub z bólem istnienia. 
Możesz też dołączyć do LinkedInowej sekty sukcesu lub grupki wsparcia, ale po co, skoro jesteśmy my i mocno zatrujemy Ci życie. 

-------

 Informujemy, że nieuzasadnione pozwy sądowe o zniesławienie lub wezwania do zaprzestania naruszeń, hejt maile, a także propozycje współpracy, z których najpewniej nie skorzystamy, można wysyłać na adres: krindzedin@gmail.com. Można, ale nie trzeba!

NEXT.io is a content-driven conference company that focuses on both in-person and online events. Our main aim is to keep professionals and enthusiasts updated about the iGaming world and the industries surrounding it, such as investment, tech, blockchain, and many others. 

Our in-person and online industry meet-ups, Podcasts, POWER Hour and Clubhouse sessions discuss current happenings while focusing on the iGaming industry's future. 

A-list guests, keynote speakers, panel discussions, fireside chats, and presentations make NEXT.io a focal point for the industry, as we provide an immense amount of data and knowledge. Our online Video Library enables visitors to review all sessions as many times as they want and absorb all the information they can. With several insights provided on all of our social media channels, anyone can figure out what the iGaming industry is really about, understand who the main people and companies are, follow them and learn indispensable knowledge to move forward in their own designated path.

Our bigger events are held both online and in-person. The in-person events are key not only for the valuable info they provide but also for the opportunity all delegates have in meeting new people and making new connections, while our online events are normally targeted at specific sectors of the industry and beyond making it easier for participants to focus on what is important for them and the specific market they are in.

Name: DevBytes
Description:
DevBytes is your one-stop solution for leveling up your coding skills and staying ahead of the curve.

Here's what makes DevBytes the ultimate companion for your coding journey:

- News in 64 words: Ditch the information overload! Get the gist of all the latest tech news, coding explainers, and complex algorithms in bite-sized, easy-to-digest summaries. No more endless scrolling or FOMO – just the insights you need to stay sharp.

- DevBot, your AI coding buddy: Stuck on a problem and need a quick solution? DevBot is your friendly AI assistant, ready to answer your questions, debug your code, and offer helpful tips. Think of it as your personal coding Yoda, minus the green skin and questionable grammar.

- Daily digest: Get the latest tech updates, explainers on GitHub repos, your chosen language, and more.

- Code snippets: DevBytes houses a massive library of code snippets in any language you desire. Dive into real-world examples, experiments, and see how magic happens firsthand.

- Seamless integration: Seamlessly connect your GitHub, BitBucket, and Jira accounts to sync, share, and collaborate with your team – all within the DevBytes platform.

And guess what? Over 600,000 developers are already reaping the benefits of DevBytes. Why not join the party?

P.S. Did we mention that DevBytes is completely FREE? Check us out, here: https://devbytes.co.in/

Name: Impulso
Description:
Há 120 anos, a RD Saúde acredita que conhecimento é cuidado. Desde o primeiro farmacêutico, a RD Saúde sempre buscou atender às necessidades de cada um dos seus clientes, de forma humana e precisa.
Hoje, a RD Saúde está presente na rotina de quase 50 milhões de clientes, mas o cuidado para entender as necessidades de cada um ainda se mantém. É assim que cada cliente consegue encontrar os produtos e serviços que realmente precisa ou os benefícios que deseja. 
Com o tempo, a tecnologia foi agregada a esse cuidado e a RD Saúde criou uma solução para permitir que grandes marcas parceiras também possam utilizar o conhecimento para cuidar mais de perto da saúde das pessoas: a Impulso. 
Com a Impulso, marcas líderes nos segmentos de saúde, beleza e bem-estar podem unir forças com a RD Saúde na busca por uma sociedade mais saudável. 
Para as pessoas, a Impulso significa facilidade de acesso a conteúdo seguro, produtos e serviços mais relevantes e benefícios exclusivos. 
Para as marcas, a Impulso representa uma oportunidade única de usar conhecimento de forma positiva, segura e verdadeiramente relevante na vida dos seus clientes, respeitando a privacidade e protegendo dados pessoais. 
É saúde para pessoas. É saúde para marcas.

Name: JM Leadership Lab
Description:
Years back, I set out with a simple mission: build something that lasts, something that matters. 

Along the way, I built and sold four companies.

Each one taught me something new about resilience, creativity, and what it really takes to succeed.

Now, after those businesses and 20+ years in executive roles, I’m here to help others create their own successes. 

Here's how I will help you:

 LinkedIn Growth:
I expertly help brands—personal and business—find their voice and grow in a crowded space. Because attention is everything.

 Starting & Scaling Businesses:
Whether you're at day one or year ten, I’ve been there. I know the twists, turns, and strategies that make growth happen.

 Increasing Sales:
Channels, better touchpoints, higher results. I know what it takes to turn sales into a real driver of growth.

 Building Positive Cultures
I believe in respect and trust, creating teams that want to stay. High retention, low turnover—it’s about building a place people love.

 Streamlining Operations:
Efficiency is key. I simplify processes to cut costs, reduce friction, and increase productivity.

 Elevating Customer Experience:
Great service is more than a transaction; it’s about listening and making sure customers feel valued. I turn service into loyalty.

 Developing Leadership:
Leaders aren’t just born—they’re built. I guide people to inspire, communicate clearly, and lead teams with impact.

If you're looking for someone who’s walked the path and knows both the vision and the way forward, let’s connect. 

I’ve been down this road many times, and I’d be honored to help you succeed on yours.

Name: TiVo
Description:
The world is watching like never before. Watching is break time. It's me time. It's let's binge five episodes at once time.

But watching has also become complicated. These days, we're drowning in choices.

Watch time has become search time. The delight of the find has been replaced by the dread of the search. It's an all-consuming, time-ballooning dedication to swiping, scrolling and settling.

TiVo doesn't believe in settling. Our simplified approach to watching helps people uncover precise, carefully curated finds. TiVo brings entertainment together, making it easy to find, watch and enjoy. We serve up the best movies, shows and videos from across live TV, on-demand, streaming services and countless apps. 

To the watchers, go ahead! Dissect and discuss. Analyze and obsess. Watch what you want, when you can, on your own terms.

To the creators, revel in the comfort of knowing your programs are fueling fandom. Leave the details to us.

TiVo. Enjoy watching.

Name: Planeta Pós-Pandemia
Description:
O Planeta Pós Pandemia é uma startup de impacto especializada em comunicação socioambiental. Atuamos com empresas, organizações e marcas que buscam comunicar suas iniciativas de sustentabilidade e ESG com clareza, coerência e responsabilidade.

Nosso trabalho é transformar conteúdos técnicos em narrativas acessíveis, estratégicas e alinhadas à reputação corporativa. Combinamos conhecimento em sustentabilidade, experiência em marketing de causa e domínio em criação de conteúdo multiplataforma para gerar engajamento real com diferentes públicos.

Conectamos marcas a causas por meio de soluções em comunicação que ampliam o alcance, fortalecem o posicionamento e evitam práticas superficiais como o greenwashing. Nosso compromisso é com uma comunicação responsável, capaz de traduzir ações em mensagens com impacto cultural e relevância social.

Nossos principais serviços incluem:
– Estratégia e produção de conteúdo ESG
– Consultoria em comunicação socioambiental
– Desenvolvimento de campanhas institucionais com foco em impacto
– Treinamentos e capacitações em linguagem sustentável

Com uma atuação multiplataforma e linguagem adaptada ao cenário atual, o Planeta Pós Pandemia se posiciona como parceiro estratégico para empresas que desejam fortalecer sua narrativa de sustentabilidade com autenticidade e credibilidade.

Name: LinkedIn Poland Women
Description:
Historie którymi się dzielimy pozwalają na tworzenie pomostów tam, gdzie wcześniej ich nie było.

Historie zbliżają nas do siebie, motywują i pozwalają nabrać dystansu do tego, co nas spotyka.

W świecie, w którym kobiety są codziennie uprzedmiotawiane, szufladkowane czy umniejszane w popularnych mediach, stawiamy na angażujący storytelling i staramy się mówić głosem pełnym odwagi, determinacji i wiary w moc i siłę sprawczą kobiet.

Wierzymy w siłę społeczności i jesteśmy przekonane, że dzielenie się historiami jest podstawowym sposobem, w jaki możemy zbliżyć się do siebie i wywołać zmianę.

To właśnie tu, na LinkedIn Poland Women (LPW) znajdziesz codziennie nową dawkę treści opartych na inspirujących historiach postaci ze świata biznesu, sztuki, literatury, filmu, muzyki.

W naszym przekazie stawiamy na wrażliwość, uważność i autentyczność, bo jesteśmy przekonane, że to te wartości czynią świat lepszym.

Nasze posty to rekomendacje książek, filmów, podcastów, czasopism, wydarzeń i szkoleń oraz treści twórców, firm i marek, którym angażujący storytelling jest bliski.

Wkrótce po uruchomieniu pierwszej wersji projektu koncentrującej się na budowaniu społeczności na Discordzie, uzyskałyśmy wyraźny sygnał, by skupić jednak całą uwagę i zasoby na codziennym dostarczaniu osobom obserwującym naszą inicjatywę w mediach społecznościowych wyselekcjonowanych przez nas treści.

W LPW upatrujemy za kilka lat jeden z wiodących polskich serwisów dla kobiet, którego zasięg jest również międzynarodowy.

Jeśli chcesz otrzymywać powiadomienia o nowych postach, koniecznie kliknij przycisk dzwoneczka powiadomień.

LPW nie jest przedsięwzięciem feministycznym ani nie wspiera jakiegokolwiek ruchu, który promuje narrację walki czy rywalizacji płci. Uznajemy wysiłki i osiągnięcia wszelkich ruchów prokobiecych, nie identyfikując się z żadnym.

W przypadkach nieoczywistych publikacja nie oznacza poparcia.

LPW jest przedsięwzięciem całkowicie niezależnym od i niezwiązanym z marką LinkedIn.

Name: VLSI Design Conference 2026
Description:
The 38th International Conference on VLSI Design & 24th International Conference on Embedded Systems was a Premier Global conference with a legacy of over three and half decades. This Global Annual technical conference which focuses on the latest advancements in VLSI and Embedded Systems, is attended by over 2000 engineers, students & faculty, industry, academia, researchers, bureaucrats, and government bodies.

Semiconductors are the intangible backbone of every industry across the globe. Silicon took the lion’s share over the past decades and remained the primary enabler for the digitization of the world. With scaling reaching its fundamental limits, it is time to look at addressing technological challenges at higher levels of abstraction in CMOS-based design and at the same time, look beyond Silicon for further performance enhancement. 

This flagship conference is well backed up by sponsorship from all major VLSI and embedded houses and state as well as central government. Also, this premier conference is well-participated by all other industry players, and industry bodies and is backed by the VLSI Society of India (VSI).

The 2026 edition of the conference is going to happen in Pune, India from the 3rd to the 7th of January 2026. Over a span of five days, the summit will feed brains and nurture minds with state-of-the-art exhibitors, presentations, panel discussions, innovation forums, and tutorials by established technologists. VLSID2026 will act as a unique catalyst to accelerate the involvement of companies in the area of VLSI design and embedded systems, with an emphasis on Global Synergy in Silicon: VLSI and Embedded AI for Sustainable Computing and Next-Gen Electrified Mobility.

Name: Quantum Innovation Summit
Description:
The Quantum Innovation Summit (QIS) is an engine that activates quantum capability into real-world momentum. Hosted in Dubai, it brings together governments, critical infrastructure operators, global technology companies, research institutions, investors, and ecosystem builders to align strategy, readiness, and adoption around quantum technologies and their enabling frontiers.

Founded by Malak Trabelsi Loeb and organised by Vernewell Group, QIS has expanded rapidly since its launch into one of the region’s most influential convening engines for quantum technology. Under Vernewell’s leadership, the Summit has built a recognised space where policy, industry, and research intersect with practical deployment priorities. Its direction is shaped by a consistent emphasis on sovereign capability, international cooperation, and the conversion of advanced technology into operational systems.

Now entering its third edition in April 2026, QIS scales significantly in programme depth and exhibition architecture, moving into a larger venue with a substantially expanded exhibition environment. The 2026 theme, Quantum and Emerging Frontiers: Advancing Global Innovation and Technological Leadership, reflects a clear reality: quantum advances most meaningfully when it operates as the strategic nucleus within a wider capability landscape that includes AI, secure digital infrastructure, sensing, communications, advanced materials, and space-enabled systems. This expansion strengthens quantum readiness and accelerates adoption across priority sectors.

Mission

To activate quantum readiness and adoption by convening decision-makers across government, industry, critical sectors, academia, and investment, enabling strategic dialogue, capability development, and partnerships that translate quantum science into systems and measurable value.

Name: Expertenforum Arbeitsrecht (#EFAR)
Description:
Das Expertenforum Arbeitsrecht (#EFAR) ist der erste Metablog zum Arbeitsrecht: Innovative Tools treffen hochwertige Fachinformationen und bereiten diese für die arbeitsrechtliche Community in Unternehmen, Kanzleien und Verbänden auf. Der Anspruch dabei ist hoch – arbeitsrechtliche Inhalte und Themen, die nicht überall zu finden sind.

Und das in mitunter völlig neuen Formen der Kommunikation und Kollaboration, die nicht nur der arbeitsrechtlichen Blogosphäre und Community helfen, effizienter und vernetzter zu arbeiten. Das #EFAR hat damit auch das Potenzial, sowohl der interessierten Fachwelt als auch der breiten Öffentlichkeit im digitalen Umfeld Nutzen zu stiften.

Ein innovativer Ansatz des #EFAR ist ein Live Log zu unterschiedlichen Arbeitsrechts-Blogs – ein automatischer und stets aktueller Aggregator für Beiträge und Nachrichten aus der stark wachsenden arbeitsrechtlichen Blogosphäre. Darüber nehmen wir regelmäßig in Einzelbeiträgen Zusammenfassungen solcher Themen aus dem Live Log vor, die wiederholt – nicht nur in den hier registrierten Blogs – und den dazugehörigen Social-Media-Aktivitäten der „arbeitsrechtlichen Netzgemeinde“ aufgegriffen werden. Auch damit weist das #EFAR als wertvoller Seismograph stets aktuell auf die Entwicklungen und Themen im Arbeitsrecht hin, die für die betriebliche und beratende Praxis von Interesse sind bzw. sein sollten. 

Durch eigene Beiträge (EFAR-Beiträge) beteiligt sich das #EFAR selbst an der Diskussion aktueller Themen aus dem Arbeitsrecht. Der Anspruch: Themen und Detailfragen aus dem Arbeitsrecht aufgreifen, die von Fachexperten kommen und nicht auf vergleichbaren Portalen zu finden sind. Namhafte Gastautoren unterstützen dabei, diesen Anspruch regelmäßig umzusetzen. 

Und: Ab und zu muss auch ein Schmunzeln erlaubt sein. Dafür sorgt unsere Kategorie ArbeitsRecht kurios.

https://efarbeitsrecht.net/impressum/

Name: Validenti
Description:
Trust is not a feeling; it is verifiable data. 

Validenti is an independent Entity Verification and Risk Intelligence Protocol built to close the widening "Trust Deficit" in the digital trade ecosystem.

In our view, possessing a mere "SSL certificate" is insufficient for trust. A business must prove it is "Real" across digital, official, and physical realms. The Validenti V-Engine technology cross-references AI-powered digital forensics, official government records (Gov-Tech), and geospatial data to subject businesses to a rigorous 3-level audit: 

Digital ID: Technical integrity and cybersecurity scanning.

Official Entity: Legal and corporate existence verification (KYB).

Verified Reality: Physical presence and liveness testing.

The Validenti Seal cannot be bought; it is strictly earned.  We do not sell badges. We perform audits. Any entity that fails to meet our transparency criteria—regardless of its revenue—is rejected.

Our mission is not merely to facilitate sales, but to standardize commercial transparency.

No room for doubt. Only verified facts.

Name: MachineHack
Description:
MachineHack is a cutting-edge, globally recognized platform that is reshaping the landscape of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning through continuous support and advocacy for developers in the field. As the world's leading hub for generative AI development, we are tirelessly dedicated to fostering a vibrant, inclusive, and innovative community that encourages the exchange of ideas, collaboration, and knowledge sharing.

Our purpose is to empower developers and data scientists, providing them with the right resources and tools to excel in their respective roles. We host a plethora of challenges and hackathons aimed at fostering innovation and promoting healthy competition among AI enthusiasts and professionals. These events present unique opportunities for individuals to test their skills, learn, and evolve, all while contributing to the growth of the AI ecosystem.

At MachineHack, we believe in the transformative power of AI and machine learning. That's why we champion the creation of ethical, responsible AI systems that can have a positive impact on society. Our advocacy efforts are concentrated on ensuring that every AI developer, irrespective of their location or background, has equal opportunities to thrive and innovate.

We value the diversity of our community and strive to create an environment where everyone feels welcome and respected. Through our numerous webinars, workshops, and learning modules, we provide continuous learning opportunities to keep our community members at the forefront of AI development trends.

Join us on our mission to democratize AI and machine learning development. Whether you are a seasoned developer, a data science enthusiast, or someone new to the field, MachineHack is your platform to grow, learn, and transform the future of AI. Together, we can create a brighter future powered by ethical and innovative AI applications.

Name: Artificial Intelligence Community of Pakistan
Description:
The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Community of Pakistan aims to work with a wide range of individuals and organizations from academia, industry, and government.

However, in general, the mission of the AI community may include:
- To advance the field of AI through research and development, including developing new algorithms, techniques, and applications for AI.
- To promoting collaboration and communication among researchers, practitioners, and industry leaders in the field of AI.
- To educate the public and policy-makers about the potential benefits and risks of AI and its impact on society.
- To foster responsible and ethical use of AI, including addressing issues such as bias, transparency, and accountability in AI systems.
- Helping to ensure that the development and deployment of AI aligns with the values of society and is beneficial to all.

The AI community of pakistan also looking forward to work with many organizations such as IEEE, IEEE Computer Society, AI Conference, and other AI-focused groups that work on promoting the responsible use of AI and advancing the field of AI.

Description:

Our awards are open to agencies, brands, freelancers, and students who want to showcase their digital prowess and gain recognition from their peers and clients.

We have 20 categories to choose from, covering all aspects of digital marketing, from content and social media, to web design and e-commerce, to data and analytics, to mobile and video, and more.

Our awards are judged by a panel of experts from the digital marketing field, who evaluate the entries based on three criteria: strategy, creativity, and results. We also have a public vote for the People's Choice Award, where you can have your say on your favourite digital work.

Our awards ceremony is a glamorous and exciting event, where we announce the winners and celebrate their achievements. It is also a great opportunity to network with other digital marketers, learn from the best, and have fun.

If you think you have what it takes to win a Digital Marketing Award, don't hesitate to enter. You can find out more about the entry process, the categories, the judges, and the ceremony on our website.

We are driven by a social impact mission to increase diversity in tech and innovation hubs nationwide. Our clients are equitable high growth startups dedicated to creating inclusive workplaces from day one. In July of this year, Tribaja relaunched during Philly Startup Leaders accelerator program and is in the 2nd phase of development after receiving great traction with our MVP, despite the pandemic. 

Tribaja is a proud minority and woman owned business founded by Shannon Morales in 2017. Shannon Morales started the company after experiencing unconscious bias in the workplace and set out to create a platform vetted with only the best work environments for underrepresented talent. Shannon Morales is a single mother, Afro Latina, and social entrepreneur. She was awarded “Culture Builder of the Year” in Philly tech, nominated for Young professional of the year, and is a first generation graduate. “

Computer Information Concepts, Inc. is a growing software and professional services firm based in Northern Colorado.  CIC has 43+ years of experience servicing and supporting 800+  K-12 Education, City and County Government customers. 
   
If you enjoy change, like working with the best technology, the brightest people, and want to control your own career growth and advancement path, CIC is the place for you!
   
CIC offers a unique performance data compensation plan, where YOU control career advancement, salary and bonuses based on your performance, knowledge and excellent customer service.
   
Many of our employees work from their home offices around the country, eliminating daily commutes to work and reducing travel time to customers for on-site work.
   
Key benefits include health / prescription / vision / dental / life and disability insurance, matching 401k contributions, and tuition reimbursement.  CIC is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer.
   
In K-12 Education, CIC is an Infinite Campus Channel Partner.  Infinite Campus provides 100% integrated and web-based Student Management and related applications.  CIC sells, services, and supports Infinite Campus and related applications for 600+ school districts, in fourteen (14) states.
   
For City and County Governments, CIC provides SQL Server-based applications to 200+ organizations for Finance / Payroll / Human Resources, Utility Billing, Tax Administration, Recording, CAMA and other integrated applications in seven (7) states.

Name: Textile Times
Description:
Textile Times is a premier media and news publishing company dedicated to delivering insightful, accurate, and up-to-date news and information from the global textile industry. Serving both national and international audiences, we specialize in covering every aspect of the textile value chain — from raw materials to finished products.

Our mission is to empower industry professionals, businesses, and stakeholders with knowledge that drives innovation, fosters sustainable practices, and shapes the future of textiles worldwide.

What We Offer

1. Comprehensive coverage of the latest trends, market developments, and technological advancements in textiles.
2. In-depth analysis of sustainability initiatives and eco-friendly innovations transforming the industry.
3. Exclusive interviews and expert opinions from leaders and innovators in the textile sector.
4. Up-to-date news on policies, trade, and global market insights affecting textile businesses.
5. Platforms for dialogue and networking to promote responsible and sustainable textile production and consumption.

Our Commitment to Sustainability

At Textile Times, we believe that sustainability is the cornerstone of a thriving textile industry. We are committed to highlighting stories and practices that reduce environmental impact, promote ethical labor standards, and encourage circular economy principles. Through our content, we aim to inspire change and support a greener, more equitable textile ecosystem.

Join Our Community

Follow Textile Times to stay informed about the future of textiles. Whether you’re a textile professional, business owner, researcher, or enthusiast, our platform offers valuable insights and connections to help you navigate and contribute to this dynamic industry.

 For Advertisement or collaboration, Contact us: 

 Email: press.textiletimes@gmail.com
 WhatsApp: 01868875616

Her geçen gün daha da çok konuşulan, büyüyen ve gelişen finteklerin, yeni teknolojilerin ve girişimlerin dünyasını aktarmak, bilgi ve gelişmeleri analiz ederek sizlere anlaşılır ve açıklayıcı bir şekilde sunmak için varız. Dünyadaki ve ülkemizdeki teknoloji, girişim ile fintekleri ve bu ekosistemin gelişmelerini Türk ekosistemine anlatmak ve aynı zamanda Türk ekosistemini de dünyaya tanıtmak amacıyla içerikler üretiyoruz.
Temel amacımızın yanında ekosistemi bir araya getirecek organizasyonlar düzenliyor ve ekosistemi güçlendiriyoruz. Bu etkinlikleri yaparken aynı zamanda dünyadaki en önemli fintek, teknoloji ve girişimcilik etkinliklerine medya sponsoru olarak destek veriyor bu etkinlikleri siz okuyucularımıza ulaştırıyoruz.
Katılım Fintek içeriklerini web sitemiz ve sosyal medya kanallarımız olan Youtube, LinkedIn, Instagram ve Twitter üzerinden takip edebilirsiniz.

Finansal Teknolojiler ve Katılım Finansı Medya ve Etkinlik Hizmetleri A.Ş.

Beyond short-form content, COL also manages some of China’s most beloved IPs, including “Luo Xiao Hei” (The Legend of Hei) — an iconic animated franchise whose highly anticipated theatrical sequel is set to captivate audiences across Asia.

Domestically, COL continues to produce chart-topping microdramas such as 《一品布衣》(From Rags to Rank One), which has surpassed a billion views on 红果 (HongGuo) and remains one of the platform’s most successful titles, with multiple sequels now in production.

By combining powerful data infrastructure, self-serve campaign tools, and closed-loop analytics, Swiftly offers a faster, more flexible way to compete in today’s market. Customers can start with a single module or deploy the full stack, with plan tiers that scale from entry-level to enterprise. Launching campaigns and seeing results can happen in days, not quarters, and integration is designed to minimize IT lift.

Our mission is to level the playing field for retailers, giving them the tools to operate like digital-first media businesses and empowering brands to invest where they see proven return. As the market leader in closed-loop retail media for grocery and beyond, Swiftly is redefining how physical retail engages shoppers, measures performance, and drives growth.

Description:

Since its inception in 2019, the organisation has helped businesses raise over £100 million and inspired thousands of people to get into the tech sector. It has also become known for its most popular showcase event, Birmingham Tech Week – the UK’s largest regional tech event.

TechWM works with over 50 national and regional partners across the ecosystem, including the Department for Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT); techUK;  West Midlands Combined Authority; and the UK Tech Cluster Group (UKTCG), to name a few.  

In 2023, the organisation underwent a rebrand from Birmingham Tech to TechWM, with a view to build a stronger, more resilient economic future for the region as a whole. TechWM aims to achieve this goal by working to its three core values:

- Encouraging and fostering collaboration across all sectors

- Inspiring people from all walks of life to get into the tech sector

- Creating a platform so people and businesses can celebrate their success

Name: EEPower
Description:
EEPower (www.eepower.com) is a digital publication in power electronics focused on technical articles, market insights, and design trends from industry-leading electrical engineers. With a strong focus on in-depth technical articles on a variety of subjects, EEPower helps today’s engineers understand new technologies and developments within power electronics. 

Built upon modern web technologies, EEPower can be accessed from a variety of devices including desktops, tablets and phones. Content is arranged into six categories, including:

•	Power Electronics Assemblies
•	Integrated Circuits (ICs)
•	Passive Components
•	Power Converters
•	Semiconductors
•	Test & Measurement

In addition, a Market Insights section provides more general industry developments, trends, and power electronics event summaries. 

Beyond accessing EEPower in your web browser, there are a number of ways to enjoy the technical content from EEPower for free:

•	Using the provided RSS feeds in a newsreader of your choice, such as Feedly or Flipboard
•	Subscribing within Apple News
•	Subscribing to EE Power’s weekly e-Newsletter

For companies offering products in the power electronics industry, EEPower provides an excellent resource to showcase technical content for an engineering audience. EEPower cooperates with application and design engineers from world-leading power electronics companies to curate application notes, design trends, and the latest product information. 

Companies serving the power electronics market are welcome to submit press releases and technical articles on their products and design trends for publishing on EEPower. EEPower promotes the technical content along with the author’s name and company to the power electronics community through advertising and an established base of readers.

Name: DM Dentista Moderno
Description:
El Dentista Moderno es la publicación técnico-científica de referencia en el sector de la odontología y subsectores afines. Dirigida por un Consejo Científico de gran experiencia y autoridad que garantiza la calidad de sus contenidos, la revista tiene como objetivos la difusión y el intercambio de los conocimientos más avanzados en el campo dental, con el objetivo de lograr una actualización permanente sobre todas las cuestiones que atañen a la profesión con especial importancia sobre la actividad clínica.

El Dentista Moderno, con una periodicidad mensual, publica artículos originales, teniendo como campos de interés la actualización clínica, la presentación de nuevos métodos y materiales y el análisis crítico de la literatura a nivel internacional ya publicada.

La publicación, elaborada por académicos y profesionales del sector, tras una rigurosa selección de la información, recoge en todos los números contenidos que abarcan todas las disciplinas: práctica quirúrgica y técnicas conservadoras, implantología, ortodoncia, paradontología, endodoncia, estética dental, medicina preventiva y odontología pediátrica.

Además de la información científica más innovadora y los casos clínicos de especial interés, la revista es una fuente de información de todos los nuevos métodos, materiales y útiles en el campo de la odontología, así como de otros aspectos prácticos relacionados con la profesión (legalidad, seguros, gestión, psicología y comunicación, etc.).

En El Dentista Moderno también hay espacio para la actualidad, que se incluye en todos los números a través de un informe/reportaje donde se trata en profundidad un tema de interés para el sector, además de entrevistas a profesionales de renombre e información de los acontecimientos y nombramientos en el mundo de la odontología.
Location: Torrejón de Ardoz, Comunidad de Madrid

بصفتنا الشّريك الإقليميّ الرّسمي للعلامة التّجارية الأمريكيّة .Inc، التي تأسّست عام 1979، وتم الاستحواذ عليها في عام 2005 من قبل Mansueto Ventures LLC، نحن ملتزمون بتقديم حلولٍ عمليّة ومحتوىً ملهمٍ لدعم أصحاب ومديري الشّركات النّاشئة لتحقيق النّموّ المستدام.
 
تُدار "عربية .Inc" من قبل مجموعة حاوي الإعلاميّة، المنصّة الرّقمية الرّائدة التي تدير مجموعةً متنوّعة من المواقع الإلكترونيّة تصل إلى أكثر من 20 مليون مستخدم شهريّاً، وأكثر من 100 مليون متابع على وسائل التّواصل الاجتماعي. من خلال مكاتبها في الإمارات، الأردن، ومصر، تلتزم حاوي بتقديم محتوىً مفيدٍ، ممتعٍ وملهم.

Name: Me Poupe!
Description:
O-LÁ, mundo! 

Aqui quem fala é a Me Poupe! E cuidado para não confundir as minhas palavras com a da minha fundadora, Nathalia Arcuri. Muita gente mistura as coisas e, não podia ser diferente, eu nasci com ela.

Tudo começou em 2015, com uma mulher e uma colher pau. Alguém que conseguiu enxergar que a Educação Financeira poderia mudar a realidade das pessoas.
 
Algo bem complexo pra falar a verdade, até porque vivemos em um país onde a maioria passa perrengue quando o assunto é o tal do dinheiro. E esse, foi um dos nossos maiores objetivos ao longo da nossa história: libertar as pessoas do perrengue financeiro através do conhecimento. Tanto que, durante muitos anos, nos dedicamos incansavelmente na missão de desfuder a nação por intermédio da educação financeira. Quer saber se deu certo? Vamos lá!  Antes de começarmos lá em 2014, havia apenas 1 milhão de investidores pessoa física no Tesouro Direto. Hoje são mais de 22 milhões de investidores! Sim. A influência da nossa CEO e a força de todos os Me Pouplayers, foram fatores decisivos de inflexão da curva, atualmente temos um ecossistema que impacta mensalmente mais de 20 milhões de humanos.
 
Estamos em um novo estágio de evolução, nos transformando em uma finpactech que usa dinheiro, educação e tecnologia como caminho para ajudar as pessoas a terem controle de suas próprias vidas. Sendo o nosso propósito de “colocar o poder do dinheiro nas mãos das pessoas” um north star para todo nosso ecossistema de atuação.
 
Agora, pensa com a gente… Se Nath e a Margarete conseguiram criar o maior canal de educação financeira do mundo, começando do zero, imagina só o que podemos fazer com tantas pessoas extraordinárias unidas com um mesmo propósito?
  
Estamos vivendo o melhor momento da nossa existência e você pode fazer parte dessa transformação. Se inscreva nas nossas vagas e impacte histórias. Afinal, somos mais que uma startup, somos um movimento!

Name: Moksha Media Group
Description:
Established in 2012, Moksha Media Group stands as a testament to transformative creative brilliance. As a growing media-tech company we offer a suite of Creative, Production, Digital Markeitng, SaaS and Web 3.0 solutions. 
Equipped with 200+ dynamic talents, expansive 4000 sq ft studios, and over 2 million annual photo and video outputs, Moksha stands as a media industry powerhouse. We are spread across Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, New York, and Paris and are trusted by industry giants like Hindustan Unilever, Marico Limited, Amazon, Flipkart, BoAt, Myntra, Aditya Birla Fashion Retail Limited, Levi's, Bvlgari and many more. 

Rooted in a relentless pursuit of excellence, we harness the power of creative brilliance, cutting-edge technology, and strategic acumen to sculpt narratives that build brands that matter.

Ready to embark on a journey of creative exploration? Reach out to us at hey@moksha.in and let's craft something extraordinary together!

Name: RELX
Description:
RELX is a global provider of information-based analytics and decision tools for professional and business customers, enabling them to make better decisions, get better results and be more productive. 

Our purpose is to benefit society by developing products that help researchers advance scientific knowledge; doctors and nurses improve the lives of patients; lawyers promote the rule of law and achieve justice and fair results for their clients; businesses and governments prevent fraud; consumers access financial services and get fair prices on insurance; and customers learn about markets and complete transactions. 

Our purpose guides our actions beyond the products that we develop. It defines us as a company. Every day across RELX our employees are inspired to undertake initiatives that make unique contributions to society and the communities in which we operate.

RELX serves customers in more than 180 countries and has offices in about 40 countries. It employs more than 36,000 people over 40% of whom are in North America.
____

Please note that RELX does not contact people through social media to extend job or contract offers, nor do we request money, credit card details or bank account information as part of any project or job application process. Any such request is fraudulent. Please contact your local law enforcement agency if you have been victimized by a scammer. For careers, access https://www.relx.com/careers/why-relx

Name: Mercom India
Description:
Mercom India is a subsidiary of U.S.-based Mercom Capital Group, a leading clean energy communications and consulting firm recognized worldwide for its expertise in renewable energy. Mercom is widely recognized for its leadership and influence in helping shape India’s rapidly growing clean energy markets.
 
Mercom India is located in Bangalore and provides research, news, and communications services for clean energy organizations in the Indian market.

Name: Dream11
Description:
Dream11, the flagship brand of Dream Sports, is a sports entertainment platform where 250 million fans follow sports along with their favourite creators. With live match watch-alongs, a space for fans to react and banter together, and free-to-play fantasy sports, Dream11 delivers a full second-screen experience to ‘Make Every Match More Exciting.’

Dream Sports, India’s leading sports technology company, powers the fan journey for 300 million sports fans across entertainment, content, gaming, travel, AI, and grassroot sports development. Its portfolio includes FanCode, India’s digital sports destination; DreamSetGo, India’s premium sports travel and experiences platform; Dream Cricket, an AAA mobile sports game; Dream Horizon, our battle-tested tech, now open-sourced & free for all, Dream Sports AI, reimagining sports with AI, and Dream Money, empowering every Indian to grow their net-worth. The company is also home to the Dream Sports Foundation, its philanthropic arm.

Founded in 2008 by Harsh Jain and Bhavit Sheth, Dream Sports is headquartered in Mumbai.

For more information: https://dreamsports.group/

Name: ProPakistani
Description:
We are Pakistan's leading news company, bringing you the latest in business, tech, entrepreneurship, sports & entertainment.

ProPakistani was founded in 2008 as an online blog for industry updates. Throughout the years we have consistently created and diversified consumer-centered content, and built an atmosphere of trust and credibility in the digital space. We are now Pakistan's leading digital publishing platform, with a wide digital reach of 15+ million monthly page views, 4+ million active monthly readers and 1.5+ million followers on social media.

For every citizen, there is something on our platform that they will connect to, read about, and enhance their knowledge through. Everything we do is for Pakistanis, by Pakistanis. And it is through empowering our readers with verified information and building an intellectual community, that we aim to progress towards making a positive impact in Pakistan.

Name: CIO Online
Description:
CIO, from Foundry, produces award-winning content and resources for information technology leaders. The CIO portfolio includes CIO.com, CIO digital magazine, CIO Events and the CIO Executive Council. CIO properties provide business technology leaders with analysis and insight on information technology trends and a keen understanding of IT’s role in achieving business goals. 

CIO websites and publications appear in more than 25 countries, including Asia, Australia, Canada, Finland, India and Sweden. CIO Events include the annual CIO 100 Symposium & Awards and CIO Perspectives. The CIO Executive Council is a professional organization of CIOs created to serve as an unbiased and trusted peer advisory group. 

Company information is available at https://foundryco.com/.

Name: AFROTECH
Description: Where Inclusive Tech Companies and Innovators Meet.

Name: Engineering News-Record
Description: Engineering News-Record is the construction industry's essential and trusted independent source of news and analysis. ENR's worldwide audience includes contractors, project owners, engineers, architects, government regulators and industry suppliers. ENR connects diverse sectors of the industry with coverage that everyone needs about issues such as business management, design, construction methods, technology, safety, law, legislation, environment, education and workforce.

Name: Associação Nova Escola
Description:
Somos uma organização de impacto social, sem fins lucrativos, que tem como missão fortalecer educadores para transformar a Educação pública brasileira e possibilitar que os alunos desenvolvam o máximo de seu potencial. Referência absoluta no desenvolvimento de conteúdos para professores desde 1986, quando atuávamos no segmento de revista impressa, em 2015, com o apoio da Fundação Lemann, nos transformamos em uma plataforma digital, com mais de 3,1 milhões de acessos mensais.

Produzimos Reportagens, Cursos autoinstrucionais, Formações, Planos de Aula e Materiais Educacionais, gratuitos, para apoiar professores, coordenadores pedagógicos e diretores que atuam na Educação Básica das escolas públicas brasileiras.

Name: Female Daily Network
Description:
Female Daily (Part of Transmedia Group) is Indonesia's largest beauty destination on a mission to revolutionise the way Indonesian women discover, share and buy beauty products, services & cosmetics. It's home to the largest female online community and beauty enthusiast where content, community meets commerce. 


Share and discover the most comprehensive beauty products reviews, salons & spa reviews, beauty trends, and original editorial content at Femaledaily.com

Name: CryptoNewsZ
Description:
CryptoNewsZ is a News Publication Media that provides updates on cryptocurrency, ICOs, DApps, and blockchain. 

As more and more people turn to cryptocurrencies every passing day, we cater high-quality, unbiased and well-analyzed content to them. We cover the latest news, price analysis and interviews for the crypto community.

Reporters at CryptoNewsZ work round the clock to provide upbeat, timely and consistent news updates to its readers. 

Thus CryptoNewsZ endeavors to fill the void of a reliable source of information in digital currency community.

Name: MIT Technology Review Brasil
Description:
Fundada no Instituto de Tecnologia de Massachusetts em 1899, a MIT Technology Review é uma plataforma de comunicação e conexão independente cujas análises, recursos, avaliações, entrevistas e eventos explicam o impacto comercial, social e político das novas tecnologias.

No Brasil, a MIT Technology Review atua desde 2020 com a missão de traduzir o impacto das inovações globais para o contexto nacional. Produzimos conteúdos editoriais, relatórios especiais, newsletters e eventos que conectam tecnologia, negócios e sociedade. Com uma abordagem local e foco em líderes empresariais, empreendedores e tomadores de decisão, a MIT Technology Review Brasil se consolidou como uma referência em análises profundas sobre transformação digital e futuro da inovação no país.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: News Corp
Description: News Corp is home to some of the world’s most trusted brands, producing content and experiences that inform and inspire audiences around the world every day. As a diversified media and information services company that spans continents and cultures, we deliver the news people need, stories that entertain, digital solutions for decision-makers and real estate resources that make the journey home a little easier for everyone. Join us in shaping the next chapter of media and information for the modern age.

Name: FinTech Futures
Description:
FinTech Futures is the leading global provider of independent intelligence and insight for professionals in the fintech sector.

We have been providing timely, in-depth intelligence for over 40 years and are trusted by thousands of professionals from banks and financial institutions to service and software providers. 

Our experienced editorial team provides comprehensive coverage - providing the latest industry developments, unveiling new trends and sharing valuable insights across a range of areas including FinTech, BankingTech, PayTech, RegTech, WealthTech and LendTech.

As well as daily news we publish webinars, videos, white papers, reports and surveys, Banking Technology Magazine, case studies, podcasts plus much more.

We’ve established ourselves as a trusted authoritative voice with an average of 100,000 visitors to our website each month, 70,000+ contacts in our database, 25,000 newsletter subscribers and over 160,000 followers on social media.

In addition to our digital presence, our editorial team is present at all key industry events providing on-the-ground coverage. 

In October 2023 we were also crowned the Best Innovative Integrated Digital Media Platform at the FinTech B2B Marketing Awards.

FinTech Futures also holds industry networking events and awards including Banking Tech Awards, Banking Tech Awards USA, PayTech Awards and PayTech Awards USA.

Name: INSPO
Description:
INSPO is the social network for knowledge sharing, industry insights, thought leadership.

Our mission is to become the go-to place for professionals to turn expertise into influence through thought leadership. Our vision is to make professional thought leadership portfolios an essential part of every career.

INSPO is a platform that allows professionals to publish, share, and monetise their thought leadership portfolios with ease.

Develop your own thought leader profile, lead discussions in your field, and be part of the thought leadership revolution with INSPO.

We are a close-knit team reinventing the thought leadership and knowledge-sharing economy one expert insight at a time.

JOIN INSPO TODAY:
https://bit.ly/3FrFZA3

Name: Food Safety Magazine
Description: Food Safety Magazine is the source for science-based solutions for food safety and quality professionals worldwide.

Name: EVreporter
Description: EVreporter.com is an online platform that provides deeply researched content about the growing electric vehicle ecosystem in India. We cover the latest news, expert opinions, events and trends in the Electric Vehicle industry and associated business lines. The website aims to serve the information needs of following user segments, i.e. end-users who will buy the electric vehicles, EV enthusiasts who can find resources to learn about the entire EV value chain, and Businesses in EV space who are looking to find regulatory and policy-related information. The platform encourages all stakeholders to participate and enrich the knowledge base thus created.

Name: Geography Realm
Description: Geography Realm is a popular information site covering research and case studies about the applications of geography, geographic information systems (GIS), geospatial technologies, and cartography. Visitors to the site can information about physical and human geography as well as guides for learning about geography and developing a career in geography. Geography Realm covers a wide range of topics, including natural landscapes, climate patterns, cultural geography, cartography, and environmental issues.

Name: Frankwatching
Description:
Welkom bij de grootste digital growth community van Nederland en Vlaanderen 

Hier vind je de nieuwste ontwikkelingen op het gebied van marketing, communicatie en content. Maar Frankwatching is meer dan alleen een informatiebron. We zijn een community van vakgenoten die samen de branche veranderen en verbeteren. Als onderdeel van onze digital growth community kun je rekenen op waardevolle, inspirerende, praktische en innovatieve inzichten, en ook jouw bijdrage is waardevol.

Volg deze pagina en ontdek hoe we elkaar helpen om te leren, groeien en ontwikkelen. Van artikelen en webinars tot trainingen en events: met Frankwatching loop je voorop in de digitale wereld.

Name: GrowthJockey
Description:
GrowthJockey is a global full stack venture builder, empowering mid-to-large enterprises with AI-driven digital transformation. We specialize in building technology-led startups that drive measurable success.
Our expertise spans AI, ML, and AdTech, with innovations like Intellsys.ai, a revolutionary AI AdTech platform featuring 100+ proprietary AI models that optimise marketing performance with precision.

With a track record of 25+ ventures launched for Fortune 500 companies, we are committed to reshaping industries through customer-centric, digital-first, and AI-powered solutions.

Let’s build the future together

Name: kumparan
Description:
Having launched in January of 2017, kumparan was co-founded and backed by some of the most recognizable names in Indonesia’s media and internet space.

kumparan’s platform offers an intuitive experience of online news and social media tools custom-made for Indonesians. kumparan users can consume stories written collaboratively by the site’s bullpen of 100+ of journalists, see trending stories, and insert comments just like any other online media.

But what makes kumparan different is the fact that it is also a social media platform. The site acts as a dynamic online newsroom where regular users can also become news providers. kumparan users can write stories and follow other users within the platform. Stories are presented in feeds and timelines just like other social media sites but users may also choose to follow a variety of topics and profiles. They will also only see content relevant to their interests in their feeds.

kumparan now have millions of monthly unique visitors, having onboarded several local media outlets into its platform. Some more media will join kumparan’s platform in the coming months.

kumparan has also been able to quickly gain the trust of news and policy makers, says the company. Government officials, experts, politicians, and celebrities have produced content on the platform already. This has thus far served to validate the team’s vision.

Name: Adtitude Digital
Description: A Technology, Data and Digital Marketing Services Provider.  Our core mission is to provide Businesses and Brands with Data driven Software solutions and Digital Marketing assistance.

Name: Creative Friends Perú
Description:

Si buscas un lugar para aprender y conectar sin miedo a experimentar… este es tu lugar #CreativeFriend.

Name: Ignition Group
Description:
Ignition Group’s mission is to empower consumers, entrepreneurs and organisations to actively engage and integrate into the digital ecosystem. By ensuring access to resources and technology, we strive to foster economic growth and prosperity in the communities we serve. From its beginnings in the telecommunications industry, developing software solutions and building relationships between brands and customers, Ignition has expanded into a technology, media, telecommunications and customer experience company.
At Ignition, we're not just about innovation – we're about impact. We hire the best people, train them for excellence and provide an environment for them to thrive in their chosen careers. Our customer-centric approach drives us to develop highly customised solutions tailored to each client's unique needs.
Today, Ignition Group is one of the largest technology companies in South Africa, employing over 4000 people across a range of business units. We have expanded our presence in South Africa with offices in Johannesburg and Cape Town, and internationally with offices in the United States, the United Kingdom and Portugal. We are proud to say Ignition is a global force driving positive change. We’re powered by possibility.

Name: E-Commerce Brasil
Description:
Somos o maior portal de e-commerce da América Latina. 

Produzimos diariamente artigos técnicos e notícias especializadas sobre o e-commerce no Brasil, além de ministrar cursos, workshops, catálogo de fornecedores, e ser responsável pelos eventos mais procurados dentro do setor. 

Juntos, somamos mais de 100 atividades presenciais e 2,5 mil textos publicados por ano, cada um deles pensado para manter você por dentro de tudo que acontece no comércio eletrônico no Brasil. 

Somos o guia nos negócios para uma audiência entre 600 e 700 mil acessos. Agora, para você também.

Name: Dunia Tambang Media
Description: Dunia Tambang adalah platform news and media yang mempertemukan perusahaan, kontraktor, konsultan, praktisi tambang , maupun individu dalam satu akses. Saat ini, Dunia Tambang berfokus pada bidang news and media yang mempublikasikan kajian ilmiah dan isu terhangat seputar pertambangan.

Name: ARE YOU LOOKING FOR NEW JOBS?
BNC Network
Description:
BNC is the largest project intelligence provider in the Middle East, Africa, and South Asia, covering over 37,000 live projects valued at more than USD 17 trillion across 72 countries. Known for its robust project intelligence, BNC serves as a vital resource for the construction project market, empowering professionals with data-driven insights, advanced analytics, and streamlined sales tools.

BNC’s SaaS platform, IBIS, is designed to increase project sales and offers three primary product lines:
1. Project Intelligence: BNC’s extensive database covers projects across the industrial, urban, oil and gas, transport, and utilities sectors. Users can track projects throughout their lifecycle—from concept to completion—with access to over 180,000 project profiles, 200,000 companies, and 250,000 contacts.
2. Sales Enhancer: Designed to integrate with existing CRM systems, BNC’s Sales Enhancer improves lead tracking, sales forecasting, and reporting capabilities. It helps clients streamline data-driven workflows, enhance visibility, and drive efficiency, enabling superior project outcomes through a single, unified platform.
3. Reports & Analytics: This offering delivers actionable, fact-based market insights, including daily project news, monthly market reports, and quarterly webinars. These insights allow users to make informed decisions based on comprehensive sector trends and market intelligence.

BNC also offers a mobile app for on-the-go project insights, a daily BNC Bulletin featuring top project stories, and a credit system for accessing additional information beyond standard subscription limits. With thousands of industry reports, a daily newsletter reaching over 68,000 professionals, and regular webinars, BNC stands as the premier resource for integrated project intelligence and sales enablement across the region.

Name: Inside Retail Australia
Description:
Inside Retail Australia stands as a premier media outlet, delivering a powerful fusion of local and global retail news and perspectives.

What began as a weekly newspaper in 1971 has evolved into a commanding retail education hub, offering a range of daily news, analysis, exclusive executive interviews, masterclasses and more. 

Inside Retail's strength lies in the professionalism and dedication of its distinguished award-winning journalists and content creators that span various corners of the globe. This comprehensive coverage is channeled through dedicated websites for Australia, Asia, New Zealand, and the United States.

Inside Retail has firmly established itself as the ultimate go-to source for retail industry professionals seeking to remain informed about the latest trends, breakthroughs, and developments within this dynamic sector.

Name: Furniture Today
Description:
Furniture Today is the weekly business newspaper for the U.S. furniture industry, providing news, research and other information to furniture and bedding retail stores, mass merchants, wholesale distributors, manufacturing executives, sales representatives and suppliers.
 
Our website, Furnituretoday.com, is No. 1 in the furniture industry and continues to grow in popularity daily.
 
From breaking news to daily need-to-know industry information, Furnituretoday.com is the site to read in the furniture industry. 

Our readers tend to visit often to keep abreast of current events, find expert advice, track style trends, see who's who, explore industry research and much more.
 
Our site keeps the furniture industry in tune with its business and the world surrounding it.

Name: Humans Of EV
Description:
Humans of EV is a dynamic platform dedicated to accelerating the electric vehicle revolution through authentic storytelling, knowledge-sharing, and meaningful collaboration. We bridge the gap between EV innovators, manufacturers, policymakers, and enthusiasts, focusing on the human side of the EV journey.

Our mission is to inspire change, educate our audience about the latest developments in the industry, and drive innovation within the EV ecosystem by showcasing the personal stories, challenges, and triumphs of those shaping the future of sustainable mobility. Through expert insights, thought leadership, and real-world stories, Humans of EV empowers businesses, consumers, and decision-makers to embrace clean mobility solutions.

We connect EV users with manufacturers, charge point operators, and technology innovators, creating a community where knowledge and solutions flow freely to drive adoption and accelerate the transition to clean energy.

Connect us at: contact@humansofev.com
Visit our website: www.humansofev.info

Name: Basis
Description:
Basis is a global provider of media automation and programmatic advertising software and services for enterprises. The Basis platform consolidates digital operations across programmatic, publisher-direct, connected TV (CTV), search, and social to unify and streamline campaigns. Basis integrates otherwise disconnected processes, systems, and point solutions to create a seamless workflow and centralized system of record for digital advertisers. 

Headquartered in Chicago, Basis is renowned for its commitment to employees and workplace culture.

Name: Lingopal
Description:
Lingopal is redefining real-time communication with AI-powered dubbing and speech-to-speech translation across 120+ languages. Whether it’s live streams, video-on-demand, meetings, or phone calls, Lingopal enables seamless multilingual communication—emotionally accurate, ultra-fast, and secure.

Our proprietary AI models preserve tone, slang, expressions, and facial nuances, making translated audio feel natural and native. With ultra-low latency, robust security, and no data collection, Lingopal is trusted by global leaders—from streaming giants and financial institutions to major brands like Disney and BlackRock.

Lingopal empowers every voice to be understood—live, in any language, on any platform.
