Name: FlashLabs
Description:
FlashLabs is an applied research lab pioneering fully autonomous sales and customer‑experience systems. We go beyond standard AI tools by creating a human‑AI hybrid that learns and adapts—combining machine efficiency with human strategic insight to achieve results no one could reach alone .

Our core ambition? Autonomy. Every workflow, from outreach to support, is designed to ultimately run on self‑driving AI agents—unleashing human teams to focus on innovation, not operations.

In short: FlashLabs builds intelligent, autonomous systems that deliver and optimize—partnering with people not to replace, but to elevate.

Name: Protect Group
Description:
Protect Group is a tech company focused on better customer experiences and better business outcomes. 

Our platform, Pulse, helps brands offer refundability and high-value ancillaries that customers actually want. The result is higher conversion, happier customers, and new revenue.

We are the team behind Refund Protect. Customers can upgrade to a refundable ticket at checkout. If life happens and they cannot attend, we assess evidence and pay fast. 

Partners gain a trusted experience that grows sales without adding friction.

Through Protect Plus, we add complementary products that increase attachment and loyalty: 
- Flight Delay Compensation
- Delayed Baggage Compensation
- eSIM
- Lounge Access
- Carbon Offsetting. 

Everything is integrated with a focus on simple UX and measurable results.

Our AI models power Smart Pricing and event-based strategies. Partners see pricing that adapts to context. Leaders see the impact in the Pulse Reporting Dashboard with clear KPIs.

We work across airlines, OTAs, hospitality, transport, and events. 

Whether you are optimising an existing checkout or building a new ancillary strategy, we bring practical tools, fast integration options, and a partner mindset.

Innovation. Community. Accountability. Passion. 

These values guide how we build, ship, and support. If you want to make the experience better while growing ancillary revenue, let’s talk.

Specialities: Refundable tickets. Ancillary retail. Smart Pricing. Event-based pricing. Embedded refunds. Compensation products. Travel and hospitality tech. Partner success. Data and analytics. Global enablement.

Wherever tickets are sold, we’re ready to help.

Why do we exist?
The world faces countless challenges—pandemics, poverty, environmental crises, and more. But with the right tools, knowledge, and skills, these challenges can be tackled head-on. Evolution may be natural, but accelerating human intelligence is the key to meaningful progress.

Our motto, "Augmenting Human Intelligence," embodies our vision to empower individuals with advanced technology and wisdom. Inspired by ancient knowledge of the Vedas, we blend timeless wisdom with modern innovation.

What drives us?
We are guided by a simple principle: "Work is worthwhile only if it touches lives." Our efforts focus on deploying advanced technologies at the grassroots level, making their benefits accessible to everyone. Whether it's enhancing skills, fostering innovation, or enabling communities to solve pressing problems, AjnaLens is here to make an impact.

Through our work, we strive to create a future where individuals can realize their potential, communities can thrive, and humanity can grow in harmony with the planet. AjnaLens is more than a company—it’s a mission to reshape the world for the better.

Description:
Orderific is on a mission to help restaurant owners boost revenue, cut down on costs, and make the dining experience better for everyone involved.

Why Orderific?

No more losing customers to long wait times or missed opportunities. With Orderific’s QR code menu, your customers can simply:

1. Browse your menu on their own mobile devices
2. Place their orders right away
3. Pay with ease, without waiting for staff

Orderific integrates with top POS systems and payment providers like Stripe, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal. This means less time spent on the small stuff, so you and your team can focus on what really matters—your customers.

The Benefits

1. Higher Revenue: Serve more people and increase ticket sizes with smoother, faster service.
2. Enhanced Customer Service: Eliminate wait times for ordering, making for a more enjoyable experience.
3. Faster Delivery: Orders go straight to the kitchen, cutting out any extra steps.
4. Smart Marketing: Use customer insights to share special offers, new menu items, and promotions that actually resonate.
5. Eco-Friendly: Swap out paper menus for a fully digital experience.

Who We Work With

Orderific serves a wide range of venues: restaurants, hotels, bars, cafes, bakeries, food trucks, and more. Wherever people enjoy food, we’re there to make it a better experience.

Ready to See the Difference?

Imagine taking control of your business without the constant grind. Orderific makes it easier to grow your revenue, streamline operations, and improve customer experience—all in one. Start today with a free demo.

 Visit www.orderific.com to learn more or message us here on LinkedIn to book a free demo consultation.

Name: Mr Family Office
Description:
Mr Family Office reaches +60k family office professionals, UHWNIs and related community every week. 

Founded by a family office veteran with over 20 years experience, we’re a digital media business that delivers the latest news, commentary and insights on family offices and UHNWIs.

With estimated AUM exceeding $5 trillion, family offices manage the assets of the world’s wealthiest. While historically operating under the radar, today the family office world is a visible and crucial part of global finance, shaping markets and influencing industries.
 
And while family offices revolutionize finance, the great wealth transfer is unlocking huge opportunities.

Name: Wheere
Description:
Wheere is a French deeptech company revolutionizing indoor geolocation. 

Our technology is the only one capable of covering a site of one square kilometer with just four transmitters. 

By leveraging unmodulated low-frequency waves and a unique algorithm, our solution penetrates even the densest obstacles, such as concrete walls, and offers a sub-meter accuracy. 

Founded in 2021 by Pierre-Arnaud Coquelin and Antoine Carrabin, Wheere successfully closed an €11 million seed round in July 2023.

At Wheere, our mission is to make indoor geolocation as accessible as GPS—ubiquitous, affordable, and integrated into all B2C and B2B devices. 

To achieve this, we have two key milestones ahead:
- By 2027: Reduce the size, energy consumption, and production costs of our receivers.
- By 2030: Achieve global availability of our technology through the spatial deployment of our #LEOPNT transmitters.

Description:

It also writes on media law and media technology and publishes journalism jobs.

As well as all the essential news, Press Gazette’s content pillars include: audience and business data, platforms and their relationships with publishers, interviews with media bosses and others who are working to create a sustainable future for media, and the weekly podcast The Future of Media Explained.

Press Gazette reaches more than 350,000 readers a month via pressgazette.co.uk, and a further 15,000 through its daily and weekly newsletters.

Press Gazette’s events include the British Journalism Awards, which have been running for 11 years and are the only event to cover every sector of the UK news industry. More recently the Future of Media Technology Conference and Awards, The Media 100 Networking event for C level decision makers as well as The Future of Media Trends roundtables have all launched.

In 2022 Press Gazette's events attracted more than 1,000 senior industry leaders, management and teams across leadership, ops, product, revenue, marketing, digital, content, data, insight audience and tech at every major publisher and media group across the UK and the US.

Name: ETUS Media Holding
Description:
O nome ETUS significa Eu Tenho Um Sonho. É um acrônimo da frase mais marcante do discurso de Martin Luther King Jr. em 1963, onde ele falava com mais ênfase sobre a desigualdade racial nos EUA.

Desde lá de trás, num mundo de “nãos”, chegamos para abrir caminhos. Pra gente, pra quem tá com a gente, e pra quem quer ir mais longe.

Decidimos criar uma marca e provar que a nossa metodologia para fazer marketing digital era realmente tão boa quanto pensávamos. E num é que deu certo?

Uma das razões pelo nosso sucesso são os valores que nos regem:
Brio, Transparência e Fé.

Brio é não se conformar quando alguém diz que é impossível sem ao menos tentar. 

É 1% inspiração e 99% correria. Nosso brio é o que nos move, nos faz romper barreiras.

Transparência é o que dita o ritmo do jogo. 

Se aprende dentro de casa para gerar impacto positivo lá fora.
Aqui, jogo limpo é regra e nos motiva a compartilhar o que conquistamos.

Fé é acreditar no seu time, no seu companheiro de batalha, acreditar que é possível, mesmo que ainda ninguém tenha feito, mesmo que todos falem que é impossível, mesmo que não vejamos nenhuma saída. 

E sabe o que é MAIS IMPORTANTE? 

Mudamos MUITAS vidas!

ModelFlow transforms process development from manual, fragmented, and experiment-heavy to structured, predictive, and scalable. By connecting data, models, and teams in one environment, our technology enables organizations to accelerate development timelines, reduce experimental burden, and make higher-confidence decisions across the entire CMC and MSAT lifecycle.
Grounded in deep scientific expertise and modern engineering, our mission is to empower biopharma teams with the digital infrastructure needed to deliver life-changing therapies faster, safer, and more reliably.
From small molecules to biologics and advanced modalities, we bridge AI, modeling, and domain knowledge to turn complex development processes into intuitive, reusable digital workflows - helping our partners bring better medicines to patients, faster.

Name: Women in Big Data Munich
Description:
Women in Big Data (WiBD) started as a grass-roots organization in 2015 with the mission to inspire and connect women in big data and AI careers. Starting with 15 members and one chapter in San Francisco’s Bay Area, the WiBD community grew to over 20,000+ members across 37+ chapters and six continents spreading inspiration, growing networks, and promoting member success on an ever-expanding platform.

In 2020, the organization filed paperwork that shifted Women in Big Data from grassroots to non-profit, expanding funding capabilities and laying a foundation for a new mission. The founders realized that, as important as inspiration and connection are, their ability to move the needle on a future in which gender and resources don’t limit equitable participation is finite. A new mission was outlined to cultivate tangible opportunities; unlock latent potential, act as a catalyst for advancement, and empower equity allies of any gender.

Women in Big Data is an inclusive community (all genders welcome) who appreciate that, in the broadest sense, big data and AI is a tool being harnessed at every level, in every industry today, to shape tomorrow. Broader diversity among leaders and practitioners will improve the use and function of big data and AI ensuring a future that’s better for all of us.

Name: Rivista.AI
Description:
Rivista.AI è un hub dedicato all'innovazione digitale e all'Intelligenza Artificiale. 
L’obiettivo è quello di seguire un approccio profondo, analitico e accademico nei confronti della vari temi che compongono il grande mondo dell’Intelligenza Artificiale: dal machine learning alle reti neurali, passando per i large language models, ci impegniamo a offrire analisi rigorose e approfondite. I contenuti sono frutto di ricerca approfondita, fornendo una comprensione avanzata delle più recenti innovazioni e dei dibattiti accademici nel campo dell’AI.
Affrontiamo l’Intelligenza Artificiale non solo come una disciplina accademica, ma anche come una forza trasformativa in vari settori della società. 
Esploriamo come l’AI sta plasmando l’industria, la medicina, il business, l’educazione e molti altri ambiti. Il nostro obiettivo è fornire una visione completa di come queste tecnologie stiano influenzando il modo in cui viviamo, lavoriamo e interagiamo, senza tralasciare uno sguardo anche alla politica e alle scelte normative.
Ci concentriamo in particolare sulla rivoluzione portata dai large language models e la loro influenza nella comprensione del linguaggio naturale, dall’elaborazione del linguaggio umano alla generazione di testi avanzati.
Esploriamo le opportunità e le sfide di questa innovazione, analizzando le sue implicazioni etiche, sociali ed economiche.
Offriamo approfondimenti tecnici che soddisfano le esigenze di professionisti, ricercatori, manager, studenti e semplici appassionati del settore. 
Dallo stato attuale dell’AI alle prospettive future, Rivista.AI funge da piattaforma per discutere le ultime tendenze, anticipare le sfide emergenti e immaginare il futuro di questa disciplina in rapida crescita.

Michigan Lawyers Weekly, a legal newspaper founded in 1986, is newspaper and online resource dedicated to reporting on – and enhancing – the practice of law in Michigan.

Our online and print content provides timely, vital information and news, news from across Michigan, verdicts and settlements, special features and publications, upcoming events, and more.

Online or in print, readers can access opinion digests and full-text opinions from the 6th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals affecting Michigan practice, Michigan Supreme Court, Court of Appeals (published and unpublished), Michigan Business Courts, U.S. District Court and the Bankruptcy Court in the Eastern and Western districts and agency decisions. 

Subscribe to Michigan Lawyers Weekly for access to all our premium content, or sign up for our FREE Daily Alert e-newsletter.

We do not provide legal advice.

Name: Public Environmental Data Partners
Description: The Public Environmental Data Project is committed to preserving and providing public access to federal environmental data. We are a volunteer coalition of several environmental, justice, and policy organizations, researchers across several universities, archivists, and students who rely on federal datasets and tools to support critical research, advocacy, policy, and litigation work. To gather insights on what data to preserve, we reached out to our networks, which consist largely of environmental justice groups and networks, state and local government climate offices, and academic researchers. We compiled a large list of federal databases and tools, and prioritized them based on their relative impact, our confidence that we could archive them, and the relative effort it would take to obtain and archive them.

Why do I need to get a copy of Petro Industry News?
Petro Industry News provides the latest product and application news regarding instrumentation and technologies used within the hydrocarbon related markets. If Instrumentation and technology that can monitor, analyse and test is of interest to you and for your professional work, then Petro Industry news is a must have.

How do I get a magazine sent to me?
Click the subscribe button and follow the steps to subscribe. Select the journals you want to receive but remember some journals are not sent to some countries, so fill in your address for a full list of magazines we can send you.

Can I get a back issue?
Yes all our issues are in the digital eJournal section on the website. So locate the edition you want, and read online.

Circulated Worldwide. Petro Industry News, which now incorporates Biofuel Industry News, is sent to a worldwide readership in the petrochemical, refining, gas and oil industries. Petro Industry News is published 6 times a year in a tabloid (A3) format.

Over 39% of Petro Industry News copies are read by over 5 people, this means over 60,000 additional readers..
Want your copy? - https://www.petro-online.com/subscribe

Description:
PaperDoc est une startup française de la e-santé qui aide les professionnels de santé, chercheurs et formateurs à analyser, synthétiser et exploiter la recherche scientifique en quelques minutes, grâce à une intelligence artificielle fiable, traçable et souveraine.

Notre mission : accélérer la compréhension sans compromettre la rigueur scientifique. Nous avons conçu un écosystème d’IA pensé pour les usages du terrain : 

Archie : moteur de recherche scientifique intelligent qui interroge plus de 225 millions de publications et fournit des réponses sourcées et vérifiables. 

Archie Cab’ : accès simple et interactif aux recommandations HAS, pour relier pratique clinique et données scientifiques.

Syntia : assistant d’analyse et de rédaction qui agrège plusieurs documents (articles, recos, rapports) pour produire un contenu structuré, cité et exploitable.

Pourquoi PaperDoc ?
Parce que notre IA ne remplace pas la réflexion, elle la renforce.
Parce qu’elle est faite par et pour les professionnels, et qu’elle ouvre la boîte noire de l’intelligence artificielle en santé.

Déjà adoptée par plus de 20 000 utilisateurs, PaperDoc s’impose comme l’alternative française aux IA généralistes, au service de la santé, de la recherche et de la formation.

PaperDoc — L’IA française qui fait gagner du temps aux soignants, sans jamais trahir la science.

Name: Nami
Description:
Nami is building the guest experience infrastructure layer for hotels—turning the fragmented nature of travel into a seamless journey from booking to checkout.
Today, a guest’s journey is stitched together from separate tools: trip discovery happens on platforms like MMT or Airbnb; check-in needs repeated ID verification; food discovery relies on Zomato or Google Maps; concierge requests go through staff. Each step is isolated. Preferences and context are lost along the way.
Nami exists to bring it all together.
We integrate with hotels as a persistent layer—remembering guests, tracking preferences, and enabling conversational access to upgrades, food, recommendations, services, and help. Like a concierge that travels with you—without needing another app.
For guests, Nami reduces friction. No app-switching. No repeating yourself. Just one interface that feels natural and easy.
For hotels, Nami drives revenue through well-timed upsells and cross-sells, while giving visibility into the full guest lifecycle—from pre-arrival to post-stay follow-up.

Backed by Institut Français, the Goethe Institut, the Jack Ma Foundation, and the Alibaba Foundation, Publiseer is a digital platform that helps independent and underserved African writers, musicians, filmmakers, and video game developers, typically those from low-income and disadvantaged communities, to earn above the minimum wage and live above the poverty line from the sales of their creative works. 

Publiseer achieves this by helping them distribute, protect, promote, and monetize their creative works worldwide, at no charge, with just a single click, and the digital platform shares in the revenue it generates for these creators, which in turn goes back into helping more creators in Africa.

Every day, Publiseer discovers extraordinary local African creators and gives them a platform to focus on doing what they love doing the most and what they know how to do best, which is to create. At the same time, Publiseer handles the tedious but important business of transforming their creativity into wealth for them. When Publiseer accepts a creator on its platform, Publiseer fine-tunes their creative works to industry standard, so that the creator stands a chance to compete on a global scale. 

Then Publiseer distributes it to its over 400 well-established partner stores so that the creator is easily discovered. Publiseer also protect this content from illegal distribution and intellectual property theft, so the creator truly owns the content. The creators can monitor their sales performance on Publiseer's centralized dashboard, and receive their royalties via African-tailored payment methods, such as into a local bank account or through a mobile money wallet.

The digital platform is working towards helping at least 2 million African creatives earn above the minimum wage and live above the poverty line from the sales of their creative works, by 2030. Publiseer has been recognized by Ernst & Young as one of the 100 “most meaningful businesses in the world”.

The future of work isn't human or digital.
It's human and digital, orchestrated as one.

The truth is, every company already has a hybrid workforce, they just haven't recognized it yet. Every digital tool, GPT, agent is a digital teammate waiting for orchestration. The advantage now belongs to those who think differently about work: who see digital labor not as a risk to manage, but as an opportunity to expand what their business can achieve. The companies that will lead the next decade understand this. 

Success is not about replacing humans, it’s about elevating them. Freeing people from repetitive execution to focus on trust, relationships, and creativity. Productivity isn't measured in hours worked but in knowledge retained and multiplied.

We can help you meet this moment head on. We went first so we can help you move fast. Operating as our own customer zero we've spent the past year orchestrating our own hybrid workforce driving toward a goal to have 40% of our workforce made up of digital labor in 2026.

We have on boarded over 60 digital workers across 10 functions operating with a 5:1 digital-to-human work ratio, and achieved $5 million in savings driving a 17% return on investment as a business. "

AU-Startups is a movement, a media platform, and a rallying point for Africa’s next generation of founders, investors, and ecosystem builders. We exist to shine a light on the bold, the brave, and the brilliant—those building solutions for Africa and the world.

From idea-stage startups in Lagos to scale-ups in Nairobi, we tell the real stories behind the headlines—through founder interviews, pitch deck deep-dives, market insights, trend reports, and investor spotlights. We don’t just inform; we equip and connect.

Whether you're a founder, a believer in African innovation, or a curious global ally, this is your front-row seat to the future of the continent's startup economy.

*What You’ll Get:*
- Weekly founder features and behind-the-scenes startup stories
- Market and funding insights from across Africa
- Access to exclusive pitch decks, reports, and investor interviews
- Opportunities to support the ecosystem through pledges and patronage
- Invitations to AU-Startups events, challenges, and programs

Subscribe to get full access to the newsletter and publication archives.

 For Founders
Your story deserves to be heard. We showcase founders solving real problems in real markets—from scrappy MVPs to scale-ready ventures. Discover resources, get visibility, and connect with the ecosystem that believes in you.

 For Investors
Early-stage signal. Unfiltered insights. Access deal-ready startups through our exclusive pitch features, founder interviews, and trend analyses. Africa is not just a bet—it’s a breakout.

 For Media & Ecosystem Partners
We’re documenting Africa’s innovation story with the nuance and depth it deserves. If you’re looking for credible insights, future-forward trends, or rising stars—we’re your source.

 For Global Supporters
Join our community of readers and patrons from around the world who believe in the power of African entrepreneurship to transform live

Optimizing athletic performance hinges on a two-pronged approach: a deep understanding of an athlete's movement mechanics and the development of strong skills and technique. Traditional methods often rely on subjective evaluations or limited data points, making it challenging to pinpoint areas for improvement in either area. This is where AI steps in, offering a transformative approach to sports biomechanics analysis.

Our platform leverages cutting-edge computer vision models to analyze athletes' movements with unparalleled precision. By capturing videos of athletes during training or competition, our system extracts a wealth of data on:

1.	Joint Kinematics: 
2.	Posture and Alignment: 
3.	Force Distribution: 

This data goes beyond the limitations of human observation. By harnessing the power of AI, we can:

1.	Quantify Movement Patterns: 
2.	Identify Subtle Inefficiencies: 
3.	Personalize Training Regimens: 

Empowering Athletes, Optimizing Performance
Our vision is to create a future where AI serves as a powerful tool for athletes of all levels. By providing data-driven insights into biomechanics and facilitating the development of strong technical skills, we aim to:

1.	Unlock Potential: 
2.	Reduce Injury Risk: 
3.	Revolutionize Sports Training: 

Join us in this exciting journey as we transform the world of sports training through the power of AI and biomechanics analysis, empowering athletes to achieve peak performance!

Name: Environmental Technology Publications.

Environmental Technology Publications  is part of the International Labmate group of companies. The company also manages and runs specialist conferences and Exhibitions for the environmental and Petroleum industries. 

International Environmental Technology (www.envirotech-online.com) is the market leading environmental journal for companies wishing to sell their analytical and monitoring products into Europe, Africa and the Middle East.

Published six times a year, International Environmental Technology's aim is to introduce and promote the latest environmental monitoring and analytical instrumentation to readers and to provide advertisers with high-quality and high-quantity sales leads.

Asian Environmental Technology (www.envirotech-online.com) is the only journal for this territory that is dedicated to providing the latest news and information on environmental monitoring and analytical instrumentation. Published four times a year advertisers benefit from valuable sales leads and important contacts with local distributors.

Petro Industry News (www.petro-online.com) is sent to a worldwide readership in the instrumentation sector of petrochemical, biofuel, refining, gas and oil industries. Published six times a year Petro Industry News is circulated to named buyers and decision makers with purchasing influence.

Name: Techkon USA
Description:
Techkon USA is here for you. Truly. We consider it our mission to help offset, flexographic, and digital printers like you succeed. From the pre-press department to the press room to the ink kitchen we want to help you optimize your color processes and help you save money. BACKGROUND: Techkon is the innovation leader in densitometers, spectrophotometers and software solutions for the global print community. With a track record of 28+ years of continued technological excellence, Techkon products are chosen for their high degree of measurement speed, accuracy, repeatability, reliability and ease of operation in all areas of the printing industry.

Techkon’s unique color measurement solutions serve a wide range of customers in commercial, corporate and package printing facilities, and ink manufacture. Our best-in-class handheld devices provide the perfect entry point into easy-to-use, precise color control. Our high-end scanning devices have led to highly successful implementations by leading OEM press manufacturers and large commercial printers, yielding dramatic gains in quality, productivity and cost savings.

With an innate understanding of critical issues in color print reproduction, Techkon’s entire product line is recognized by leading industry organizations, and its products are positioned as the color measurement tools of choice for  printers around the world who are undergoing transformative changes to stay ahead.

Name: INVOKE
Description:
INVOKE has served over 1,000 clients across the APAC region since 2019, with a core clientele based in Malaysia and Singapore. 

Today, we are geared towards developing scalable data-driven solutions for small-to-medium enterprises (SMEs). Our in-house team of 30 product managers and software engineers work on 3 products. With adnexio, businesses are able to scout for talent, upskill them, and manage them all in one place. With meniaga, businesses are able to sell their products with ease and zero cost. With decoris, businesses are able to manage their marketing efforts with clarity and efficiency. 

Our organisational roots lie in data collection, data analysis, and data modelling - being the only organisation to correctly predict 2 national elections and manage the A-Z of data-driven campaigns. Our in-house team of 40 data scientists, consultants, and call centre analysts have since extended this expertise into providing services for an array of multilateral organisations, GLCs, and global academic institutions. 

Our commercial roots lie in providing data-driven marketing services accessible to micro and small businesses - the first of their kind in Malaysia. Our team of 30 digital marketers and creative artists continue to serve an array of SMEs, MNCs, and non-profits across 60 different industries. 

Through this multifaceted approach and melting pot of expertise, we have weathered a pandemic, tech bubble, and socioeconomic uncertainty to grow at an average of 80% Y-o-Y since 2019. 

We hire on an ongoing basis, occasionally developing customised JDs for special talents. Visit us on invokeisdata.com to apply today.

Name: Kinfolk Tech
Description:
Kinfolk Tech is building people-powered narrative infrastructure
for collective memory.

In a time when history is being rewritten, books are being banned,
and monuments still glorify oppression, Kinfolk Tech asks a critical
question: Who will preserve the stories of the people?

We are a nonprofit organization using immersive technology, public
art, and community-centered design to preserve and share untold
stories of place. These stories reshape how we understand history
and help us imagine new futures.

Our goal is to safeguard and share the histories of communities that
have long been pushed to the margins. But we don’t just document
stories. We return narrative power to the people who live them.
We work closely with Black, Brown, Indigenous, and Queer
communities to gather local stories, build cultural archives, and
bring memory to life through AR monuments, media, events, and
digital tools. Together, we are creating a new commemorative
model. One where communities shape what is remembered and
public space becomes a canvas for truth, imagination, and
belonging.

Description:
Burlington Media runs three B2B publishing, events and marketing brands: Briefing, Legal Practice Management (LPM), and Legal Support Network (LSN). We also have a fourth brand - a legal data service called Unicorn, which helps companies who sell to law firms find the right people to talk to.

Set up in 2006 as Legal Support Network Ltd (LSN), we've been building a community for people in law firm management throughout the UK for over 10 years. We changed our company name to Burlington Media Group in 2016 to reflect the breadth of brands we now offer the community.

What do we do?

We bring the legal business services community together online through websites, events, publications, social media and e-marketing. 

Briefing and Legal Practice Management are B2B media brands focused on management decision makers in legal business in the UK and internationally. They span digital magazines, conferences (virtual and in-real-life) and micro-events, social and online media, and email marketing.

Legal Support Network is our B2B online and in-person community brand that connects suppliers to the legal vertical with business services people, and law firms to business services. It hosts a focused content website and reaches the community through e-marketing and social media.

Description:

We believe standardizing the 3D ecosystem will enable developers and content creators to more easily describe, compose, and simulate large-scale 3D projects and build an ever-widening range of 3D-enabled products and services. Part of the Joint Development Foundation, AOUSD brings together a diverse and inclusive community of participants to provide an open forum for collaborative development and discussion around OpenUSD.

Name: .debug
Description:
.debug je mjesto okupljanja programerske zajednice u Hrvatskoj, kroz istoimenu developersku konferenciju koja se održava jednog godišnje u Zagrebu, ali i kroz web-portal debug.hr. 

Developerska konferencija .debug 2025 održat će se 12. i 13. lipnja u zagrebačkoj Laubi i Algebrinom kampusu. Kroz dva dana trajanja konfrencije i 6 stageova, 2000 okupljenih programera bit će u prilici poslušati 100 predavanja iskusnih govornika iz Hrvatske i svijeta, kao i uživati u ".debugu na otvorenom" - velikom šatorskom naselju u kojem će, u atmosferi street-food festivala biti omogućeno druženje s predstavnicima prvoligaških kompanija hrvatske IT scene.

Web-portal debug.hr zamišljen je kao mjesto na kojem se i nakon održavanja konferencije programerska zajednica može informirati o svim novostima i zanimljivostima domaće developerske scene te otvorenim pozicijama za ostvarivanje karijere kod partnerskih kompanija .debuga.

Name: ALT Sports Data
Description:
ALT Sports Data ASD is at the forefront of utilizing proprietary data to activate a growing wave of new sports enthusiasts. Our mission revolves around building the most extensive database and league portfolio in alternative sports, offering a gateway for sports book operators to tap into an audience of over 83 million potential bettors in the United States alone, with a global reach exceeding 1 billion.
 
The central challenge we address is the supply and demand dilemma that significantly affects the profitability of sportsbook operators globally. In today's landscape, operators struggle to acquire and retain high-value customers cost-effectively, as well as to deliver innovative and relevant new betting options. We tackle these industry pain points through a proven business model and by leveraging our expanding collection of league rights, proprietary software, data resources, regulatory infrastructure, and an in-house trading team. This approach enables us to introduce fresh and appealing betting opportunities, thereby impacting the supply side.
 
On the demand side, we collaborate closely with our partner leagues, unlocking the potential of a collective and growing fanbase of over 200 million today. We empower these efforts with our owned media platform (NXTbets.com). Our goal is to engage these fans and responsibly educate/ guide them towards our sportsbook operator partners.

Description:

The aim is to educate, equip and empower women and girls with the necessary skills and confidence to succeed in STEM career fields.

Our mission: To close the gender gap, we aim to empower 5 million women globally by 2030 and 70,000 women in Israel through our annual activities.

JOIN US! 

Women in Tech Israel Chapter 

The Women in Tech Israel Chapter was established in April 2020 as an apolitical organization dedicated to empowering women in STEM. We collaborate with local groups - regardless of gender, age, or culture - to develop sustainable programs that equip women with the skills and confidence needed to thrive in Israel’s tech industry.

Our mission is to help Israeli women in tech break the glass ceiling by expanding their professional networks, learning from the experiences of successful women, and overcoming barriers such as language challenges and imposter syndrome.

Anne Baer, Chapter Director & CEO of Ikare Innovation

Name: EMSNOW
Description:
EMSNOW is the recognized preeminent news site for the global electronics manufacturing services (EMS) industry. 

EMSNOW was launched in its digital-only format in 2002 to provide the electronics manufacturingsector, and its supporting supplier and customer bases, with a single, real-time information and analysis source covering the global aspects of this critical industry. EMSNOW focuses on the business of the EMS industry! 

Regardless of where you fit in the electronics manufacturing “food-chain”, you face difficult decisions: 

-  As an OEM you have to decide what product to outsource, which contract manufacturer(s) to use, and the proper timing and geography among other factors. 
-  As an EMS company you need to plan capacity, capture contracts from OEMs, manage your supply chain, open and close plants, re-capitalize equipment, move into new technologies, and plan staffing and stay in tune with competitors. 
-  As a PCB fabricator, assembly equipment supplier, test equipment vendor, consumables vendor, software vendor, etc. your decisions are linked to the OEMs and EMS companies that ultimately create value by using your products. 

EMSNOW analyzes the companies, the leaders, the technologies, and the finances that drive the EMS industry. And we deliver this analysis to you, every business day!

Com a meta de mapear 2,5 milhões de restaurantes até ao final de 2025, o nosso ecossistema tecnológico combina conhecimento profundo do mercado, inteligência artificial e machine learning para fornecer inteligência contínua que apoia a tomada de melhores decisões dos diferentes intervenientes do canal HoReCa.

Name: NomoFomo
Description:
I dag kommer din hjärna att registrera 100 000 ord. I morgon 100 000 till. På en månad blir det tre miljoner ord. Av all den informationen kommer du endast att minnas två procent. Vad minns du?

NomoFomos vision är att upplysa och underhålla genom att förklara nyheter, uppfinningar, forskning, människor och trender som formar framtiden. Vi erbjuder omvärldsbevakning genom nyhetsbrev, föreläsningar och poddar. Vårt kall i livet är att utforska internets roligaste, viktigaste, konstigaste och läskigaste platser för att identifiera och reflektera över de mest fascinerande nyheterna. Varje vecka synar vi 2500 nyheter och analyserar det bästa innehållet för att göra världen lite mer begriplig. 

NomoFomos mål är att göra dig smartare och gladare. Därför erbjuder vi dig en mix av vad du vill och borde veta. Prisbelönt och banbrytande journalistik. Poddar och YouTube-klipp du inte får missa. Skeenden som förändrar världsbilden. Vi är NomoFomo – No More Fear of Missing Out – och vår ambition är att vara det ultimata botemedlet till ”doomscrolling”. Tid är det mest värdefulla vi har i dagens samhälle. Och vi får inte mer av det. Tvärtom. Vi håller på att drunkna i det digitala informationshavet som bara blir djupare och djupare. Genom att vara en del av NomoFomos community – med passionerade och nyfikna doers som vill göra världen lite bättre – försäkrar du dig om att du inte missar det absolut bästa innehållet.

Technology updates and product spotlights on the latest machinery, stone products and fabrication innovations. Installation techniques, templating technology and best practices from experienced fabricators.

Countertop fabricators, equipment manufacturers, material suppliers, industry distributors, architects, designers and anyone involved in the natural and engineered stone supply chain.

Target3D’s UK studio houses two stages under one roof - a demo and mocap stage and a VP stage with mocap capability - plus an on site edit suite and VR area. Clients can get hands-on with the products and see the tech up and running before they commit.
 
Target3D’s large volume motion capture studio and virtual production studio in Tower Hamlets is just a stone's throw from St Katherine’s Docks and the Tower of London. The mocap and demo area has a capture volume of 10m x 10m, allowing capture of up to eight performers including full body, finger and face capture and fight sequencing, using HD witness cams plus floating or on-body reference microphones and full body markers. Pre-viz, post-viz, data cleaning, re-targeting and post-animation are all taken care of, including fast turn around data when it’s needed.  

Catering to the surge in demand for Virtual Production facilities, Target3D also houses a 17 sqm stage for virtual production. With a 1.9mm 12m x 4m curved LED wall, this space is perfect for experimentation, research, development and creativity for universities and the entertainment and production industries.

Whether working with clients in the studio or on location, Target3D offers low cost, one-day shoots right through to full production service work for a complete performance capture solution. StudioT3D also runs motion capture performance workshops and maintains a talent pool of experienced mocap performers.

Get in touch with Target3D's team of experts for motion capture consultation, installation, training and production.

Name: Cold Canyon
Description: The Honorable Daniel S. Goldin is an entrepreneurial and scientific visionary, with the distinction of serving as NASA’s longest-tenured Administrator from April 1992-November 2001 under three U.S. Presidents. He is credited with the re-emergence of NASA after the Cold War, as he diplomatically fostered east-west international cooperation and oversaw the redesign, construction, and initial operation of the $120B International Space Station, as well as guided the initial concept of the James Webb Space Telescope to assure it would see back to the beginnings of creation. As the founder of Cold Canyon, an innovation advisory company, and as a senior advisor to Cerberus Capital Management, his career spans space exploration and science, aeronautics, air traffic management, national security, semiconductors, communications, and artificial intelligence. 元梦智能科技是高迪安集团全资子公司，成立于2017年，2022年被认定为上海市高新技术企业，母公司为香港元梦人文智能国际有限公司，总部在香港，上海和新加坡均有分公司。公司聚焦以超写实数字虚拟人为核心的人文智能交互系统的持续研发，为客户提供多场景、多行业的智能解决方案。公司是人工智能领域内具有自主研发能力的技术型企业，在人机智能交互、多模态感知、自然语义理解、计算机视觉等方面拥有多项核心技术，目前拥有已授权或在审查的发明专利20篇，核心研发团队包含海内外具备博士学位、研究生学位的专业技术人才，研发人力占比超百分之七十。

元梦智能自主研发的第一代基于超写实数字虚拟人的人机交互产品-智能艾琳IRENE。通过搭载最先进的智能交互技术情感识别技术以及云端大脑平台，被赋予智慧和情感的艾琳能有效感知用户行为，并更加注重与用户的真实情感交互体验。随着艾琳在德智教育、生活服务、人文艺术等领域的应用落地，元梦智能将逐渐把智能艾琳打造为覆盖人们衣、食、住、行生活全方位的服务大使，实现“离不开手机，离不开艾琳”的生活习惯。

Name: Takt
Description:
At Takt, we believe bold ideas have the power to transform the ordinary into the extraordinary.

Since 2012, we’ve been building more than brands—we’ve been creating movements. Takt is an independent, award-winning creative agency based in Canada, known for bringing clarity to complexity and turning vision into reality.

Our work begins with a question: What story do you want to tell? From there, we craft cohesive brand narratives that flow seamlessly across every touchpoint—websites, campaigns, and content that don’t just make an impact but build momentum. Whether it’s redefining a company’s identity or building digital platforms that inspire action, we thrive on creating work that is as meaningful as it is beautiful.

We partner with organizations that have the courage to lead. Our clients include iconic names like NYU, NHLPA, UBC, CBC, Amazon, and Alphabet—businesses that understand the value of bold thinking and purposeful storytelling. They trust us not just to meet their expectations but to elevate their vision, pushing boundaries to create something unforgettable.

What sets us apart is how we weave clarity, creativity, and strategy into every project. We believe strong narratives are the foundation of every great brand, and when those narratives align with design and technology, they become transformational. Our goal is not just to build brands but to create lasting emotional connections—experiences that move people and turn audiences into advocates.

As an independent agency, we pride ourselves on agility, collaboration, and a relentless commitment to craft. From the first conversation to the final deliverable, our team of strategists, designers, and storytellers work as an extension of your own, helping you define your purpose, share your story, and amplify your impact.

Because at Takt, we know the best brands don’t just tell their story—they live it. Let’s build something bold together.

Name: DOCENT
Description:
Docent is the first AI-powered mobile application to offer a fully personalized experience for discovering and collecting contemporary art.

We cater to both newcomers and seasoned art collectors, providing a reliable platform that connects individuals with artworks they’ll truly love and want to collect.
 
Founded in 2020 by Hélène Nguyen-Ban, a passionate collector and former gallerist with a decade of experience in luxury at LVMH, and Mathieu Rosenbaum, a researcher and professor of Applied Mathematics at École Polytechnique, Docent is an art-tech startup at the intersection of art and artificial intelligence.
 
Forging an alliance between AI experts and art historians, Docent pioneers a new era in art discovery. We developed proprietary algorithms using machine learning, computer vision, and natural language processing, to curate bespoke recommendations of contemporary art. This advanced technology not only discerns artistic nuances and collector preferences but also ensures that partner galleries offer artworks of unmatched quality and significance.
 
Docent isn’t just about finding art – it’s about embarking on a personalized journey, tailored to each collector’s tastes and interests. From discovering hidden gems to acquiring new masterpieces, Docent encourages exploration beyond the comfort zones, and into the unchartered.

Our ultimate goal is to transform the art collecting experience into an inspiring journey accessible to a broader audience. By doing so, we also aim to create a virtuous cycle, fostering the emergence of a new generation of art enthusiasts and collectors, all while revitalizing the market for galleries and today’s leading artists.

Why Choose Multus?

- Faster Turnarounds
- Lower Costs

Services we Offer:

Name: News2Day
Description:
News2Day is a product of SSV Creative Labs, media company that believes in the power of diverse perspectives and exceptional storytelling to create positive change in the world. Through our creative content, we strive to inform, engage, and inspire audiences worldwide while promoting social responsibility, transparency, and accountability. 

We are committed to amplifying underrepresented voices, exploring complex issues, and fostering meaningful conversations that drive towards a more equitable and just society.

Vision:
To be the premier media company, empowering people with informative, engaging, and transformative content that inspires, educates, and entertains.

Mission:
We aim to deliver news stories from around the world, across various topics, and perspectives, to keep our users informed and educated on the events shaping their lives. We strive to uphold the highest standards of journalism and creativity, presenting stories that are accurate, balanced, and relevant. 

We are committed to supporting and showcasing diverse perspectives, voices, and talents, reflecting the richness and complexity of the world we live in. 

We aim to leverage technology and innovation to create new and exciting ways for audiences to interact with our content and to expand our reach globally. 

Our ultimate goal is to make a positive impact on society, inspiring individuals and communities to engage, learn, and grow.

Name: Ozone
Description:
Ozone is an ecosystem built to create “More for Life.”
Ozone is a future-driven company within the Golrang Group, founded with a clear vision:
to seamlessly connect the physical and digital worlds.

A true O2O DNA that brings meaning, speed, and added value to products and businesses.
At Ozone, we believe in one simple but powerful principle:
the experience of payment and interaction should be “more for life,” not just a step in the checkout flow.

Our ecosystem is built on two core pillars:
1) Payment Facilitator: a payment infrastructure that’s more than payment
Ozone’s PayFac is not “just another payment gateway”;
it is an intelligent value-creation infrastructure.
We transform payment from a repetitive end-step into a growth engine:
High-speed, streamlined payment aggregation
Smart discount and incentive modules that directly shift buying behavior
Real-time understanding of user intent at the payment moment (payment-level intelligence)
The ability to build payment-driven campaigns that boost AOV, repeat purchases, and conversion rates

So payment stops being the “end of the journey” and becomes the start of a new interaction.

2) Customer Data & Experience Platform: where marketing becomes a science
Ozone’s CDXP is one of the most powerful data-driven platforms in Iran, designed to give marketing, data, and growth teams a true superpower:
Unified and connected customer data across every touchpoint
Dynamic profiling based on purchases, transactions, interests, and habits
Intelligent, automated segmentation
The ability to build complex journeys with real-time personalization
Real-time, behavior-triggered campaigns

Ozone’s CDXP enables businesses to stop guessing and start acting based on real behavioral intelligence.

At Ozone, we believe:
Every better experience, every smoother payment, and every smarter interaction is a step toward improving everyday life.

Ozone, More for Life.

TRANSFORMING INFORMATION INTO INTELLIGENCE

Our custom data management technology and marketing experience allows us to maximize this untapped resource, to design and implement programs that enable our clients to blaze new paths for growth.

But we are more than consultants to our clients. We are collaborators. Technology and customer behavior is constantly evolving. Having a partner dedicated every day to your success is vital to responding to today’s accelerated marketplace.

Because of our passion for innovation and customer service, we’ve charted success for our clients and for ourselves. Our roster includes Fortune 500 companies and spans many business sectors. NITS Solutions was also named one of “Michigan 50 Companies to Watch” by Michigan Small Business and Development.

OUR CORE VALUES

We are Client Centric	
We take our service a step further and commit to the success of our clients. Their needs come first; we take ownership of their business as if it is our own. We act with integrity, professionalism, and confidence.

We Collaborate as One	
We are dedicated to our clients and provide tireless support to them; working together to achieve individual and collective goals.

We are Trusted Advisors	
We advise clients on what we believe is best for their business in a manner that fosters relationships and builds trust.

We are Innovative	
We push ourselves to think outside the box. We tackle big challenges and everyday improvements with innovation and creativity. We stay current on knowledge and seek new ways to provide value to our clients.

We Find a Way	
We’re fast, flexible, optimistic, innovative, and tackle even the most ambiguous challenges. We roll up our sleeves to get it done while never losing focus of the big picture.

Name: Vudoo
Description:
In a world where every click can take you further from conversion, it's never been more important to allow customers to purchase at the point of inspiration. 

Vudoo's innovative SaaS/AdTech platform enables brands, publishers and agencies to monetise content using its suite of e-commerce and content enhancement tools. This suite includes Vudoo's patent-pending, in-stream transaction feature, which allows customers to make purchases directly within videos, images or links. Vudoo also enhances content using in-stream transaction and clickable content features, which are all powered by a secure API gateway and world-leading analytics platform.

Founded and based in Melbourne in 2017, Vudoo has built a global reputation as a thought-leading company in the eCommerce and video industry. They've helped publishers and brands including News Corp Australia, Rip Curl, Nike and Flight Centre create meaningful content that connects and converts their audiences on a whole new level.

Description:

We are not just a platform; the firm is a testament to our unwavering commitment to innovation, excellence, and the belief that predictive analytics can redefine the way we approach sports betting.

Morpheus AI is the flagship product of Tech Takes AI, a revolutionary platform that leverages artificial intelligence to provide advanced sports betting analysis. Powered by a network of specialized AI algorithms, Morpheus offers unparalleled insights into sports betting. What sets Morpheus apart isn't just its breadth of coverage – it's the precision and efficiency with which it operates. Unlike human bettors who rely on intuition and subjective judgment, Morpheus leverages data-driven insights to optimize your betting strategy. By adhering to the common 100 unit bankroll ideology and dynamically adjusting unit wagers based on prediction confidence, Morpheus ensures optimal risk management and profitability.

Research and Development is also at the core of our firm. Our dedicated team is looking beyond the current structure and pioneering cutting-edge systems for online dice betting, stock market investment, and currency trading through the use of the existing Morpheus System groundwork. With a focus on advanced machine learning algorithms and predictive analytics, R&D is dedicated to creating intelligent solutions that optimize strategies and enhance profitability across diverse financial markets and gaming platforms.

The impact on your ability to understand and connect with your audience is drastic. Suddenly, you can know what they plan to buy, where they plan to buy it, and even when they are likely to convert.

Description:

Our agency works with fantastic brands like LNER, First Bus, CityFibre, Sky and D&D London to create campaigns that readers actually want to read. That they actually take action and buy from.

What did we do?

* We changed what we mean by engagement
* We don't get hung up on vanity metrics
* We make intelligent inferences of intention 

Does it work?

* Time-on-page: 02:26 (Industry average 00:52)
* Click-through: 32% CTR (Industry average 3.17%)
* Conversion to purchase: 17% (On-site average 4%)

Description:
Fetch TV is an Australian technology company that develops, licenses and operates a home-grown streaming entertainment and engagement platform-as-a-service via home hub devices, known as Fetch. Fetch offers households a superior experience for discovering, streaming and engaging with their favourite content, while also providing an effective channel for brands and publishers to reach targeted audiences. By bringing together local and global content from leading entertainment providers, Fetch curates and streams it through an intelligent, all-in-one user interface and Fetch streaming service on your TV, as well as via mobile devices using the Fetch Mobi streaming app
 
Founded in Sydney in 2008, Fetch has grown into the leading Australian-owned entertainment and media technology platform. Our in-house team of talented developers has built our hybrid RDK and Android Opensource streaming technology, user interface and monetisation engine to world-class standards, earning global recognition for our innovations. Supported by major shareholders, including Telstra, Fetch TV is committed to growth and innovation, aiming to reach 3 million Australians by 2030. With over 4 hours of average daily engagement on our service per household and reaching nearly 2 million unique Australian users, we are continuously evolving with new products and plans to expand beyond TV, movies, and streaming aggregation into new areas of entertainment, gaming, and lifestyle offerings.
 
Our team is driven by a passion for customer experience, content, technology, and innovation. Together with our B2B ISP and D2C retail partners, we are dedicated to engaging audiences and providing Australians with genuine choices in their entertainment and lifestyle options.

Desarrollamos una app móvil gratuita, la cual es una herramienta poderosa que permite a los usuarios conocer lo que están consumiendo al proporcionarles información sobre la aptitud de los alimentos para sus condiciones alimentarias.

Además, colaboramos con destacadas empresas de e-commerce y supermercados para mejorar la experiencia de compra de sus clientes al proporcionar datos nutricionales precisos y relevantes. Algunos de nuestros valiosos clientes incluyen a:

• Cencosud Chile (Jumbo.cl, Santaisabel.cl).
• Cencosud Perú (Wong.pe, Metro.pe).
• Cencosud Argentina (Disco.com.ar, Jumbo.com.ar, Vea.com.ar)
• Cencosud Colombia (Tiendasmetro.co, Tiendasjumbo.co).
• Tottus Chile y Perú (Tottus.cl, Tottus.com.pe).
• Walmart Chile (Lider.cl, Acuenta.cl, Centralmayorista.cl).
• SMU (Unimarc.cl) 
• Beroots.cl
• Tiendaemporio.com

La calidad de nuestros datos está respaldada por instituciones certificadoras de renombre, como el INTA de la Universidad de Chile, Chile Kosher, Chile Halal, Vegetarianos Hoy, Fundación Convivir y COACEL.

Si eres un productor de alimentos o estás a cargo de un e-commerce que vende productos alimenticios, te invitamos a contactarnos. Juntos, podemos brindar un mundo de posibilidades a las personas al ofrecer información nutricional precisa y ayudar a tomar decisiones de compra más conscientes y seguras.

Name: Trestle Labs | Kibo
Description:
Founded in 2017, Trestle Labs is an Assistive Technology company making education and employment digital and inclusive for everyone by addressing the barriers around disability, language and literacy through AI-powered technology solutions that enable real-time listening, translation, digitization and audio’tization of printed, handwritten and digital content across multiple global languages, with special focus on unserved and underserved Indian, African and Asian languages.
We work with schools, colleges, universities, NGOs, Libraries and Workplaces to make them more inclusive for all.

Launched in July 2019 we are now empowering 1,00,000+ visually impaired individuals across 9 countries and have made 600+ institutions inclusive

Our solutions:
1. Kibo mobile app (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.trestle.labs.kibo): For on-the-go audio-based access to any printed, handwritten and digital content across 60 languages with support for 12 File-formats (Images, Documents, Audio) and offering access to a repository of 1 million+ accessible ebooks

2. Kibo XS Kit (https://youtu.be/UaEYFfok6Lk): A talking table-lamp like device to scan and Listen to hard copy printed and handwritten documents (across 60 languages), Translate (across 100+ languages), Digitize (into editable formats of doc, docx, txt), Edit online, Save them to Kibo cloud (for multi-device access), as well as Download the file in Audio (MP3).

3. Kibo Desk (https://kibodesk.trestlelabs.com/): What Kibo XS Device does for hard copy printed and handwritten documents, Kibo Desk does for softcopy digital documents - images and scanned image-based PDFs.

4. Kibo 360 Kit (https://kibo360.trestlelabs.com/home): This is our flagship product which not just combines the features of Kibo XS Kit and Kibo Desk, but additionally also provides for typing text online for real-time listening, translation, digitization and audio’tization.

Cannabis Products Insider serves industry executives in CPG companies, multi-state operators (MSOs), large dispensary chains and more.

__

Although many states authorize and regulate the sale of cannabis, possessing, distributing, dispensing, manufacturing, or selling marijuana as defined by the Controlled Substances Act, 21 U.S.C. § 801, et seq., or assisting others to do so, continue to be federal crimes in the United States. Cannabis Products Insider is intended to be an educational resource reporting on news and developments affecting the state-legal cannabis industry and the information provided on this site is for general informational purposes only. Cannabis Products Insider does not promote illegal activity, and does not offer any cannabis products for sale. This site does not contain medical or health advice, and any discussion of the medical implications of cannabis use is solely for general informational and contextual purposes. Medical advice related to cannabis should be obtained only from a licensed health care professional. Cannabis Products Insider and all associated entities and individuals are not responsible for third-party content and/or links published on this website.

Description:

Name: The Cyber Queens
Description:
LIVE FRIDAYS at 9:15/12:15!

About the Podcast:
“Where are the women in cyber?”  

The Landscape
In 2022 the cyber security field still consists of 24% women and only 2.2% LGBTQ+ minorities. Long-perpetuated gender, age, and demographic biases held by the ‘Baby Boomer’ and Gen-X groups have led to a severe gap in the representation and advancement of women and minorities in this field. Millennials entered the workforce and attempted to forge a new way by asking for small changes; but definitely conceded others. Currently the Boomers/Gen-X accounting for 55% of the workforce are on their way out.
 
There is a new perspective shift happening industry-wide in tech because Gen-Z has arrived, and they don't ask for change - they command it. Millennials and Gen-Z make up 35% of the workforce but that will grow to more than 75% by the end of 2030.
 
The Solution
We are not here to simply identify a diversity problem, we are here to solve it. Head-on. It is our mission to close this gap by inspiring and empowering Gen-Z women and minorities to seize their place in the cyber community. Breaking molds to choose careers inherently designated for us by gender bias. Branding cyber as lucrative and exciting. Nurturing a curiosity in tech where it was conditioned out of us. Dispelling the myths surrounding different niches and avenues into cyber and highlighting the success and fulfillment that can be achieved here. We are going to bestow strategies for navigating the mindsets we encounter on a daily basis and how to overcome the challenges they present. We're going to do this fueled by bold, raw, unfiltered insights to propel new talent forward and challenge managers to join the train of progress; or we will leave you behind.

We are The Cyber Queens and we're building the sisterhood of cyber.

Totem pioneers new content models to create global category leaders on social media. 

In 2012, YouTube invited us to help scale their platform across APAC - referred to by YouTube as “the McKensie of Online Video”. Leading consulting projects for many of the biggest Creators, Media, and VC companies worldwide across four continents, 15+ countries, and multiple genre categories. From content creation through to distribution.

In 2022, leveraging 10 years of global consulting insights, technology, and expertise, Totem shifted its core focus from consulting services to building owned and operated channels. Within 12 months we built the no.1 factual entertainment brand in the world on social media (Bondi Rescue), the no.1 food and drink brand in the world on Facebook (Sticky Lollies), and the no.1 First Nations creator brand in Australia (Black As). Simultaneously creating global best practice case studies for Facebook, partnering with Snap to grow their footprint across APAC, creating the first brand to hit 1M followers for TikTok Australia, and executive producing the most viewed Facebook and TikTok original series ever commissioned by Screen Australia. In 2023 alone, we created over 5000 videos and generated over 12B+ views. We are one of the top 25 fastest-growing digital-first media companies in the world today.

We have 40+ staff across 13 countries (speaking 20+ languages) working across Consulting, Totem Studio, Distribution and Digital Rights Management. Our mission is to foster global communities beyond entertainment, nurturing deep human connections and shared identities through video to help shape the future of our industry.

Name: Mikrokontroler.pl
Description: Mikrokontroler.pl to polski portal informacyjny poświęcony zagadnieniom współczesnych podzespołów, technologii i rynkowi elektroniki. Pomimo swej nazwy, nie opisuje wyłącznie systemów mikrokontrolerowych, lecz jest otwarty na wiadomości z branży oraz wszelkie zagadnienia współczesnej elektroniki, w tym między innymi IoT, projektowanie z wykorzystaniem FPGA, układy analogowe, radiowe, układy zasilania, sprzęt pomiarowy, sterowniki przemysłowe, projektowanie płytek PCB, produkcję elektroniki i wiele innych. Ważne miejsce na naszych łamach zajmują publikacje skupiające się na praktycznym aspekcie elektroniki, w tym przykłady i pełne projekty na platformy Arduino, Raspberry Pi, STM32, Siemens LOGO!, SIMATIC S7-1200 oraz wiele innych. Skupiamy się na rozpowszechnianiu aktualnej, praktycznej wiedzy technicznej w środowisku inżynierów, studentów starszych lat studiów technicznych, a także elektroników-hobbystów. Wśród naszych publikacji można znaleźć aktualne informacje, wywiady, artykuły techniczne oraz pełne kursy przedmiotowe.

Name: PT Sonar Nusantara Utama
Description:
Sonar Nusantara Utama is a fast-growing Indonesian company specializing in hydro-oceanographic and terrestrial survey technologies. We deliver high-precision geospatial solutions by integrating the latest innovations in LiDAR, UAV, GNSS, USV, and 3D inspection systems—supporting national development across land, sea, and infrastructure.

Our journey is rooted in one belief: that the future must be built on safety, efficiency, and environmental sustainability. Through partnerships, innovation, and a spirit of collaboration, we are enabling smarter and more resilient infrastructure across Indonesia—and beyond.

Vision
To become a leading global company in the use of geospatial technology and artificial intelligence (Artificial Intelligence) to provide sustainable solutions in the future that are safer, more efficient and environmentally friendly.

Mission
Focus on innovation and research to develop sustainable solutions.

Build partnerships and collaborations for more massive market expansion.

Develop talents to provide a competitive advantage and enable adaptability in the global market.

Integrate advanced technology to support the development of the geospatial industry in ways that benefit our partners and the nation.

What We Offer
We support a broad range of survey and monitoring applications with tailored solutions such as:

LiDAR Mapping Systems

Hydrography & Bathymetry Surveys

Aerial Mapping with UAV/Drones

High-Precision GNSS Solutions

Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USV)

3D Infrastructure Inspection Systems

Whether it's for smart city planning, marine infrastructure, natural resource mapping, or strategic national projects—Sonar Nusantara is here to deliver.

Why Choose Sonar Nusantara?
- A multi-disciplinary team with global-standard expertise
- A commitment to sustainable innovation and environmental consciousness
- Strong local and international networks to support large-scale collaboration
- A corporate culture rooted in growth, kindness, and integrity

Name: Growkartt
Description:
GrowKart is a global career enablement and consulting platform designed to support international students and early career professionals pursuing opportunities across the United States United Kingdom Canada and Australia.

Navigating international job markets can be overwhelming. Candidates must manage complex hiring processes visa related considerations recruiter communication and interview preparation often across multiple platforms with little structure or guidance. This lack of clarity can slow progress and create unnecessary stress.

GrowKart brings structure to the job search by unifying career support services into one organized and guided ecosystem.

Through a single streamlined experience candidates gain access to personalized career strategies resume and profile optimization interview preparation recruiter led job search support and clear progress tracking. Every step is designed to reduce uncertainty improve visibility and help candidates move forward with confidence.

Our approach is rooted in three core principles
Structure instead of uncertainty
Transparency instead of confusion
Support instead of isolation

Rather than relying on disconnected tools or guesswork GrowKart provides a clear roadmap ongoing human support and practical guidance at every stage of the job search. We help candidates understand where they stand identify the right opportunities and take informed steps toward long term career success.

Our mission is to become a trusted career partner for international talent across global markets supporting job seekers from preparation to placement and continued career growth with clarity consistency and care.

Name: Vancouver Entrepreneurs Forum
Description:
The Vancouver Entrepreneurs Forum (VEF) stands as the premier networking event in Vancouver for technology entrepreneurs. Established in 1988, VEF brings sponsors, speakers, members, and partners together in a fun, relevant, and vibrant event each month, aimed at stimulating ideas, conversations, and connections. Our mission is to create and catalyze collaborations, supporting technology entrepreneurs with the tools and mentorship needed to successfully launch and grow their enterprise. We strive to expand the involvement of academic supporters and industrial partners at our events, fostering knowledge and innovation exchange to further propel British Columbia's technology forward.

With a total of eight events per calendar year, our season kicks off in September and runs until May, with a hiatus in December. Our monthly forums provide a community platform for early-stage entrepreneurs to scale their businesses by learning from thought-provoking conversations with high-profile speakers and gaining diverse perspectives through meaningful networking opportunities. Over the years, we have organized over 200 events covering topics such as cleantech, cloud computing, AI & machine learning, life sciences, digital media, mergers & acquisitions, early-stage financing, and more.

As a not-for-profit B.C. Society, VEF is supported by its sponsors, members, volunteers, and event attendees. We are proud to be founded and led by the community, for the community.

Name: Endeavor Technologies
Description:
Endeavor Technologies develops runtime simulation platforms for drilling and well intervention where system behavior continues under real operational conditions.

Unlike scenario-based or scripted simulators, Endeavor’s simulations maintain continuous system state across operational changes, failures, and decision delays. Physics does not pause when operations stop—and neither does the simulation.

The platform is designed for environments where accuracy, consequence, and validation matter: real-time execution, deterministic behavior, and operational realism across high-consequence workflows.

Endeavor works with operators, service companies, and training organizations that require simulation behavior aligned with real-world operations—not approximations.

Name: TALON
Description:
Healthcare is the largest consumer market in the U.S. that does not function like a market.

Prices are hidden. Incentives are misaligned. Competition between and among health plans and health systems is limited, preventing the market from rewarding value and efficiency. Without transparent pricing and aligned incentives, all stakeholders, including employers, members, and care organizations, struggle to obtain value.

TALON exists to restore the conditions required for a high-functioning healthcare market.

We make price transparency actionable by pairing real, negotiated prices with aligned incentives, governance frameworks, and infrastructure that enables informed decision-making.

Our platform is underpinned by large-scale pricing intelligence, including a proprietary database built from over 25 billion de-identified claims records and more than one petabyte of healthcare pricing data, ingested and curated monthly to support analytics, transparency, and incentives.

TALON supports health plans, third-party administrators, and benefits advisors serving employer-sponsored plans nationwide, enabling:
• Practical execution of Transparency in Coverage and No Surprises Act requirements
• Alternative health plan designs built around discoverable pricing and consumer choice
• Shared-savings incentives that align employers and employees
• Analytics that expose cost variation and network inefficiencies

TALON has been recognized for sustained growth and market impact, including inclusion on the Inc. 5000 list of fastest-growing private companies in Americ in 2024 and 2025.

Transparency compliance is table stakes. TALON goes further, turning disclosure into discipline and transparency into behavior change.

Description:

-- Digital business news updates sent each morning and afternoon, Monday -- Friday to about 12,000 business executives. Morning Blend goes out each morning around 10 a.m. and GSA Daily around 2 p.m. 

-- Our website: www.GSABusiness.com, which is updated throughout the day.

-- Supplements: Our annual Book of Lists is one of the most highly-prized sources of business information on the region's top businesses and the executives who run them. Market Facts provides a wealth of statistical information critical to commerce in our thriving communities. And Newsmakers collects and binds the year's most impactful articles into one volume.

-- Our Power Event Series is the largest business networking event series in the Upstate. We gather six times per year to discuss the hottest business news topics of the day. 

Based in Greenville, SC, GSA Business Report covers business in all 10 Upstate South Carolina counties ... from Anderson to Cherokee and Pickens to Abbeville. We are also part of SC Business Publications, a statewide business news network that includes the Charleston Regional Business Journal, the Columbia Regional Business Report and SC Biz magazine. We truly have business news in South Carolina covered from Lowcountry to Upstate.

Our news team has been awarded for news, business and in-depth journalism in South Carolina and GSA Business Report was named the 2016 Newspaper of the Year for our category by the South Carolina Press Association.

Name: ChipTech Twente
Description:
Twente is on the national and international map as a hotspot for semicon and specifically for analogue chip design, photonics and as an important supplier to ASML. With a strong Integrated Circuit Design department at the University of Twente headed by professor Bram Nauta, the MESA+ institute and around 50 semiconductor-related SMEs, customers worldwide benefit from the unique knowledge of Twente. These companies have one thing in common: they all work closely with the University of Twente and Saxion University of Applied Sciences, which have a long and impressive history and a strong international scientific track record in the fields of electrical engineering, microelectronics, nanotechnology, photonics, quantum technology and microfluidics.

What makes Twente strong is that we are a region with a strong concentration of innovative and knowledgeintensive SME companies, a high degree of cooperation between the universities and these companies and a close cooperation between the companies themselves. Short lines of communication and an entrepreneurial spirit guarantee a high rate of innovation, crossovers and collaboration. Moreover, these SMEs are often still in Dutch or European hands; an important advantage in the pursuit of more mutual dependencies between the continents in the chip industry.

Learn more about our ambitions, meet our ecosystem partners and join our community. Together we build a strong Dutch semicon cluster with worldwide impact!

Name: Hazırcevap
Description:
İstanbul Kültür Üniversitesi Teknoloji Geliştirme Merkezi (TEKMER) bünyesinde kabul edilmiş bir teknoloji girişimiyiz.

Gerçek iş ihtiyaçlarından yola çıkarak süreçleri daha akıllı, hızlı ve güvenilir hale getiren dijital çözümler geliştiriyoruz.

Amacımız, iş süreçlerine dokunan tüm paydaşların daha verimli çalışmasını sağlayacak dijital altyapılar kurmak. Bunu yaparken güçlü bir form ve otomasyon platformu altyapımızı sektörlere özel çözümlere dönüştürüyor; Form Oluşturucu, Mobil Uygulamalar, Mağaza Oluşturucu, Kurumsal yapılar ve İş Akışları gibi gelişmiş modülleri kullanarak uçtan uca dijital süreçler tasarlıyoruz.

Bu altyapı üzerinde Formlar, İmza süreçleri, Akıllı PDF formları, PDF düzenleme ve raporlama araçlarıyla veri toplamayı kolaylaştırıyor; aynı zamanda Inbox, Tablolar, Panolar ve Rapor Oluşturucu ürünleriyle veriyi analiz edilebilir hale getiriyoruz. İhtiyaç duyulan yerlerde çevrimiçi mağazalar, mobil form senaryoları ve dış platform entegrasyonları (örneğin Salesforce gibi) ile sistemi kurumların mevcut teknolojilerine entegre ediyoruz.

Form temelli süreçlerde tamamen kendi geliştirdiğimiz özel eklentiler sayesinde müşterilerimize standart özelliklerin ötesinde benzersiz kolaylıklar sunuyor; operasyonel adımları otomatikleştirerek kurumların iş yükünü azaltıyoruz. Böylece hem süreç tasarımını kontrol ediyor hem de sektörün gerçek ihtiyaçlarına karşılık veren çözümler üretiyoruz.

Bunlara ek olarak, kurumların kendi ihtiyaçlarına göre kişiselleştirilebilen yapay zekâ asistanları geliştiriyor ve tüm bu ürünlerin üzerine konumlandırarak bilgiye erişimi hızlandırıyoruz. Böylece çalışanların tekrar eden görevlerini azaltıyor, karar alma süreçlerini destekliyor, veri kalitesini artırıyor ve operasyonel hataları minimuma indiriyoruz.

Name: Kontinentalist
Description:
Kontinentalist tells simple, powerful data stories about Asia. We use creative narratives and visualisation to make Asia’s data a talking point, bridging research and the public. 

Many organisations find it hard to share rich data outside their fields, largely because it's hard to make data engaging for everyday readers. Our stories help make data memorable and inspiring—even fun!

Data is powerful, but it can feel heavy and confusing. Ever stared down a massive spreadsheet for insights, or wondered what’s going on with yet another exploding rainbow pie chart? Yeah, so have we.
 
But there’s a different way to talk about data.

All around the world, companies, NGOs, government agencies, and researchers use immersive digital storytelling to inspire people with data. We help you do that by crafting data-driven stories that stick.

It’s a delicate process that takes weeks and months. Our team of designers, developers, and writers uses an open, exploratory process to find the best angle for each story, matching content with creativity.

Curious how we can help? Check out our work at www.kontinentalist.com/studio.

---

Kontinentalist is a subsidiary company of Potato Productions, a Singapore-based, Asia-focused, and internationally active group of enterprises collectively dedicated to technological innovation, dynamic creativity, and effecting real and positive change.
