Name: crunch/DUBAI – Dubai's StartUPs and people
Description:
The media about startups and people in Dubai. 

Unlock the Power of Dubai: Explore the Startups and People That Fuel the City

Startups in Dubai have been gaining traction in recent years as the emirate looks to diversify its economy away from its traditional sources of wealth. In order to foster the growth of the entrepreneurial and startup scene, the government has launched initiatives like the Dubai Technology Entrepreneur Centre (DTEC) and the Dubai Future Foundation’s accelerator program. 

The minimum cost of setting up a business in Dubai is low and aspiring entrepreneurs are able to access abundant sources of capital and expertise. Additionally, Dubai’s strategic location between Europe and Asia allows startups to tap into valuable new markets. 

Given the advantages that startups enjoy in the city, it is no surprise that a growing number of tech professionals are flocking to Dubai, drawn by the opportunity to be part of one of the most dynamic ecosystems in the world. The Emirates also boast a younger population and entrepreneurs from all over the world come to Dubai for networking, collaboration, learning and inspiration. 

The success of startups in Dubai has caught the attention of local and international media alike. From launching funds to attract innovative companies, introducing policies that encourage startups, organizing hackathons, creating incubators and acceleration programs, there is no doubt that Dubai is fast-becoming one of the most attractive destinations for budding entrepreneurs and business owners.

Name: Loquis

LOQUIS is the first TRAVEL PODCASTING PLATFORM which applies digital transformation to create value for real people in the real world. 

Loquis was first conceived by Bruno Pellegrini, a well known digital entrepreneur in Italy and Europe who founded OffSide, NessunoTV, TheBlogTV and Userfarm. In its books of 2004 and 2007 he predicted the rise of user generated content and crowdsourcing.

After the exit of Userfarm, in 2016 Pellegrini started a research group with few MBA fellows and ex colleagues with the objective of investigated the potential of audio content and develop the idea of Loquis. In 2018 Loquis became a concrete and well defined project, the research became a project and the team involved  senior developers, user interaction and audio designers, geo-mapping experts,  radio professionals, podcast pioneers. 

LOQUIS - A WORLD THAT SPEAKS let people share "short form geo-local PODCAST" which can be listened in a total screenless manner, while walking tall and watching the world around.

Name: Meedan
Description:
Meedan is a global technology nonprofit that builds software and programmatic initiatives to strengthen journalism, digital literacy, and accessibility of information online and off. We develop open source tools for creating and sharing context on digital media through annotation, verification, archiving, and translation. We work with technologists, newsrooms, fact-checkers, public health professionals, nongovernmental organizations, and academic institutions on award-winning projects from election monitoring to pandemic response to human rights documentation. 

This work supports our vision of a more equitable internet. 

Our primary product is Check, a tool for collaboratively verifying and fact-checking online content. It combines smart checklists, workflow integrations, and intuitive design to make digital newsgathering an efficient and collaborative process. Check Global augments Meedan’s existing suite of open source tools and open licensed online and offline training to support emerging practices in digital media literacy skills, fact-checking, disinformation monitoring and evaluation, and media literacy skills-building for social impact.

Meedan's Digital Health Lab works on information equity as a public health issue. At the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, the lab brought together a team of scientists to form Health Desk, a team tasked with supporting fact-checking organizations and journalists reporting on health misinformation about COVID-19. It launched on April 15, 2021, and as of October 12, 2021, more than 1.5 million people have visited the site. 

We also co-founded the Credibility Coalition, an initiative to develop web standards for third party credibility indicators.

Who we are

We are doers.

We imagine. Explore. Create something new.

Our Journey

When online gaming had just entered the scene and begun gaining steam in parts of the world that are the fastest to adapt to new technology, a few gaming veterans in Hyderabad were already toying with new ideas to join the movement. After having our products validated within just a few months of launch, we traded new paths evolving along the way. We have introduced some of the most successful cross platform games in Europe. From a founding team of 3 in 2004 to a talent powerhouse of over 200 designers, developers, strategists and digital marketers, Innopark has come a long way.

Though we are a decade old company that has made its mark, we haven’t lost what made us who we are. We still have the start up culture that we did 10 years ago. The same passion that fueled our work.The exact drive that made us a pioneer in online gaming.

Name: Connecting Food Brasil
Description:
Empresa de impacto socioambiental que atua na gestão inteligente de redistribuição de alimentos excedentes com foco no combate ao desperdício. Na frente social, nosso trabalho tem impacto direto na redução da insegurança alimentar. Já na esfera ambiental, reduzimos a emissão de gases de efeito estufa provenientes do descarte inadequado de alimentos. 

À frente da Connecting Food está Alcione Pereira, engenheira de alimentos especializada em desperdício. A fundadora e CEO dedica-se há mais de 20 anos a estudar a alimentação e seus processos de distribuição. Como ela enfatiza, a fome não é exatamente um problema de escassez e sim uma questão de logística e gestão. 

Os números comprovam essa afirmação. Dados da FAO (Organização das Nações Unidas para Alimentação e Agricultura) mostram que ⅓ dos alimentos produzidos no mundo são desperdiçados e que, aproximadamente, 30% das terras agrícolas do planeta são usadas para cultivar alimentos que nunca serão consumidos. Na outra ponta, temos só no Brasil, 64,2 milhões de pessoas que não se alimentam adequadamente (PNAD – IBGE, 2024).  

Esses dados revelam a importância de soluções práticas e inovadoras, como as que oferecemos. O processo de doação de alimentos excedentes é monitorado com tecnologia e indicadores são gerados para uma melhor gestão de estoques e dos impactos sociais, econômicos e ambientais. 

Nosso impacto até o momento é significativo. Todo nosso apoio na gestão de redistribuição de alimentos já facilitou o acesso de mais de 17 mil toneladas de alimentos a cerca de 600 OSCs, complementando mais de 30 milhões de refeições e gerando uma economia de R$118 milhões para as organizações sociais atendidas. 

Inspirados pela filosofia das empresas regenerativas, buscamos promover uma mudança de comportamento na sociedade. Por meio de inovação e inteligência de dados, trabalhamos para garantir que os alimentos cumpram seu papel essencial: nutrir pessoas.

Nital S.p.A. is a company located in the industrial and hi-tech area of Moncalieri, very near from Turin, in a modern, technological and eco-friendly building. The history’s company starts almost 30 years ago, in 1991, in an elegant location near the center of Turin, as Nikon cameras distributor. Therefore, Nital is, from 1991, synonymous of “Nikon Italy”. But, today, Nital has expanded its action to other markets, other product categories, other targets, while continuing to distribute Nikon cameras, lenses, binoculars and accessories.
Nital can be considered, today, a technology expert company, which imports technology from the world and distributes it in Italy through a widespread, consolidated and highly prepared distribution network. 
Thanks to Nital, iRobot Roomba vacuum cleaner robots have become the best-selling in Italy.
Nital has created a division dedicated to Internet of Things - Hinnovation - which has become, in just a few years, the reference point for the Smart Home world.
And then, Nital is distributor of smart speakers Sonos, brand that translated into reality the concept of "any song, in any room, with an always extraordinary sound. Wireless”.
Every brand distributed by Nital can be considered premium or that can become premium and this continuous evolution of the company is thanks to an in-depth work of research of new opportunities, new partnerships, new challenges.
Every time maintaining the focus on the mission: import knowledge, technology, lifestyle, innovation, new trends, interpret them and propose them to the market, perhaps before others, with experience, passion, quality. 

Technology made in world - experience made in Italy

Name: Cerabyte
Description:
Cerabyte is building a new ecosystem for sustainable, permanent and data storage - designed with accessibility & performance in mind, required in the AI age.
If you operate data storage at scale, you’re feeling the squeeze: shortages, long lead times, and rising prices collide with exponential demand growth. At the same time, the “silent tax” of traditional storage keeps compounding - refresh cycles, media replacement, migrations, and operational risk that never really goes away.
Cerabyte changes the equation. Our Ceramic-on-Glass storage media, combined with massive parallelization, is engineered to preserve vast amounts of data for decades to centuries, readily accessible. The goal is simple: keep data available while dramatically reducing the reocurring cost and disruption of replacing media over and over again - cutting total cost of ownership at the foundation.
By leveraging decades of semiconductor fab tooling R&D and scaling principles, Cerabyte is uniquely positioned to deliver sustainable, accessible, and affordable EB-class rack-scale storage - built for data centers moving towards the yottabyte era. 
Curious what your data storage operations look like when refresh cycles stop being a requirement? Let’s talk.

Name: WAIR
Description:
WAIR is inventing Sizeless Commerce.

Shoppers hate using traditional sizing tools, such as size charts, model dimensions, and size based reviews.  In fact, 35% of abandoned carts are due to size confusion and 72% of all returns are for size and fit reasons.

WAIR developed a product and size recommendation solution where we predict the body dimensions of the shoppers and align them with the a custom recommendation algorithm built for each product.  It is so powerful, that new shoppers that use WAIR convert 700% higher than those that use a size chart.  Those same shoppers tend to return their products for size and fit reasons 20% less.

WAIR also collects powerful data on the shoppers journey, which is fed back to the operating teams to help with product design, inventory management, and customer support.

Name: KT4Democracy
Description:
Discover our Toolkit: https://kt4democracy.eu/kt4d-toolkit.

The Knowledge Technologies for Democracy (KT4D) project [2023-2026] has offered a distinctive approach to the growing tensions between AI and big data technologies, and democratic processes. We have done this by placing cultural values and identity formation at the heart of our understanding. The KT4D project uniquely positions technologies such as AI and big data as advanced knowledge technologies (AKTs), addressing the challenge of integrating a cultural perspective into the study of technology and democracy. The project recognises that AKTs have become fundamentally interwoven into our societies, our cultures and indeed into our expectations and conceptions of democratic governance and exchange. The project recently released the KT4D Toolkit that collects all KT4D results in one place, empowering stakeholders with knowledge, methods, and tools for democratic resilience in the AI era.

Name: Follow the Gradient
Description:

With Follow the Gradient, we will take you on a shared journey where we discover how to overcome real-world challenges when building a business.

You will receive a weekly newsletter on Tuesdays, which dives into a curated set of entrepreneurial topics, and provides an overview of current headlines, trends, tips, and tricks. Subscribe here: followthegradient.io

Over time, we will publish additional deep-dive interviews with people who have “been there, done that”, and share their stories.

Who are we?
A team of two who are deeply passionate about entrepreneurship and incredibly curious. As former, current, and hopefully again future founders and operators, we have lived through tough, but fun times and missed that source of information that would guide us through our day. That’s why we decided to start Follow the Gradient.

NVIDIA’s founder famously said, “I wish you suffering”. It’s more fun to suffer when you’re not alone - let’s go! 

Melanie & Christian from Follow the Gradient

Наше предназначение - создавать комплексные инновационные решения, которые способствуют росту эффективности и формируют новые возможности для клиентов.

Деятельность Компании в сфере информационных технологий широко известна в Казахстане и за его пределами. ТОО «АЛСИ» является одним из крупнейших игроков на рынке с более чем 30-летним опытом работы в сфере Информационных Технологий (ИT).

Наработанный опыт и репутация надежного партнера позволяют Компании решать задачи разной степени сложности и масштаба.

Миссия АЛСИ – гармонично интегрировать инновационные решения в жизнь людей. Огромный опыт, стремление к лучшим достижениям, а самое главное – доверие наших клиентов – позволяют нам с уверенностью смотреть в будущее. Мы прилагаем все усилия, чтобы наши решения и услуги были лучшими на рынке. Каждый член нашей команды работает для этого каждый день.

Основной задачей Компании АЛСИ является - обеспечить Заказчикам бесперебойную работу за счет внедрения передовых информационных технологий и оптимальных программных, телекоммуникационных и инженерных решений.

◈ Что мы предлагаем
• Поставка оборудования — компьютерная и телекоммуникационная техника от ведущих мировых производителей с доставкой по Казахстану и в ближнее зарубежье.

• Разработка ПО — создание и внедрение программного обеспечения под задачи бизнеса.

• Системная интеграция — объединение IT-инфраструктуры для эффективной и бесперебойной работы.

• Центры Обработки Данных (ЦОД) — проектирование и строительство стационарных и модульных ЦОД.

• Комплексные IT-решения — внедрение UNIX-систем, структурированных кабельных сетей, GPS-AVL навигации и других технологий.

• Информационная безопасность — защита данных и IT-инфраструктуры от киберугроз.

Name: Journalism Trust Initiative
Description:
The Journalism Trust Initiative (JTI) is an international standard for news publishers, initiated at the initiative of Reporters Without Borders (RSF) and designed by 130 international experts as an ISO standard. It includes universally accepted and agreed upon excellence criteria for the identity and transparency of media outlets, for professional standards and accountability mechanisms that govern publishers' news production. The official reference document of the norm was published in December 2019 by the European Committee for Standardisation (CEN) as CEN Workshop Agreement (CWA) 17493.

Reporters Without Borders (RSF) defends the right of every human being to have access to free and reliable information. This right is essential to know, understand, form an opinion and take action on vital issues in full awareness, both individually and collectively. Our mission is to act for the freedom, pluralism and independence of journalism and defend those who embody these ideals. Our annual World Press Freedom Index measures the state of press freedom in 180 countries.

Education Opportunities: We guide students to find fully funded scholarship opportunities, tuition-free or affordable schools in Germany and other parts of Europe.
Job Support: We help people secure professional jobs in Germany through vocational training (Ausbildung) programs and connect skilled workers with job opportunities.
Community and Networking: Through our platform, Setlinn, migrants can connect with others, learn from their experiences, and feel supported as they settle into their new homes.

Our initiatives emphasize community-driven impact:
- Thought Leadership & Standards: Through our SMART CONTACT podcast series, we explore decentralized tech in finance, logistics, art, and social governance with top Web3 minds. Catch the latest episodes on YouTube and Spotify @Web3Harbour. Our five Working Groups collaborate on setting practical standards that benefit the entire ecosystem.

- Public-Private Partnerships: Our Hong Kong Web3 Blueprint connects regulators, enterprises, and innovators to co-develop policies, sandboxes, and pilots, building infrastructure that supports widespread adoption and sustainability.

- Talent Development: We facilitate up-skilling opportunities through workshops, ambassador programs, and mentorships. 

- Advocacy: Our leadership, advisors, and global partners work collectively to shape Hong Kong's digital asset policies.

- Events & Connections: Regular gatherings provide spaces for meaningful networking, idea-sparking, and deal-making. Stay informed on W3H and HK Web3 events at: https://luma.com/hkweb3?k=c

Membership welcomes individuals and organizations commited to decentralization, offering a platform for collaboration, insights, and influence. Learn more about options and benefits: web3harbour.glueup.com/org/web3harbour/memberships/.

Join our community to contribute, learn, and co-build a resilient Web3 ecosystem. Connect with us today!

An inability of young people to flag work-readiness competencies without formal qualifications or experience; and

The high cost of work seeking and job hunting.

Targeted at young, engaged students, professionals and job seekers, Selibeng.com was designed as a platform with four core offerings:

easily accessible and well-curated information for young people to take their next steps towards the labour market;
work-readiness focused content ;
entrepreneurship content with a focus on local startups and highlighting their achievements; and
a platform where opportunity providers can find young, local opportunity seekers.

Since our humble beginnings, Selibeng.com has grown to become Lesotho’s go-to website for finding a great job. Today, Selibeng.com is the premier resource for connecting passionate professionals in Lesotho to meaningful and exciting opportunities.

Name: Rise AV
Description:
Welcome to Rise AV – Shaping the Future of the AV Industry 

We are an organisation supporting gender diversity and the professional development of women in AV.

 The AV industry is at breaking point - a growing skills shortage, a widening talent gap, and a severe lack of diversity. Women make up just 9% of the AV workforce, and only 2% in technical roles. By 2026, we’ll be short 2.3 million skilled workers (AVIXA). 

Rise AV is tackling the AV industry’s talent crisis by starting with its biggest gap: women. If we can’t retain the women already in the industry, how can we hope to attract more—or secure the future of AV?

Our mission is to fix this crisis by: 

1. Upskilling and empowering women already in AV to break the glass ceiling and create a diverse leadership pipeline
2. Attracting and retaining diverse talent by making AV more inclusive and attractive
3. Tackling the skills crisis by increasing female representation and building clear career pathways
4. Improve female representation and create a support network and community of allies

Rise AV is the first initiative dedicated to creating a more inclusive AV sector. We're building on the global success of Rise Women in Broadcast.

We are 100% sponsor-funded—every penny goes into building a stronger, more inclusive, and future-ready AV industry. For as little as £1000/year, we can bring these future programmes to the industry.

 Join the movement: www.rise-av.com

Name: TICE | Startup India
Description:
TICE News | Empowering Startups Through Media & Knowledge

A Clockwork Media Brand

About Us

TICE News, powered by Clockwork Media Pvt. Ltd., is a pioneering digital media platform dedicated to empowering the Indian startup ecosystem. As a DIPP-certified startup headquartered in Noida, NCR, we leverage the power of technology and journalism to fuel innovation, entrepreneurship, and economic growth.

Our Platforms

 TICE.NEWS
A cutting-edge digital news media platform delivering in-depth coverage of Indian business, finance, corporate affairs, economy, and startup entrepreneurship.

 TICE TV
A video-first content hub featuring insightful discussions, startup success stories, expert interviews, and trend analysis, curated specifically for entrepreneurs and investors.

Our Mission

At TICE, we are committed to fostering the Indian startup ecosystem by focusing on four key pillars:

 Talent – Empowering individuals to pursue their entrepreneurial dreams.
 Ideas – Providing a platform for innovative ideas to thrive.
 Capital – Connecting startups with the resources and networks they need to succeed.
 Entrepreneurship – Cultivating a culture of innovation and business excellence.

What We Stand For

 Knowledge – Sharing valuable insights and expertise with the startup community.
 Advisory – Offering mentorship and strategic guidance to entrepreneurs.
 Research – Conducting in-depth analysis to support startup growth.
 Mentorship – Connecting experienced professionals with budding founders.
 Alliances – Building strong partnerships to strengthen the startup ecosystem.

Join the Movement

TICE News is more than a media platform; it’s a catalyst for change in India's startup landscape. Whether you're an entrepreneur, investor, policymaker, or startup enthusiast, we invite you to be part of our journey in making India a global hub for innovation.

 Visit us at www.tice.news
 For collaborations, reach out at editorial@tice.news & sales@tice.news

Asia's vibrant palette isn't just our backdrop—it's our driving force. We're here to spotlight its hustle, innovation, and occasional heartbreaks in the world of blockchain. Our promise? Coverage that's both Asia-led and globally nuanced, meticulously curating the interplay of technology, culture, and business, in web3's grand tapestry. Name: Coinspeaker
Description:
Founded in the second quarter of 2014, Coinspeaker is the number one news source written especially for professionals dealing with bitcoin and altcoin.

Read by over 200,000 unique visitors per month, CoinSpeaker’s readers comprise a select in-the-know community consisting of venture capitalists, start-up CEOs, merchants accepting bitcoin as payment and analysts working at private banks and asset management funds who are focused on the virtual currency arena. As a result of possessing this unique community of market professionals and high net worth readers, CoinSpeaker’s overall readership is expanding rapidly month-on-month and its content is becoming increasingly influential in the bitcoin and altcoin communities.

Coinspeaker’s superior reputation for providing quality content on a daily basis is driven by the site’s team of dedicated professional financial journalists who maintain an impartial bias for high-quality, market-driven scoops as well as for a wide range of brief but in-depth analyses on price movements, trading events and stories which meaningfully impact the material state of the virtual currency landscape.

Coinspeaker’s coverage spans every aspect of the bitcoin and altcoin markets, featuring a mix of regular Tech Wraps, daily and weekly Market Updates, features, interviews and much more, always delivering the core story in a simple and to-the-point factual style.

Coinspeaker’s financial markets coverage of bitcoin and altcoins hones in on the news that professionals in the community need to know now in order to identify key trends, passing fads and goings on all all with the aim of gaining a wider and more informed perspective of the commercial environment and staying abreast of key developments so that they can consistently make money, no matter what the price of bitcoin is doing.

Description:

At the heart of our innovation is Scan & Save – an AR-powered solution that lets shoppers scan product barcodes to access and redeem exclusive mobile vouchers in-store. This not only drives footfall and increases sales for retailers, but also reduces waste and carbon footprint for brands. Vouchers are only redeemable at the location where they were unlocked, encouraging local loyalty.

Jisp’s all-in-one solution is built on five key pillars:
• Scan & Save – Unlock exclusive in-store discounts via AR
• Scan & Win – Gamified rewards that boost shopper engagement
• White Label – Custom-branded solutions for retailers and partners
• Direct to Retailer – Seamless brand-to-store promotional execution
• Jisp Intelligence – Actionable insights powered by real-time data

To learn more about what Jisp can do for your brand or store, please visit our website.

Für sein jahrelanges Engagement erhielt der SÜDKURIER von der Caritas und dem Wirtschaftsministerium Baden-Württemberg den Titel „sozial engagiert 2009“.

Seit dem Jahr 2023 verfolgen wir das Ziel, innerhalb von drei Jahren gemeinsam mit unseren LeserInnen und PartnerInnen 30.000 Bäume im Schwarzwald zu pflanzen - Aufforstung für einen starken, widerstandsfähigen Wald der Zukunft.

Name: DoraDAO
Description:
DoraDAO is a non-profit community on a mission to make emerging tech accessible, inclusive, and human, not just for hardcore tech experts, but for everyone.

Origin story of DoraDAO
DoraDAO was born from a simple but uncomfortable realization.

We kept seeing opportunities moving fast across the world global hackathons, grants, fellowships, early-stage experiments but the bridge to access them wasn’t built for everyone. Especially not for builders, creators, and communities in India and across emerging markets.

So DoraDAO started as that missing bridge.
A place designed to connect India with global opportunities and just as importantly, to help global ecosystems understand and work with India in a real, grounded way. Not as an afterthought. Not as a checkbox market. But as a living, contributing force.

Over time, that bridge grew wider.
And everything we build today still comes back to that first belief:
Opportunity should travel both way…

Story behind the NAME..
The idea behind the name DoraDAO is actually pretty simple, and a little nostalgic. It comes from Dora the Explorer, that one character who never hesitated to ask questions. No matter how obvious, basic, or “silly” they might seem, Dora questioned everything without fear, without embarrassment, and without worrying about judgment.

That curiosity stuck with us. That’s how DoraDAO came to life.

The DoraDAO Umbrella
DoraDAO acts as the parent ecosystem, bringing together a set of premium, purpose-built initiatives under one umbrella.

7+ Inititatives Each program serves a different audience, but all follow the same core philosophy: access, ownership, and real participation.

Socials…
Here’s everything you need to represent yourself and the community online:

Fundada em 2015, a FilmaEu surgiu para registrar as jogadas que acontecem durante a prática esportiva. Através do nosso sistema automático, os atletas conseguem registrar seus melhores momentos durante a prática do esporte, de maneira simples e rápida. 

O sistema é composto por câmeras e botões instalados na quadra esportiva associados a uma central gravadora, com software proprietário de edição.

Aconteceu uma jogada digna de replay? 
- É só correr e apertar, rapidamente, o botão instalado na quadra. Após o acionamento, o software edita o vídeo da jogada de maneira automática e disponibiliza no aplicativo Filma Eu, onde os jogadores podem assistir, baixar e compartilhar nas redes sociais, logo após o jogo.

São + de 400 mil atletas cadastrados em nossas plataformas, + de 400 clientes espalhados pelo Brasil, Uruguai e Paraguai, e + de 900 mil vídeos gravados por mês.

Para os melhores e piores momentos, FilmaEu.

ACMI has consolidated working relationships in closeness with important industry institutions and management departments such as the China Petroleum and Chemical Industry Federation, the China Chemical Economic and Technological Development Center and the China Fluorosilicon Organic Materials Industry Association. Description:

A PADI (Professional Association of Diving Instructors) certified Master Freediver Instructor trainer, Bassel successfully established and ran a Diving Training School in Dubai and trained and certified hundreds of students in Freediving before founding Neptune Submerge.



How Neptune Submerge began

Bassel identified the potential for cutting-edge technologies, including VR, AR, and AI, in conjunction with his expertise and experience to revolutionize underwater training safety for both instructor and student.

He also recognized the potential for the resulting immersive technology used to create dive training simulators to integrate with and promote the importance of environmental awareness education and marine preservation.



How Neptune Submerge has evolved

Collaborations with the Centre of Digital Innovation, Sustainable Innovation, and leading Universities and technology firms have enhanced Neptune Submerge's immersive underwater experiences.

These also established Bassel as a leader in bridging the gap between human experience, and the natural world and protecting underwater ecosystems by combining immersive technology with marine conservation, environmental education, oceanography, and marine biology studies.



Making Immersive Underwater Experiences widely available.

Having developed cutting-edge immersive software solutions, Bassel identified opportunities to make the underwater world, its wonders, experiences, and benefits accessible to almost anyone in safe, enjoyable, informative and engaging ways. eg in:

- Schools, Colleges and Universities

- Leisure and Entertainment venues

- Hospitals, Clinics, or Health Charities 

- Businesses and Organisations

Name: All In Biking
Description:
All In Biking es la primera aplicación gratuita que protege al ciclista y a su bicicleta.

Podrás registrar tu bicicleta con tus datos mediante tecnología blockchain, denunciar el robo de tu bici en menos de 1 minuto, acceder al primer mapa de robos de España u organizar salidas seguras con la comunidad, además de recoger la telemetría de tus rutas directamente de apps externas como Garmin o Strava, entre otras funcionalidades.

¿Qué es "safe together"?

Estas dos palabras no son un lema. Son mucho más que eso. Es el sentimiento de una comunidad ciclista que está cansada de sentir la desprotección de su bicicleta y cuando está rodando con ella. 

Son las ganas de cambiar las reglas del juego, de dejar de depender de los demás para empezar a protegernos entre nosotros. En España nos roban miles de bicicletas al año y solo se recuperan un 0,5%. Esto se va a acabar.

Name: Polyrific
Description:
Most organizations struggle to turn AI into real operational value. Not because the models are weak—but because AI lacks memory, context, and understanding of how an organization actually works.

Polyrific is an enterprise AI company focused on building AI-powered operational systems that organizations can trust over the long term. We don’t sell generic tools or experiments. We deliver durable systems that improve throughput, consistency, and decision quality—while keeping humans firmly in control.

Our platform, Polyrific Catalyst, transforms fragmented enterprise data—documents, databases, policies, systems, decisions, and history—into a persistent, evolving knowledge layer that AI can actually reason over. This institutional memory provides shared context, traceability, and continuity across workflows, people, and time.

On top of Catalyst, sits Inferr.ing, our Enterprise Solution Engine (ESE) which consists of production-ready “inference apps” designed to solve specific operational problems. These apps don’t rely on isolated prompts or one-off automations. They operate against shared organizational memory, with full governance, observability, and auditability built in.

We’ve built deep expertise in insurance and financial services, and we are expanding into justice operations, energy, and media—industries where workflows are complex, stakes are high, and trust, consistency, and transparency matter.

Our model is simple: we build solutions that work, prove their value quickly, and only then ask customers to commit. No hype. No lock-in. Just AI systems that hold up in the real world.

Local media has never been more relevant. But the technology behind it has grown more complex, more expensive, and less transparent. Global DSPs weren’t built for local sellers, local economics, or local workflows — and no amount of customization can change that.

Ribeye exists to fix what broke.

Our platform unifies fragmented tools into a single, modern workflow designed for how local teams actually sell. We replace black-box buying, margin erosion, and manual processes with clarity, control, and transparency — so sellers can focus on relationships and results.

What makes Ribeye different

-Unified workflows: Plan, buy, and report across every major programmatic channel without platform juggling
-Full transparency: Clear visibility into inventory, packaging, and costs
-Margin protection: Built to support your economics, not compete with them
-Customizable & white-label ready: Run your own branded platform, powered by Ribeye
-Interoperable by design: Clean integrations that reduce manual work
-Enterprise-grade infrastructure: Role-based access, permissions, audit trails, and security built for scale

Ribeye supports both self-serve and managed workflows, purpose-built for local. Our omni-platform forecasting brings predictability to inventory availability across channels — something local sellers have lacked for too long.

Who we serve

1. Local and national broadcasters
2. Regional publishers and media groups
3. Media sales organizations selling across multiple channels

The streaming gold rush is over. The next phase belongs to platforms that respect local inventory, relationships, and expertise.

Name: WomenWise
Description:
Across industries like technology, finance, and engineering, women remain significantly underrepresented – not due to a lack of talent, but a lack of opportunity, visibility, and support. Today, women make up just 17% of tech specialists in the UK, hold only 32% of leadership roles across Europe, and less than 25% of executive positions in STEM-related fields globally.

Many organisations across industries have a growing commitment to improve representation and what we often see is that the ‘why’ isn’t really in question. Most leaders know that diverse teams bring fresh ideas, make stronger decisions, and create better places to work. The harder part is turning that belief into real change. Targets are set, but progress can feel slow. Networks exist, but without connection they lose momentum. Talented women join, but cultures aren’t always set up to help them stay and thrive. And inside organisations, inclusion can feel like a patchwork of good intentions rather than a joined-up strategy.

WomenWise exists to close that gap. Our mentoring builds confidence and accelerates progression, strengthening retention. Our events connect organisations with diverse pipelines and position them as forward-thinking employers. And our partnerships sharpen employer brands, fuel innovation, and create cultures where people want to stay and grow.

Our vision is about impact: when women are represented and empowered to lead, industries gain broader perspectives, make stronger decisions, innovate faster, and build workplaces where everyone has the chance to succeed.

Join our Whatsapp community and learn more about events and initiatives through our Linktree below.

Name: Kanbii
Description:
Uncovering skills, filling vacancies, driving growth
At Kanbii, we’re redefining how the world connects skills to opportunities. Millions are unemployed, yet employers face workforce shortages—a glaring paradox that hinders progress and limits potential. Kanbii’s smarter, fairer approach bridges this gap, leveraging untapped talent through their skills to eliminate the contradiction and build a thriving workforce.
 
 Aligning Talent with Workforce Demand
Kanbii bridges the gap between untapped talent and workforce needs by aligning skills with opportunities. Our advanced technology helps identify skills—including transferable and upskillable abilities—ensuring job seekers are matched with roles where they can truly shine, and businesses find the talent they need to grow.  
Uncovering skills, filling vacancies, driving growth.
 
 How We’re Different
Traditional hiring systems focus on roles. We focus on skills. Our AI-powered platform aligns talent with workforce demand efficiently, inclusively, and without bias—unlocking hidden potential for both job seekers and employers.
 
 For Job Seekers
Forget outdated CVs and rigid job applications. With Kanbii, you showcase your abilities, explore opportunities tailored to your skills across industries, and take control of your future—all for free.
 
 For Employers  
Post skill-focused job ads in minutes and connect with high-quality matches. No upfront costs, no wasted time—just the right people for the right roles, faster than ever.
 
 Our Mission
We’re here to solve unemployment and labor shortages by aligning skills with opportunities in an efficient and unique way. Whether it’s empowering untapped talent, driving economic growth, or supporting lifelong learning, Kanbii is shaping the future of work—one skill at a time.
 
Join us in transforming hiring to be fast, fair, and friendly. Together, we’ll build a world where skills are the bridge to success.

Name: Climate Robotics Network
Description:
Can robotics play a meaningful and impactful role in supporting climate action? 

If so, what is the current evidence base for the value-add of robotics? How do we build this evidence base? Who are the key actors and enablers in this space? 

What concrete climate problems should the robotics community prioritize and why? Where and when does applying robotics for climate action make no sense or cause harm? 

What advances in robotics are needed to add more value and drive more impact? 

How can we ensure that the design and deployment of climate robotics are inclusive and locally-led rather than foreign-led and techno-centric? What policy changes are needed to accelerate the safe, sustainable and responsible application of robotics in climate?

Here's what we're working on to tackle these questions:

- Organizing an annual Climate Robotics Summit
- Creating a Global Map of Climate Robotics (who is doing what/where/how)
- Launching a White Paper series to build the knowledge base
- Creating a Code of Conduct to hold ourselves accountable

We're co-creating the Climate Robotics Network to collectively address these and other questions. Please visit our website and join us on Slack!

Name: AI Antispoofing

Deepfakes and AI-generated texts are increasingly being used to misrepresent reality and manipulate people or systems, a dangerous form of spoofing that can cause harm on both personal and societal levels. These AI-powered spoofing methods can create convincingly realistic videos, images, or texts, impersonating real individuals or fabricating entirely non-existent personalities, adding a new layer of complexity to cybersecurity.

Our new mission is to provide an accessible and authoritative educational resource for everyone – from cyber security enthusiasts to professionals – interested in understanding and combating these emerging challenges. Our extended knowledge hub covers the latest topics such as:
- Deepfake detection and countermeasures
- Detection and mitigation of AI-generated texts
- Evolution and types of spoofing attacks in KYC/Remote onboarding
- State-of-the-art anti-spoofing strategies

Expert news is highly authoritative analysis and commentary anchored in the news flow. It focuses on newsworthy changes of interest to an expert's audience, the impact of those changes, and what readers should be doing in response. It is placed on publication sites where targeted audiences are looking for it. It is not advertising, self-promotion or paid content. 

The XP makes creating expert news easy for busy executives through a monthly XP Dispatch subscription that delivers data-backed news assignments optimized for an expert's audience, and news intel to support them. The expert chooses an assignment topic and then schedules a discussion interview with their editor. In no time, a finished article draft in the expert's language, style and tone is ready for approval. It is then placed with a national news or trade publication.

The Expert Press focuses on getting valuable insight and information from people who have it to people who need it.

Name: UK Tech Week
Description:
UK Tech Week is a nationwide celebration of innovation, collaboration, and talent across the UK’s technology sector. Taking place from 16-20 March 2026, the week brings together regional tech festivals, industry bodies, startups, investors, and major organisations to showcase the strength and diversity of the UK tech ecosystem. From cutting-edge developments in AI and digital transformation to grassroots community initiatives, UK Tech Week highlights the people and ideas driving progress across every region and nation of the UK.

Through a packed programme of conferences, workshops, networking events, and showcases, the week provides opportunities to learn, connect, and share best practice. By uniting regional tech hubs and national partners such as Startup Coalition and techUK, UK Tech Week shines a spotlight on the UK as a whole, demonstrating how local ecosystems contribute to a powerful national story. It is designed to inspire collaboration, support growth, and celebrate the role of technology in shaping the future of business, society, and the economy.

Baroness Jones of Whitchurch, Minister for the Future Digital Economy and Online Safety at the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology, said:

"UK Tech Week is a great initiative that celebrates these achievements and showcases the leading role tech ecosystems in all regions and nations across our country play in strengthening our economy, innovating and problem solving, and improving people's everyday lives."

Sheila Flavell CBE, President of techUK

“techUK are delighted to be a founding partner of the first UK Tech Week.  Great initiatives like UK Tech Week will help to support and grow the UK tech sector, and techUK is pleased to help play our part.”

Description:
We're burning cold outreach to the ground, fighting the machine. Sales automation is out of control. It’s overwhelming inboxes, killing focus, and wasting time. Pitchfire is the AI-powered vendor management platform built to fight back — and finally give startups control.

Forget red tape and bloated procurement software. Pitchfire was built for fast-moving teams who are tired of AI spam and vendor chaos.


Here’s what Pitchfire does:

 Protect your people from sales spam.
The average employee gets prospected by over 800 vendors a year. That’s 18 minutes a day lost to distractions — $3,744 per employee, per year. Pitchfire’s plugins and AI handle cold outreach for your team, so they can stay focused.

 Create a vendor intake process that actually works.
You wouldn’t hire someone without an application. Why let vendors through without one? Pitchfire routes relevant pitches to the right team members, on your terms — not theirs.

 Cut rogue spend with rewards and accountability.
70% of procurement programs fail because employees ignore them. Pitchfire flips the model: vendors pay to pitch, and your employees get rewarded for using the process.

 Say goodbye to cold outreach.
84 out of 85 vendors leave your company alone once redirected to Pitchfire. The ones who stay? They bid to get a response.

Pitchfire is how modern startups manage vendors, reduce burn, and take back control.

Name: 42WE Tech
Description:
42, A resposta pra tudo! 

Nosso nome, não veio do “Guia do Mochileiro das Galáxias”, mas, foi nele que encontramos a resposta para entender, o que faz da 42WE, uma empresa tão singular. 
42 é o código ASCII para o * (asterisco). Em programação, significa “qualquer coisa”, um código para “Qualquer coisa que VOCÊ quiser”. 
E assim trabalhamos. Soluções maiores que projetos isolados. Um aplicativo, conversando com o ecossistema, um sistema, integrado com inúmeras soluções, equipamentos, que se consolidam como parte de um portfolio de produtos. 
Ideias, produtos, projetos, que se tornaram verdadeiros modelos de negócios, encabeçados pela 42WE. A consolidação, desde a estratégia, até a entrega final de protótipos, passam por duras sabatinas de rentabilização, necessidade e colocação do produto no mercado.

Nosso elenco de soluções, é vasto e diversificado. Ventilador, cardioversor, raio x, desfibrilador, soluções de pagamento, aplicativos, sistemas embarcados, um grande volume de iniciativas que geram valor. O conhecimento em tecnologia de ponta, arremata nossa visão de escala e sucesso, trazendo IoT, inteligência artificial e inovação, para muitos que não acreditavam estar tão próximos ao novo mercado mundial!

Name: ScaleStation
Description:
Running and scaling a business isn’t easy.  Business owners and leadership teams we’re working with are telling us that:

> Finding and retaining quality staff is tough, attrition is sky high and the great resignation is real

> Labour costs for quality staff are eye watering and account for the majority of their overheads

> Customer acquisition costs are skyrocketing with lead generation becoming more expensive, resulting in marketing budgets not achieving the same outcomes as they have in the past

> Visibility into what’s working on ad campaigns is getting murky due to the tighter privacy settings for consumers which makes marketers second guess what’s working and what isn’t

> They are finding it tough onboarding and ramping up new sales people as they don’t have the insights needed to know where they’re having issues or need help.  This is resulting in reps missing their quotas, getting stressed out and leaving to go elsewhere

> Inbound leads are hard to come by, so sales reps are wasting a lot of time doing sporadic outbound prospecting which isn’t effective and is resulting in leaders missing revenue targets

> They are dealing with a systems spaghetti in their operations team, their tech stack is disjointed, and data is all over the place which is making it hard to draw insights and make strategic business decisions

> Marketing, sales and service departments are working in different systems, and that lack of alignment is hindering collaboration and creating friction between teams

Fortunately it’s not all doom and gloom though.  

We help businesses scale by building, aligning and optimising their systems, people and processes.

Curious to learn more?  

Schedule a time to chat here: https://scalestation.io/meetings/dporwal

Name: ION Video
Description:
Video has always been locked in files.

For decades, video has been created, stored, and distributed as finished assets. That model works for playback, but it breaks down in the AI era. Intelligent systems can analyse video, but they cannot treat it as programmable data or build with it at scale.

ION changes that.

ION provides patented video infrastructure that virtualises video itself. Instead of treating video as a static file, we enable it to behave like data, addressable, composable, and safe to use at scale without duplicating or surrendering the original asset.

This allows organisations to:
- Make AI compositional with existing video, not just generative with new content
- Turn legacy video archives into intelligence-ready infrastructure
- Deliver personalised, adaptive video experiences from a single master source
- Search and retrieve video by meaning, with frame-level precision
- Build Video Superintelligence capabilities that were previously unavailable

At the core of ION is a patented architecture that enables:
- Virtual Video Files with zero media duplication
- Frame-accurate addressability and assembly
- Format translation without transcoding
- Near real-time composition from one master source

The result:
- Intelligent systems can compose with the world’s video, not just observe it
- Platforms unlock new classes of adaptive, AI-driven experiences
- Enterprises activate dormant archives without infrastructure overhaul

ION is not a platform or a content tool.
We are the infrastructure layer that makes Video Superintelligence possible.

In an age saturated with generative AI and deepfake technology, distinguishing "Proof of Personhood" - the authenticity of talent’s Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL), whether appearing on a screen or in a playlist, is essential. HAND is committed to delivering trusted provenance automation to verify authentic instances / versions of human talent, their virtual counterparts, and fictional entities.

Working with our industry beta partners to design use-cases for production studios and talent agencies in Hollywood using the latest volumetric capture technologies, to the elegant automation of distribution metadata workflows for TV networks and studios, to advanced media performance analytics and the development of interoperable standards — HAND’s SaaS-based subscription model provides both API and web UI access to subscribers. Designed for producers and distributors who can benefit from HAND’s efficiency, cost reduction, and time-to-value acceleration, our public talent identifiers are free to resolve and use in business transactions, forever.

- Air Quality analysis: monitoring and assessment of pollutants, gases, and particulate matter

- Soil analysis: evaluation of contaminants, nutrients, and geological properties
- Solid minerals analysis:  Chemical analysis, X-Ray Fluorescence (XRF), X-Ray Diffraction (XRD) analysis, Particle size analysis, Magnetic separation test, etc.

At Cytech Analytics Laboratory, we pride ourselves on our expertise, professionalism, and customer-centric approach. Our clients trust us to deliver exceptional service and reliable results, and we are dedicated to exceeding their expectations.

Grant funded by institutions such as Amazon, Google, and the University of Warwick and paired up with institutions such as NatWest and Barclays.

 Tech has redefined your life up to now. Uber for transport. Airbnb for hotels, Twitch for gamers and now, FoodCLUB for food.

 Our mission is to pioneer the metaverse for food and through that, aim to address and alleviate pressing global issues.

 Our social media is inspired by Adobe's creativity, Duolingo’s learning style and TikTok's connectivity. These include AI-powered food recognition, precise macro calculations, and interactive lessons to perfect cooking techniques, discover global cuisines, and reduce carbon foodprints. Imagine an AI that scans your refrigerator contents, suggests creative ingredient alternatives, and populates your digital shopping list, all while fostering a sense of community. Our algorithms also detect your and your communities' environmental and health footprint as well as our FoodMAPS, inspired by Snapmaps, a food metaverse, is the first place to host dinners, create food pitches or even help people struggling with food to alert their neighbours as well as see cafes and restaurants in the neighbourhoods.

 Recognising that food lies at the epicentre of many global challenges—contributing to 25% of climate change, consuming 70% of fresh water resources, and being a significant factor in 70% of diseases and illnesses—we're more than a social media platform. With an expanding user base, we aim to leverage our influence, providing education and structuring initiatives that nudge our community towards making impactful decisions, addressing some of humanity's most pressing dilemmas.

Name: Arabi Facts Hub (AFH)
Description:
Arabi Facts Hub (AFH) is a pioneering platform dedicated to addressing the challenges posed by the global "infodemic" of misinformation, with a particular focus on the Arab world (the Middle East and North Africa, or MENA). We leverage Al and data analytics to analyze and experiment with data patterns on social media, focusing on Arabic content. Our innovative approach allows us to effectively counter false information, ensuring the availability of accurate and reliable news for the public.

Recognizing the lack of resources dedicated to evidence-based research and Al tools for Arabic misinformation detection, A H seeks to create a comprehensive, multilateral database by aggregating data from Arabic fact-checking initiatives. Utilizing natural language processing techniques, our team analyzes the dataset to identify patterns affecting minority groups, public sentiment towards misinformation, and its propagation mechanisms.

Our Mission: To harness Al and data analytics to counter misinformation in the MENA region, while promoting a safer internet environment through tech and digital policy change initiatives, and fostering evidence-based research in Arabic language.

Our Vision: To become a leading force in countering misinformation
and fostering a well-informed society in the MENA region, contributing to a secure and trustworthy digital landscape for all

Name: DATANOSCO
Description:
Similar to how a sommelier helps patrons choose the right wine to enhance their dining experience, a Data Sommelier assists both business and technical leaders in navigating the vast landscape of the data world. Beyond recommending the most relevant and impactful data for informed decision-making, he extends his expertise to technical leaders, aiding them in selecting the right tools to manage and analyze data effectively.

The Data Sommelier possesses a nuanced understanding of various data sets, allowing them to recommend optimal « data pairings » tailored to specific business needs. Whether collaborating with business team to align data flavors with organizational objectives or guiding technical team in tool selection, the Data Sommelier brings forth a unique blend of technical proficiency and a refined comprehension of the business context. In doing so, he orchestrates a harmonious data experience that serves the diverse needs of the organization.

In Latin, ‘nosco’ means ‘I know’ or ‘I am aware of.’ It is the first person singular form of the verb ‘noscere,’ which is generally translated as ‘to know’ or ‘to be aware.’ This word can be used to express the understanding or recognition of something or someone.

Name: advize
Description:
Have you ever been uncertain about your career?

Every year, millions of students make $100K+ career decisions with almost zero real-world context.

They're expected to choose a major and build a future around a career they've never actually seen from the inside. The result? Wasted tuition. Lost years. Anxiety. The painful realization that comes after they've gone all in.

Here's the truth: Students can access thousands of reviews to find the right phone or restaurant — but none to help them find a career that fits.

That's why we built Advize.

We created a growing library of 12,000+ unscripted, authentic career review video interviews with real professionals — "on-demand digital coffee chats" (with a FREE version for ANY student).

Students need honest answers from current professionals to questions like: "What does a typical day look like?" and "What are your favorite or most challenging parts about this job?"

How it works:
1 Watch insider career interviews filmed by paid student interns
2 React to what fits and what doesn't
3 Get clarity on your path forward

Trusted by universities across the University of California system, Arizona State, City University of New York (CUNY), and more, our platform increases student career understanding by ~40% and reduces anxiety by ~30%.

The stakes:
 Students waste tuition on careers they don't understand
 They realize a job is a bad fit too late

With Advize:
 Students avoid costly detours early
 They commit with confidence
 They land in fulfilling careers

Partner with us:
 Universities: Improve NACE competencies, retention, and placement
 Employers: Inspire and connect with informed students
 Professionals & Alumni: Share your story in under an hour

 www.advizehub.com

 Awards

Name: Managing Editor magazine
Description:
Welcome to content marketing’s alt-weekly. 

If you enjoy working in content marketing, but could still do with about 75% less of the corporate bullshit that comes with it, we made Managing Editor for you.

We’re a home for the changemakers, culture creators, leaders, disruptors, innovators and mavericks in brand journalism and content marketing.  

And, no, we don’t care about your email newsletter best practices. 

We do want to hear about how you felt when you realized you had written 250,000 words about employment assessments in two years under someone else’s name. But could never find time to write your own book.

Or how you explain your job to your parents, who still think you “work at the newspaper.”

We’d also love to hear about the special Spotify playlist you’ve created for those days you have to navigate the minefield of that one special SME’s “white papers.”

Managing Editor is nurtured and loved by the team at Rep Cap, a B2B content marketing agency that provides content marketing for progressive professional services firms and consultants.

We welcome contributions from content marketers who have something interesting to say about our emerging profession. We like profiles of creative people who like shaking things up, contrary perspectives, and poking holes in anything that “everybody knows.” 

We do not like "syndicated" content, backlink schemes or tired-ass listicles.

Most articles on Managing Editor run from 750 to 1,500 words, but if you’re on a roll and you’re not boring, we won’t cut you off. 

You may recommend (or pan) specific vendors, but you must disclose any business relationship you have with the company in question. Or their competitors.

Got something you need to say? Drop us a line at hello@managingeditor.com.

Name: SlashGear
Description:
When it comes to technology news, you could say SlashGear has always been ahead of the curve. Originally launched by Ewdison Then and Vincent Nguyen in 2005 (two years before anyone had heard of an iPhone) as a blog covering the mobile tech industry, the brand quickly made a name for itself with its timely coverage of smartphone news throughout the mid aughts. In the decade that followed, SlashGear continued to grow, expanding its team and editorial coverage to encompass consumer electronics, the automotive industry, entertainment, medicine, science, and gaming.

Today, SlashGear operates under Static Media and reaches over 5 million readers every month, providing trustworthy, daily news and thought-provoking commentary on everything happening in the automotive and technology industry.

We believe our longevity is a testament to our continued goal of serving as the ultimate resource for those who want to stay up to date on the latest and greatest tech on the market. And while we do write about the business end of things, we distinguish ourselves by focusing our coverage on the consumer, keeping practicality in mind as well as the luxury and wow factor that makes each product compelling for users.

Our team of expert writers and editors focuses on everything from how fast, far, and fun the newest electric cars can be driven; how family-friendly two- and three-row SUVs and crossovers are; and whether the latest iPhone, Galaxy, or Pixel is worthy of your upgrade. Experienced, pragmatic, and fair, our reviewers consider value and reliability as much as style and bleeding-edge features, so that when it's time to make a purchase you know you're getting the best bang for your buck.

Readers can also count on us to provide in-depth coverage of all major technology and automotive events, from the New York International Auto Show, CES, and Mobile World Congress to the latest Apple launch or Google Pixel reveal.

Name: Employed.world
Description:
www.employed.world is a social enterprise with the purpose of helping job seekers get their first job faster. We are currently working with companies to create more entry-level UX positions to support the job seeker community and work with the other actors in the system, like Mentors, Universities, bootcamps, and the government.

It's an ambition project of its founder, Yashvir. He was inspired to work on this problem after understanding the depth of the issue while researching on his Master thesis about the impact of digital tools and training on global unemployment and underutilisation.

Its a fact that the IT world lacks leadership and Senior talent, a.k.a highly skilled manpower. But we know a secret, this problem is rather a symptom of a larger issue in the system. The problem of lack of entry-level job opportunities and now increasing entry barrier for juniors to get their first job, thus gradually reducing the Senior talent pipeline. (Imagine a junior job vacancy asking for multiple years of experience. thank you, you got the point)
We are taking this hypothesis and conducting user research with Startups and Medium-sized companies to understand and gather insights and develop solutions to make it easier for them to create, hire, and retain more entry-level positions in Germany across industries.

_________________________________________

Historia de CLX Group:

Nacido bajo el nombre de CLX Valencia, C.A, CLX Group fue fundado por nuestro CEO, Nasar Ramadan Dagga Mujamad, en el año 2013, siendo desde entonces en el Official Partner de la marca Samsung Electronics en Venezuela. 
En el año 2013, CLX Valencia C.A., inaugura la primera brand shop CLX Samsung, permitiendo a los venezolanos disfrutar por primera vez en el país del innovador concepto "Samsung Experience Shop", en el local ubicado en la zona industrial Los Guayitos Centro Empresarial Valencia, galpón 6 y 7, via de servicio Autopista Regional del Centro (ARC).
En años posteriores, CLX experimento un gran crecimiento, incorporando nuevas tiendas y empresas como XIO Latin. En 2019, nace la primera tienda Multimax en la región, multimarca que rápidamente ganó la aceptación del público para convertirse en la multitienda más grande del país, con más de 400 marcas y 45 sucursales distribuidas por todo el territorio nacional. 
Producto de esta expansión, en 2020, se tomó la decisión de adoptar la imagen corporativa de CLX Group, uniendo a todas las empresas que lo conforman y sumando nuevas, como CLX ICONS (2023), la revista del grupo empresarial, enfocada en moda, cultura pop, negocios, salud, viajes, estilo de vida y tendencias. La más reciente incorporación del grupo empresarial fue HONOR Store (2024), que llegó a la ciudad de Valencia para presentar la primera tienda HONOR en toda Venezuela.

Name: TheAssociation-AI.Org
Description:
TheAssociation-AI.org is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit building the global infrastructure for ethical, high-quality, and human-first Artificial Intelligence transformation.

As AI accelerates across every sector, our mission is to ensure progress remains human-centered - protecting livelihoods, rebuilding trust, and creating sustainable opportunity for all.

We partner with corporations, governments, and institutions to implement education, training, and governance guardrails that align innovation with responsibility, turning ethical intent into measurable economic and social outcomes.

Our core initiatives include:
• Economic Job Loss Registry: The first global registry tracking the workforce impacts of AI and automation, connecting displaced workers with reskilling and redeployment pathways through partnerships across industries, unions, and academia.
• AI Workforce Research: Independent studies that inform public policy, corporate ESG goals, and future-of-work strategy with real data and recommendations.
• Community & Learning Network:  A neutral, trusted environment for executives, practitioners, and educators to collaborate on standards, certifications, and workforce programs that advance a human-first AI economy.

Philanthropic support powers our ability to scale this work, helping us quantify AI’s human impact, fund workforce transitions, and create the world’s first Human-First AI Trust Index.

Join us as a partner, donor, or corporate member in shaping a responsible and inclusive digital future - where innovation and humanity advance together.

Description:
MusicTech Germany is the world’s first Federal Association for #MusicTechnology.

At the core of its mission: Promoting collaboration and bridging the communication and knowledge gap between the traditional music industry and music tech pioneers.

MusicTech Germany represents the common interests of hardware, software, and service providers in the field of music-technology from Germany. The members of MusicTech Germany are as diverse as the industry itself. Our members are startups and corporates, artists and makers, organizers and curators, developers and designers, manufacturers and service providers, as well as business, science, and research experts.

The association seeks to promote the joint interests of its members and to support innovators in fulfilling their mission by initiating interactive multi-disciplinary events and by communicating with and counseling of inter/national policymakers, industry executives, media representatives, as well as artists, music enthusiasts, and the general public.

As an independent organization, MusicTech Germany is the main point of contact for music technology in Germany. It connects the dots for its member who address the challenges of the music industry value chain in the digital age: Ranging from notation and production software to musical instruments and interfaces, from streaming platforms to Blockchain services and Artificial Intelligence applications to new live-experiences and ticketing solutions.

Furthermore, the association fosters the knowledge transfer between visionaries from all intersections of the creative industries. It serves as a mediator and independent catalyst to help accelerate avant-garde approaches, determined to further the innovative potential and future success of artists and pioneers by improving the creative environment and underlying economic infrastructure.

Name: Revista Anfibia
Description:
Anfibia es una revista nativa digital de crónicas y ensayos que combina el rigor de la investigación académica con la estética de la literatura y la arquitectura de las narrativas expandidas. Nació en 2012 en el programa Lectura Mundi de la UNSAM (Universidad Nacional de San Martín), orgullosa de pertenecer a una universidad pública del conurbano bonaerense, y con apoyo de la Fundación Gabo. Dialoga con la agenda local e internacional de política y economía, culturas, ambiente, amor y sexo, educación, políticas de géneros, tecnologías y salud.

 Anfibia es una revista de editorxs. Hacemos de cada nota un proceso. Construimos saber y mirada de forma colectiva, en diálogo con cada autorx. Reaccionamos a lo real con la velocidad del periodismo y la profundidad de la academia. Somos un equipo diverso, obsesivo, intenso, curioso. La noticia enciende nuestra sensibilidad política y social. Pensamos con la lógica del editor y la del algoritmo; surfeamos entre la economía de la atención y la producción de sentido.

 Anfibia es una plataforma de contenidos y de conocimiento. Estamos siempre mutando, nos encanta. Desde aquellos textos fundantes, performáticos, escritos a cuatro manos entre periodistas y cientistas sociales hasta hoy, que dejamos nuestra narrativa también en podcast, libros y piezas audiovisuales producidas de manera independiente y en alianza con otras organizaciones. 

 Anfibia es una usina de proyectos de comunicación y de programas de formación internacional.

 Anfibia es belleza, creatividad, experimento, cultura pop. Es un cruce de lenguajes. Nos gusta tener la información pero nos desvela saber qué hacer con ella. Para eso, el arte siempre está ahí. En las palabras y en las imágenes, incluso en aquellas que responden a una belleza no hegemónica y que visibilizan los temas que nos resistimos a ver.

 Anfibia es una carta a lxs amigxs del futuro.

Description:

Within 24 hours of publication, enabled by the power of machine learning and artificial intelligence, DiploAI transforms regulatory notices into: (1) Pre-filtered, de-duplicated alerts mapped to your product portfolio. (2) Ready-to-use internal briefs detailing what changed, why it matters, what's impacted, and what to do next. (3) Traceable tasks and workflows with assigned owners and due dates.

No more spreadsheets. No more fragmented sources. No more uncertainty.

With DiploAI, compliance, R&D, and product teams can collaborate in one platform to guarantee coverage, cut manual tracking, and accelerate regulatory reviews.

Name: TechTalksa
Description:
A TechTalksa nasceu com um propósito claro: traduzir tecnologia em conhecimento acessível, humano e com impacto real.

Vivemos uma era de transformações profundas. Termos como inteligência artificial, transformação digital, cultura de inovação e liderança ágil estão por toda parte. Mas, na prática, muitas pessoas ainda se sentem distantes disso tudo — e muitas empresas enfrentam resistência, falta de entendimento e dificuldade para preparar suas equipes para o novo.

É aqui que a TechTalksa entra.

Unimos comunicação, inovação e estratégia para apoiar empresas e profissionais que desejam crescer com propósito, clareza e protagonismo.

 Para empresas, oferecemos:

Palestras e treinamentos sobre IA, inovação, liderança, cultura digital e computação quântica com linguagem acessível e foco em mudança real de mindset;

Mentorias estratégicas para líderes e executivos que precisam sair do operacional e assumir um papel mais estratégico;

Apoio em projetos de transformação cultural e adoção de tecnologias emergentes com engajamento e comunicação clara.

 Para pessoas, oferecemos:

Mentorias individuais para quem deseja crescer na carreira, desenvolver liderança, se posicionar melhor no mercado ou entender o impacto da tecnologia no seu dia a dia.

 Também produzimos conteúdo diário nas redes sociais com o mesmo objetivo: levar temas complexos como IA, transformação digital e futuro do trabalho para todos os públicos — de forma simples, relevante e aplicável.

Na TechTalksa, acreditamos que tecnologia de verdade é aquela que transforma pessoas antes de transformar processos.

Se você quer levar inovação com propósito para dentro da sua empresa — ou para dentro da sua própria jornada — a gente pode caminhar junto.

Name: Generate Zero
Description:
At Generate Zero, we set the benchmark for audit-ready carbon and financed emissions intelligence, trusted by listed organisations, financial institutions, insurers, and complex enterprises operating under increasing regulatory scrutiny.

Specialising in precision, assurance, and scalability, our technology-led platform enables organisations to measure, manage, and disclose emissions with confidence across Scope 1, 2, and 3, including financed and insured emissions. 

Everything we deliver is aligned to global standards and built to stand up to audit.

We support organisations operating across multiple jurisdictions, delivering compliance with frameworks including:

•	GHG Protocol
•	PCAF
•	ISO 14064
•	ASRS / AASB S2
•	Emerging international disclosure regimes

Our approach combines global consistency with local regulatory expertise, ensuring disclosures are not just compliant, but credible in-market.

Designed for assurance from day one our structured data ingestion, verification workflows, and transparent methodologies:

1. Reduce audit risk.
2. Eliminate spreadsheet dependency.
3. Create a defensible, transparent single source of truth for emissions reporting and management.

Climate reporting engineered for scrutiny, not approximation.

Generate Zero are recognised specialists in financed emissions measurement, supporting publicly listed companies, regulated entities requiring accuracy, consistency, and confidence - banks, insurers, and investment portfolios with:

•	PCAF-aligned methodologies
•	Asset-class specific modelling
•	Data quality scoring and improvement pathways
•	Decision-ready insights for decarbonisation strategy

Enhanced with a global business carbon database providing sustainability data across international markets supporting supplier-specific emission factors for supply chain reporting. 

Our approach combines global consistency with local regulatory expertise, ensuring disclosures are not just compliant, but credible in-market.

Description:
The Studentpreneur Africa Network (SAN) is a philanthropic initiative dedicated to nurturing and supporting student entrepreneurs across Africa. Our mission is to create a sustainable ecosystem that fosters innovation, leadership, and business acumen among young Africans, empowering them to drive economic growth and social development on the continent.
Vision
To be the leading catalyst for youth entrepreneurship and innovation in Africa.
Mission
To empower young African entrepreneurs with the skills, resources, and networks necessary to build successful and sustainable businesses.

Objectives:
1.	Support: Provide financial, technical, and mentorship support to student-led startups and entrepreneurial ventures.
2.	Educate: Deliver comprehensive entrepreneurship education and training programs to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge.
3.	Connect: Create a robust network of student entrepreneurs, industry leaders, investors, and mentors to facilitate collaboration and growth.
4.	Innovate: Encourage and incubate innovative solutions to address local and global challenges.
5.	Advocate: Champion policies and initiatives that support entrepreneurship education and youth-led businesses in Africa.
Key Initiatives:
1.	Studentpreneur Africa Hub: A physical and virtual space offering resources, workshops, and co-working opportunities to student entrepreneurs.
2.	Studentpreneur Africa Huddles: A series of interactive sessions featuring successful entrepreneurs, industry experts, and thought leaders sharing insights and experiences.
3.	Studentpreneur Africa Festival: An annual event celebrating student entrepreneurship with exhibitions, competitions, and keynote addresses from prominent business figures.
4.	Studentpreneur Africa Fund: A dedicated fund providing financial support to promising student-led startups, helping them launch and scale their ventures.

Name: Women in Tech North East CIC
Description:
Women in Tech North East CIC promotes the participation and representation of women and non-binary people in the tech sector in the North East. Alongside our LinkedIn group, this profile has been created so we can showcase the incredible community that continues to grow and the talent we have in the region.  

Our vision is to provide a friendly and welcoming community for people who are studying, working, or interested in digital and tech. 

We provide digital and physical spaces for women and non-binary people to meet, make connections, build relationships, find support, and be inspired by one another.

Lack of diversity in the tech sector results in relatively few role models who speak to the diversity of people we so desperately need in tech. Women in Tech North East seeks to make visible a more diverse group of inspirational people in tech across our region.

Our online community has grown rapidly, with over 1000 members in our closed LinkedIn group (if you identify as female or non-binary then you can request to join that group here https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12655356/). We organise quarterly in-person free events in collaboration with industry partners. To date we have worked with Newcastle University, Aspire Technology Solutions, Credera, Womble Bond Dickinson and Waterstons. 

Our members include women and non-binary people from the private, public and third sector, including freelancers, micro-businesses, SMEs and large corporates. We have members who are interested in data, development, design, cloud and cyber-security. Our members include students, career-changers, junior and mid-level rising stars, and C-suite leaders.

We do not judge our success by numbers alone. We want to reach women and non-binary people from all backgrounds and life circumstances. We want to provide a supportive environment in which everyone feels empowered to be themselves. We work hard to design events that are inclusive, removing the ‘intimidation factor’ of networking.

Name: neue energie
Description:

neue energie bietet Antworten – für Entscheiderinnen und Forscher, Branchenvertreter und alle, die sich einfach nur für Politik, Wirtschaft und Technik der Energiewende interessieren. Das Magazin erscheint seit mehr als 30 Jahren und ist heute mit seinen ausführlichen Hintergrundberichten, kritischen Interviews und fundierten Analysen der meistverkaufte Titel im Bereich erneuerbare Energien und Klimaschutz.

 Bring Your Own PBX for Ultimate Flexibility: Seamlessly integrate your current Unified Communications platform. Say goodbye to vendor lock-in!

 AI-Powered Insights: Our powerful AI analyzes all conversations, automatically generating concise call summaries and sentiment scorecards directly in activity notes. Eliminate manual data entry and gain instant, objective feedback on sales performance.

 Native SIM Card & Multi-Channel: Connect all vital customer channels: Calls, SMS, WhatsApp, and Messenger to CRM. Our unique native SIM card integration allows field teams to use their GSM network for superior call quality. All GSM calls and SMS are logged automatically without needing a separate mobile app.

 Global Reach & Low-Cost Rates: Instantly establish a local presence by displaying a number in over +100 countries. You can even retain your existing phone numbers without porting them to us.

Un1ty is the essential communication layer that boosts sales efficiency, delivers superior call quality, and drives customer satisfaction.
