Through partnerships, knowledge and experience sharing, IAE aims to work with the Eswatini Government, private sector, organizations and individuals in developing the skill level and participation of innovators from all sectors in Eswatini. 

Using innovation hubs as vehicles, the IAE empowers Emaswati through creating and managing an ecosystem that will transform innovative ideas into viable business service products that can be sold and provide meaningful income generating activities.

Our main objectives are: 
1. To contribute to development and the Eswatini economy through the promotion of an innovation culture; modernisation and utilization of technology; creating entrepreneurship and produce responsive products aimed at improving access to public & private services. 

2. To provide a supportive environment and platform for local innovators to network, share skills, knowledge and experiences and facilitate mentorship support in the various disciplines of innovation.  

3. To facilitate the establishment and nurturing of partnerships and networks that would enhance innovation, creativity and markets availability at local and international level.  

4.Develop and deliver capacity building programmes aimed at strengthening capacity of young innovators; facilitate accreditation in specific areas of intellectual development; provide legal support aimed at protecting innovators who create and utilize the results of innovation; organise and host specific and targeted conferences, dialogues,  seminars aimed at promoting innovation.

Name: Women Leading Tech
Description:
Women Leading Tech was designed to celebrate the most important women in the tech industry. In 2019, B&T launched the “What are you worth?” research project designed to establish whether there was a gender pay gap in Australia and which industries had the largest gap.

We found that while all genders reported the same level of pay for entry level roles, a pay gap emerged at the first round of promotions. From there on, the gap grew and, at the senior/ C-suite level in tech, the gap was larger than in any other industry.

Women in the industry told us that they face more barriers to both entry and progression in tech. We decided to take action, launching the Women Leading Tech awards to highlight the women at the top of the industry and extend a helping hand to women looking to join.

Since then, the community has grown from an ANZ initiative to a global program and the level of engagement has been remarkable. But that’s not all, the networking and camaraderie among the members has continued to inspire us.

We’ve been blown away by the achievements of those in the community and we want to continue to support and champion all of you in your respective careers.

To further deepen our support for women in the most exciting and critical industry in Australia and beyond, we will be launching a Women Leading Tech publication covering news, providing industry insights, thought leadership, and consistently highlighting the incredible women leading tech throughout the year.

The Women Leading Tech site is the next step in our journey celebrating, promoting, and advocating for women in the most important industry in our present and future.

Description:
Cloud Native Media is an informal group of Technology, Media, TV, Video, Audio and Radio professionals sharing technical, business, organisational and practical information about putting real media workflows in the cloud.

What's more, we use our events not only to share knowledge but to test out new technology with our live video stream!  Past talks are also available to watch via our YouTube Channel.

Who can attend?
Our in-person meetup events are for professionals working in Technology or Media. This includes media professionals looking to learn more about the technology they use, and technical professionals from other sectors such as software, e-commerce or fintech. We also welcome graduates and trainees interested in developing a career in media technology. If you're unsure if the content is for you, please watch some of the past talks on our YouTube channel.

We ask that attendees have an interest in the content of the talks, and respect the general tone and ethos of the event. All attendees must abide by the code of conduct at cnm.live/code

Can I speak at an event?
As an informal group we welcome and encourage talks from all levels - it's not just for senior or experienced people. The simple criteria is that talks must not be focused on selling a product or service, and must involve doing something with media in the cloud. Technical talks and case studies are common, but relevant business, culture and process talks are also welcome. Please go to CNM.live/speak for more details.

Name: Indians

In a country as vast and varied as ours, the stories of millions are often overlooked. Whether in bustling urban centers or remote rural villages, we believe that every voice deserves to be heard. Indians is here to bridge those gaps. We offer a platform where people—regardless of their background, region, or circumstances—can share their journeys, dreams, and challenges.

Our aim is not just to provide a space for storytelling but to foster meaningful conversations that have the power to inspire change. From entrepreneurs who are shaping the future to artists who reflect our culture, social activists pushing for justice, and everyday heroes living quiet lives of resilience, Indians is the stage for all. We amplify the unheard, honor the unsung, and celebrate the extraordinary within the ordinary.

At the heart of Indians lies the belief that every story matters. Whether it’s a young innovator from a small town or a dedicated teacher in a bustling city, we are here to ensure that their contributions are recognized and their struggles acknowledged. We’re committed to raising awareness about the issues that affect us all—issues that often go unspoken but are crucial to our shared future.

Through this platform, we want to create a community where diversity is celebrated, unity is strengthened, and everyone’s story finds a voice. We stand together to lift one another, creating bonds that transcend borders, castes, and communities. Together, we can build a nation that listens, understands, and empowers each individual.

We are by the Indians, for the Indians, because in every Indian lies a story worth telling. Together, we rise through our shared experiences, our collective strength, and our unwavering belief in the power of community.

Name: Center for Cooperative Media
Description:
The Center was founded in 2012 in response to the downsizing of New Jersey news organizations and the changes in the ownership of regional public media. These shifts in the news and information landscape hurt the volume of local news available in a state that has historically had limited news coverage, due to its proximity to the major metropolitan areas of New York City and Philadelphia. With 565 municipalities packed into a densely populated state, New Jersey was—and is—ripe for innovation in local journalism.

The Center coordinates statewide and regional reporting, connecting more than 280 local news and information providers through its flagship project, the NJ News Commons. The Commons helps partners to share content and encourages them to collaborate and to support one another. The Center also conducts and publishes research on emerging ideas and best practices, focusing on local journalism, business models, and ecosystem mapping. The Center convenes national programs, including an annual national summit for journalism organizations to foster the conditions, ideas, and practices that lead to stronger collaborative journalism across the U.S. The Center’s annual reports offer a detailed history of programs and impact.

The Center is a grant-funded program within the School of Communication and Media at Montclair State University. Funding from the University supports the director’s salary and benefits, office space for the Center and its staff, and infrastructure support and shared services such as IT, development, marketing, and administrative assistance. The Center receives core support from the Geraldine R. Dodge Foundation, the Democracy Fund and the Abrams Foundation, as well as project support from many other grantmaking sources and sponsors.

**Indigitech Destiny: Empowering Indigenous Futures**

Indigitech Destiny is a dynamic umbrella organization committed to illuminating and amplifying the voices and talents of Indigenous professionals within the realms of Technology, Innovation, and Creative Industries. We live in the age of news overload. There's just too much information going around for the normal human mind to easily process and make sense of. Most of it is irrelevant to our everyday lives. Not much of what we receive occupies our mind space for more than a minute. But there's simply no way we can escape it.

Because news shapes our perspective of the world, and perspective in some ways defines what we are. Information itself wouldn't be much without our analysis and interpretation; it would only be a skeletal frame with no flesh to make it wholesome. Name: klima&so
Description:
What do 45x FRA - NYC flights and 20sec TikTok have in common?
39 tons of CO2e!

Even if the use of social media appears to be "free" at first glance, it still has a "price". The digital content created through the use of millions of servers, digital infrastructures and end devices leads to a devastating CO2 footprint of around 300,000,000 tons every year.

Until now, these alarming emissions figures have been largely ignored in the social media marketing sector - simply because they were not known and could not be measured.

However, in view of the growing importance of climate-friendly positioning and in particular due to the CSRD coming into force, whose Scope 1-3 emissions also include social media marketing activities, quantifying these emissions is no longer an option, but an unavoidable regulatory obligation - comparable to the annual financial statements.

For the first time, klima&so provides scientifically sound, reliable and communicable social media insights for ESG and brand communication. Brands, agencies and providers of social media software are thus given the opportunity to fulfill their ecological responsibility and comply with regulatory obligations.

klima&so is sustainable social media thought end-to-end: calculate, reduce and offset campaign and account emissions, communicate impact.

Take the 2023 Social Media Emission Audit now   Write to us!

 **Além das Fronteiras**: Na BAM, acolhemos todas as indústrias de braços abertos. Nossa experiente equipe de criativos e tecnólogos está sempre ansiosa para explorar novos horizontes. Com nossa estratégia, suas ideias se tornam realizações brilhantes.

One of our key priorities is to develop ISO/DTS 4448 and ISO/DTS 25614, two global deployment standards for public-area mobile robots (PMRs) and robotaxi pick-up/drop-off (PUDO) orchestration, respectively. 

We also offer municipal readiness workshops, virtual roundtables, and webinars to bring together stakeholders to expedite their journey to find the most relevant and credible information to address the challenges and opportunities of PMRs.

Membership is open to:
- municipal, urban and traffic planners
- public facility operators (airports, zoos, hospitals, campuses)
- accessibility advocacy groups
- robot manufacturers & technology innovators
- fleet operators

Name: Saga
Description:
Fandom is organizing. AI content theft is radicalizing creators. The $500B fandom economy needs infrastructure that respects community, rather than exploits it. Saga is that infrastructure.

The market is massive and underserved. Billions flow through fan-driven content, merch, events, and experiences across every major franchise. But creators coordinating this economy are stuck using tools never designed for collaboration: Instagram’s algorithm kills reach, Discord lacks discovery, and existing platforms extract value without solving real workflow problems.

Fandom creators don’t just consume content. They coordinate group photoshoots, manage commissions, organize large-scale events, and build businesses. They do this in DMs and Google Sheets because no platform exists for how they actually work.

Saga solves this with chronological feeds, collaboration-focused metrics that replace vanity followers with verified partnership history, and anti-AI protection built into the architecture. We’re creating the network effects around collaboration, not engagement bait.

Our traction validates demand: 1000+ community members, brand partnerships secured, and high-profile creator onboarding without paid acquisition. People are migrating because they want infrastructure that works.
The team has execution credibility. We’ve shipped products at Netflix, Blizzard, Disney, and ESPN. We’ve raised venture capital and managed talent at WME and Endeavor. We understand both consumer product at scale and creator economics.

Description:
CodePaddies is dedicated to making coding accessible and fun for children. Our app combines storytelling, coding challenges, and real-world data to teach kids about sustainability and social responsibility. 

By integrating climate research and poverty alleviation themes, we aim to inspire young minds to become problem-solvers and innovators.

Key Features:
- Story-Based Learning:Engaging narratives that teach coding concepts while addressing environmental and social issues.
- Interactive Coding Challenges:Hands-on activities that reinforce coding skills and promote critical thinking.
- Real-World Data Integration:Using actual climate data to teach data structures and algorithms, making learning relevant and impactful.
- AI Climate Assistant:An AI feature that answers questions and provides information about climate-related issues, helping kids understand the impact of their projects and learn more about sustainability.
- Sustainability Focus:Lessons and projects centered around climate change, renewable energy, and sustainable practices.
- Community and Collaboration:A platform for kids to share their projects, collaborate on solutions, and learn from each other.

Our Impact:
We believe that by teaching children to code with a focus on sustainability and social good, we can empower them to create innovative solutions for the world's most pressing challenges. 

Our app builds technical skills and fosters a sense of responsibility and empathy towards the planet and its inhabitants.

„medium magazin“ ist das unabhängige Branchenmagazin für alle journalistischen Gattungen, gegründet 1986. 

Das „medium magazin“ erscheint alle zwei Monate, außerdem die Reihe „Journalisten-Werkstatt“ mit Best-Practice-Beispielen aus den unterschiedlichen journalistischen Bereichen.

Kern unserer Berichterstattung sind drei Bereiche:

Was ist neu? Trends und Entwicklungen, die den Journalismus beeinflussen

Wer handelt? Infos zu wichtigen, wegweisenden Personen und Nachwuchspersönlichkeiten der Branche

Wie funktioniert’s? Praktisches und Hintergründiges zum journalistischen Handwerk

Zudem ist „medium magazin“ Gründer und Veranstalter der Wahl „Journalistinnen und Journalisten des Jahres“ (seit 2004), der Nachwuchs-Talentwahl „Top 30 bis 30“ (seit 2006), der „Hidden Stars“ (seit 2019) und Kooperationspartner des jährlichen European Newspaper Award (Gründer und Organisator: Norbert Küpper, seit 1999) und des European Publishing Congress. Seit 1991 gehört „medium magazin“ zum Medienfachverlag Oberauer in Salzburg (Johann Oberauer GmbH).

Die Redaktion wird seit 1.1.2021 von Alexander Graf mit Sitz in Mannheim geleitet, ab 1.1.2024 von Frederik von Castell mit Sitz in Berlin. Herausgeberin ist Annette Milz.

Name: Chemical Engineering and Processing: Process Intensification
Description: Chemical Engineering and Processing: Process Intensification is the premier publication for innovative research contributions on process intensification for chemical, biotechnological and functional materials manufacturing, energy, and environmental applications. The journal especially welcomes research contributions that aim for sustainable development. Articles should address progress on fundamentals, novel methodologies or practical chemical engineering applications, using, e.g., structured materials, miniaturized equipment, alternative energy sources for physicochemical activation (e.g., light, electricity, microwaves, plasma, and ultrasound), dynamics (e.g., periodic operation), external forcing (e.g., vibration, oscillatory flow), integrated separations and reactions, and other synergies between unit operations, as well as innovative process systems designs, digital manufacturing, and modularized production to achieve desirable targets, such as defossilization and higher resource efficiency, compactness, safety, and resilience.

Name: Huis voor de Journalistiek
Description:
De journalistiek verandert. Niet in één richting, maar op allerlei manieren tegelijk; van grote landelijke redacties tot kleine lokale initiatieven, van internationale onderzoeksverhalen tot podcasts gemaakt aan de keukentafel. Dat maakt het journalistieke landschap rijker, maar ook ingewikkelder. Wij geloven dat de journalistiek van morgen ontstaat in samenwerking: tussen makers, publiek en samenleving. Daarom bouwen we aan een nieuw journalistiek huis met open ramen en deuren, waar mensen samenkomen om te leren, te maken en opnieuw te bedenken wat journalistiek zou kunnen zijn.

Met Stichting Huis voor de Journalistiek creëren we ruimte. Letterlijk en figuurlijk. Een plek voor uitwisseling, experiment en ontmoeting. We organiseren trainingen, publieksprogramma’s en het Nederlands Journalistiek Festival. We werken samen met partners én met het publiek, omdat we geloven dat goede journalistiek niet zonder mensen kan die zich gehoord en betrokken voelen.

Name: NFT Pulse
Description:
NFT Pulse is a LinkedIn page that focuses on providing updates and insights on the ever-evolving world of non-fungible tokens (NFTs). NFTs are unique digital assets that are stored on a blockchain, allowing for ownership and transferability. The NFT market has exploded in popularity in recent years, and NFT Pulse aims to be a go-to source for all things related to this rapidly growing industry.
The page provides regular updates on the latest news, trends, and developments in the NFT market. This includes coverage of new NFT releases, upcoming auctions, and major events in the industry. Followers of the page can expect to stay up-to-date on the latest happenings in the NFT world, as well as gain insights into the overall direction and future of the market.
In addition to news and updates, NFT Pulse also offers analysis and commentary on various aspects of the NFT market. This includes discussions of pricing trends, market demand, and the impact of major players in the industry. This type of analysis can be useful for investors, collectors, and anyone looking to gain a deeper understanding of the NFT market.
One particularly valuable aspect of NFT Pulse is its focus on education. The page provides resources and information for those who are new to the world of NFTs, as well as for those who are already involved in the market. This includes explanations of key concepts, such as blockchain technology and smart contracts, as well as guides on how to buy and sell NFTs.
Overall, NFT Pulse is a valuable resource for anyone interested in the NFT market. Whether you're an investor, collector, or just curious about this emerging industry, the page provides a wealth of information and insights. With regular updates and a focus on education, NFT Pulse is a must-follow for anyone looking to stay up-to-date on the world of NFTs.

Aquafeeds in 2011, 2015, 2019 and 2022

Name: Komon
Description:
Komon is a platform for creators of all kinds to launch NFT-accessed spaces to monetize and engage their communities . The company was launched in early 2022.

Today’s creative industries advertising-based model is broken. On the one hand, creators are trapped in a vicious circle  where they just create algorithm-friendly content, a job that detaches them from their craft and that is highly under-monetised (even the best paid creators worldwide still make less than a 1$ per supporter per year !). Users, on the other hand, have also been trapped through their attention based on having them constantly consuming content to an unhealthy degree , for the sake of increasing advertising reach. 

Komon wants to rewrite the code of monetization and engagement by allowing creators to setup exclusive online spaces  that are accessible via purchasing an NFT working as an access key and space member card, where supporters can finally feel special, have power/influence, and interact with a curated community. 

We just raised a $2M pre-seed round with reputed European and US VCs and angel investors, and we are building a world class team and an amazing product to solve the needs of creative communities . 

Our vision is to provide any creative community with the means to take its pursuit beyond. If you are passionate about how technology can help creators and communities make a better living out of their creativity, we would love to meet you !

Name: Tractiv
Description:
Tractiv has developed a software platform that provides visibility and security for data transactions in the entertainment and financial industry via a centralized immutable ledger. 

Data vendors and entertainment studios lose millions of dollars a year from illicit redistribution and contract violations. Data end-users pay too much for data they do not need. They are also vulnerable to audits, litigation from violating licensing agreements, and inefficiencies with regard to how data is used internally.

Our solution enables large data producers to prevent illicit data redistribution while enabling the ecosystem to understand data usage. Implementation of the Tractiv software enables producers to distribute content through one platform and recover lost revenue due to illicit redistribution. Data consumers access multiple data feeds through one Tractiv API, eliminate costly audits, and improve how they manage their data purchases. The broader social value of the Tractiv solution is thus increasing industry productivity, greater market segmentation and expansion, and lower transaction costs.

Name: Heyden-Securit GmbH
Description:
Heyden-Securit - Europe´s first choice for ID and more

Heyden-Securit GmbH are leading suppliers of ID systems and printers for the production of high-quality photo ID cards and visitor passes, covering applications for low-volume users through to the high-volume production of national identity cards and driving licenses.

Having been at the forefront of ID card technology for nearly 20 years, we have gained a wealth of experience in the industry and a reputation for excellent service. We have a customer base of over 12.000 companies including many industrial and transnational companies, sport clubs, major banks, government, airports and hospitals.

Heyden-Securit ID card systems produce durable, high-quality, credit card style photo ID cards which are compatible with most security systems. We can help you create cards with magstripes, barcodes, contactless chips or smart cards.

To complement our ID card systems we offer a range of visitor management systems, both manual and electronic, to suit applications from schools to multi-tenanted buildings, our electronic visitor management software, revolutionizes visitor registration with many technical advantages over paper systems and the economic advantage of a vast reduction in the cost of consumables - by as much as 50%. BMS Software will not only help to keep your building safe but also create that important first impression.

Heyden-Securit is the main distributor for Magicard ID card printers and supply ribbons for use with most popular plastic card printers and also Card Exchange ID card software esspecially in the DACH region.

Along with our ID and visitor management systems, Heyden-Securit offers an extensive choice of ID accessories such as badge holders, clips, necklaces and lanyards.

We always endeavor to provide the highest quality systems and best service. Talk to us about your particular needs and we will help you to find just the right solution.

Name: Medical Device Knowledge Units (MDKU) e.V.
Description:
We are a German based non-profit association founded by stakeholders from the European medical technology sector that are working together on the world's first unique free of charge regulatory data model for the technical documentation for medical devices.

Our motivation: We want to accelerate digitalization in the industry in order to increase efficiency in product development and achieve shorter market approval procedures - and thereby enable more innovations for diagnosis and therapy of patients. 

Why a non-profit organisation? Our industry is diverse and the regulatory landscape complex and volatile. A regulatory data model can only be developed quickly if we use the powerful knowledge and experience from our community. We want to ensure that all parties in the industry ecosystem benefit quickly from digitalization - regardless of whether they are global players, start-ups, notified bodies or other regulatory authorities. 

We focus on the development of a data model for the European market and compliance with the MDR/IVDR in close cooperation with regulatory parties. In order to do so, we have set up expert groups for different topics, incl. technical documentation, product development, risk management, usability engineering, clinical evaluation, PMCF, PMS etc.

Interested? Stay tuned & follow our LinkedIn profile!
- We are working on a new website
- We will use LinkedIn for collection of feedback regarding discussions in the expert groups
- We will publish results on LinkedIn to ensure transparency
 
Want to join the MDKU? Get in contact with us!

Let's revolutionize regulatory affairs and the way of documentation!

Localization

Imaging
Our AI Imaging technology turns scripts, data, and creative inputs into polished video outputs – fast, scalable, and visually compelling. Whether you're producing book trailers, product ads, teaser videos, or short films, we combine real production with AI-driven visuals to tell powerful stories. Thanks to our proprietary workflow, we ensure full creative control, tool-agnostic flexibility, and seamless language adaptation for global distribution.

So come on, let's make some magic happen! Let's play!

Pourquoi Nava Consulting ?

Conditions Salariales Inégalées : 
Nous proposons des conditions salariales parmi les meilleures du marché en raison de notre faible marge, car nous croyons que nos consultants méritent de garder une plus grande part de la valeur qu'ils créent.

Automatisation Totale:
Tout chez Nava est automatisé, des entretiens à la gestion RH et financière. Cela nous permet de concentrer nos ressources sur ce qui compte le plus : vous, nos consultants.

Attractivité des Missions: 
Grâce à notre capacité unique à attirer les meilleurs talents, nous pouvons offrir des missions parmi les plus intéressantes et valorisantes du marché. 

Recrutement Innovant:
Notre processus de recrutement est en grande partie géré par des robots IA, garantissant un matching profil/poste supérieur à 85%. Cela assure que vous êtes positionné sur les missions qui correspondent le mieux à vos compétences et aspirations.

Notre modèle est unique dans l'Industrie. Nous sommes les pionniers d'un concept innovant dans le domaine du consulting informatique. En tant qu'experts en automatisation et intelligence artificielle, nous avons conçu Nava Consulting pour éliminer les inefficacités du modèle traditionnel, tout en offrant des conditions de travail inégalées à nos consultants.

Nous sommes convaincus que notre approche deviendra la norme un jour, mais d'ici là, nous continuons à innover pour rester en tête.

Name: ChatVE
Description:
Everyone is entitled to his own opinion, but not to his own facts. Facebook user engage with fake news sites 70 million times monthly while fake news travels 6x fast on X (Twitter). You can access our service by tagging us on any claimX (Twitter) on our handle (@ChatVE_) to fact check and reply in thread.

We accelerate response time to validate or debunk claims on critical events using Large Language Model driven chatbot.


The proliferation of news sources and satire aided by the ease of sharing at
the speed of social media makes it easier for people to consume misinformation. 

Our solution is powered by a hybrid of AI and certified fact checkers to filter out the noise and verify claims at the speed of social media. By assigning unique digital fingerprints to fact-checked claims that are false, we prevent them from being continuously shared or reappearing again on the internet.

We also engage in deploying conversational AI chatbots using natural language processing to automate customer service.

Molto spesso tendiamo a non ascoltarci dando priorità ad altre cose, trasformando questo dono come qualcosa di scontato.

La nostra società ormai è sempre più orientata al virtuale, facendoci dimenticare la nostra natura e le nostre debolezze: di un corpo fatto di carne ed ossa e che ha necessità costante di essere protetto, curato e monitorato.

Questo innovativo sistema di comunicazione virtuale però ci permette di utilizzare nuovi sistemi educativi che possono essere di aiuto nell’ascoltarci e nel darci informazioni preziose.

UPsalute nasce per offrire alla gente l'opportunità di avere informazioni medico-scientifiche rigorose e facilmente comprensibili, rilasciate da specialisti nel campo della salute.

I contenuti sono spiegati in maniera semplice ed esaustiva.

L'obiettivo è quello di far comprendere che la salute è un bene prezioso e che dobbiamo prendercene cura, ascoltando il nostro corpo, e che la prevenzione deve diventare una pratica quotidiana per evitare di incombere in malattie più serie.

Il Portale non sostituisce il sistema sanitario né il medico di base.

Description:
Dataclay solves the problem of generic, unappealing video content by turning realtime data into highly individualized, broadcast-quality deliverables - resulting in unparalleled, personalized viewer engagement.

And producing quality video content is time consuming and expensive - especially when customizing it for specific markets, customers, or products. 

Dataclay seeks to free marketers and content creators from the inefficiencies of menial data entry, allowing them to develop greater quantities of higher quality content in less time. Our solutions leverage industry-standard applications that content creators and developers already use, promoting stress-free integration. We want our users to delight in their work and audiences to connect with their output.

Our cloud-based Templater software helps businesses save thousands of hours in labor costs by optimizing post-production workflows to create tailored, versioned videos on the fly. We also provide creative, consulting, and project management services to help you realize your desired video compositions.

As a leading software innovator for custom video workflow automation, we provide (1) an open standard for creating dynamic video templates, (2) easy integration with existing production environments and apps, (3) an artificially intelligent layout engine for handling data variation, (4) solutions that save businesses thousands of hours in labor costs, and (5) intuitive products designed with a user-centered approach.

Description:

The name is meant to be a nod to the fighting elite - the fighters that perennially were and are consistently a part of divisional top ten rankings, title eliminators and title fights.  The kind of fighters that when everything is all said and done, you can’t help but marvel at their fight cards.  The ones that we tune in for.  The best.

If you subscribe, it doesn’t have to be paid.  We’re just grateful that you’re reading.  With that said, know that if you are kind enough to become a paid subscriber, a portion of all income generated by paid subscriptions will be sent via a monthly donation to a combat sports-related charity.  Currently, donations are being sent to the Association of Boxing Commissions and Combative Sports’ Retired Fighter Charitable Fund.

Perks to being a paid subscriber include access to the full archive, the ability to comment on posts, and subscriber-only content.

Name: Amilis
Description:
More and more women are delaying motherhood in order to give themselves the freedom to reach education/career goals, financial stability, or to simply not feel so rushed in finding “the one”. Let’s face it, having a child is expensive these days and modern dating can be a minefield! Although having this choice is fantastic for women, trying to get pregnant after your mid-thirties can be much harder as our egg count and quality starts to rapidly decline.

Amilis is on a mission to raise awareness in younger women about infertility and to help them navigate the start of their own fertility journeys, when they’re ready. 

Our platform provides the transparent facts about fertility and preservation treatments like elective egg freezing. We partner with the best fertility clinics in the U.K. to collect accurate data, costs and reviews and make it easier for women to find the right clinic for them via our clinic discovery platform. 

Overall, we are trying to break down informational and financial barriers to give women more choices when it comes to their fertility. Let’s empower women with the freedom to make an informed choice and support them along their fertility journey, whoever they are, wherever they are, whatever they choose.

Name: Morla Moves
Description:
At Morla Moves, we won’t just track your movement data – we’ll translate it into action.
Movement is the most sophisticated data set the human body produces. At Morla Moves, we translate the hidden mechanics of motion into a clear roadmap for human progress.

We are an Amsterdam based innovation-driven venture where Advanced Computer Vision meets Human Science. By fusing the expertise of AI engineers, movement scientists, and physiotherapists, we have built an engine that transforms the complexity of human motion into precise, actionable intelligence. We don’t just track movement; we unlock the data within it to optimize performance and accelerate recovery.

Our dual-pathway architecture bridges the gap between high-performance training and clinical oversight:

Guided Movement: Transforming any camera-enabled device into an AI-Powered Workout Companion. We provide real-time form guidance and smart insights for strength, mobility, and functional training—no wearables, no friction, just pure motion intelligence.

Clinical Support: Redefining the digital connection between therapist and patient. Our AI-Powered RTM Solutions provide Digital Physiotherapy Support through objective motion analysis, automated ROM monitoring, and deep adherence analytics. We provide clinicians with the "digital eyes" needed to drive better outcomes beyond the clinic walls.

Privacy-by-Design: Our commitment to security is fundamental to our architecture. Using On-Device (Edge) Processing, all movement analysis is performed locally and instantly on the user’s device. No video is ever recorded or transmitted to the cloud, ensuring lab-grade precision with total data sovereignty.

We are not just building software; we are building the future of human-centric motion intelligence.

Join us as we turn movement data into meaningful action.

With a strong focus on investing and incubating early-stage Web3 projects, particularly in Southeast Asia, AsiaTokenFund Group continues to be a key driver of innovation and growth in the region’s blockchain and Web3 industry.

Name: The Travelling Scientist
Description:
My journey of becoming The Travelling Scientist wasn’t straightforward. I was living a pretty usual life but something changed me to become the best version of myself. 

One day, I discovered a new dimension of life. It was the time of the pandemic when I was listening to Sadhguru. I found myself engrossed in his ideology of life and I realized how small this life is, and how much time we are wasting every day. His teachings took me away. That day became a turning point for me and I decided to find ‘my’ purpose in life. I asked myself what drives me and I found my calling - I want to Travel. 

I geared up for my first journey. I rented a bike and started traveling from Kashmir to Kanyakumari. In my journey, I observed various faces from different cultures and languages. But I found one common thing - We can't know about any person until we sit back and listen to them. So, I started talking to people wherever I went. And believe me, every story taught a lesson! The struggles were different everywhere but Everyone was a Hero in his life. 

When I came back home, I started my usual work life. But my passion for traveling and meeting people was still alive. One day, I got an idea about personally meeting my LinkedIn connections. Without waiting, I took my second journey to meet my students and took a deep dive into their stories. From then, I decided to make my traveling even more purposeful by documenting these stories here at The Travelling Scientist.

Name: GenAI Impact
Description:
GenAI Impact is a non-profit. 
We create open resources to minimize the environmental footprint of generative AI.  

Our mission is to provide everyone with the means to understand and assess the impact of their use of generative AI through:  
- The design and development of evaluation methodologies and open-source tools to quantify these impacts.  
- Awareness-raising initiatives and scientific outreach.  

Since 2024, GenAI Impact has been developing EcoLogits, an open-source Python library that estimates the energy consumption and environmental impact of using generative AI models via APIs.  

We have also designed EcoLogits Calculator, an accessible awareness tool that allows users to compare the impact of large language models (LLMs) and estimate them on a large scale.

Alongside this flagship event, we own and operate key summits such as the UAS Summit & Expo, Biodiesel Summit: Sustainable Aviation Fuel & Renewable Diesel, International Biomass Conference & Expo, North American SAF Conference & Expo, and the National Carbon Capture Conference & Expo, as well as a series of influential regional events.

Our publishing arm extends our expertise into print and online content, with a collection of industry-defining magazines including Ethanol Producer Magazine, Biomass Magazine, Pellet Mill Magazine, Biodiesel Magazine, UAS Magazine, SAF Magazine, and Carbon Capture Magazine. These publications, together with an array of ancillary products including maps, directories, e-newsletters, and other digital resources, underscore our commitment to providing comprehensive, up-to-date information and insights to professionals in the bioenergy sectors, including ethanol, biomass, pellets, biogas, RNG, sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), biodiese & renewable diesel and as well as the UAS industry, which focuses on unmanned aerial systems. 

Mission
At BBI International, our mission is to unite our customers through meaningful, reliable platforms, offering opportunities to educate, collaborate and grow. 

Vision
BBI International is the global leader in biofuels media & events, fostering energized growth, opportunity, and success for the industries we serve.

Name: Violet Simon
Description:
Violet Simon is a leadership and cultural authority shaping how women navigate power, visibility, decision-making, and remain psychologically intact under pressure. 

Our work centres leadership at the point where responsibility, visibility, and judgement begin to collide — where decisions are made under scrutiny, trade-offs are felt rather than theorised, and clarity is no longer guaranteed.

Through selective storytelling, editorial insight, and carefully curated conversations, Violet Simon examines leadership beyond performance: the practical realities of decision-making, and the psychological, emotional, and ethical forces that shape judgment, behaviour, and how power is exercised.

At the centre of the platform is Disruptors, which spotlights women shaping culture, influence, and change, and Disruptors Lead, a protected space for deeper leadership and psychological exploration. These conversations are not designed to inspire or instruct, but to name realities often left unspoken.

Alongside this, Girlfriends offers a more intimate cultural lens on womanhood, identity, and modern life, when and where the format allows for the depth and integrity the platform requires.

Violet Simon is intentionally selective in what it produces and how it shows up. We do not aim to comment on everything — only on what meaningfully shapes how leadership is understood, experienced, and exercised today.

Name: Hexagone - La France en chiffres
Description:
Des statistiques sur la société française, factuelles et sourcées.

 En une vingtaine d'années, le temps d'antenne des émissions de débat d'actualités à la télévision a été multiplié par 4.

Le nombre de chiffres cités lors des débats d’entre-deux-tours de la Présidentielle a par exemple été multiplié par 2.

Les chiffres sont devenus omniprésents dans le débat public.

Paradoxalement, malgré cette abondance, il est parfois difficile de distinguer les grandes données structurantes de celles relevant de l’anecdotique ou du discours militant. Les Français réclament ainsi massivement une information appuyée par des sources scientifiques ou des données et donc mieux vérifiée et plus impartiale*.


* Sondages Harris Interactive pour le Ministère de la Culture (octobre 2023) et Viavoice pour les Assises internationales du journalisme, en partenariat avec Radio France, France Télévisions, France Média Monde et Ouest France (mars 2023)

Name: Kashmeta
Description:
Welcome to Kashmeta: The Metaverse-Based Medical University

Kashmeta is revolutionizing the future of medical education through the transformative power of the metaverse. As proud recipients of the Prime Minister's Award, we are leading a groundbreaking shift in healthcare training by combining cutting-edge technology with medical science. Our mission is to create a virtual platform where students and professionals engage in lifelike medical simulations, collaborate globally, and explore innovative medical research—all within an advanced metaverse environment.

At Kashmeta, we leverage the limitless possibilities of the metaverse to transform medical learning and practice. Our virtual clinical training immerses students in realistic patient care scenarios, from performing surgeries to managing emergencies, equipping them with the skills to excel in real-world healthcare challenges. By connecting learners and educators across the globe, we foster cross-cultural collaboration through interactive virtual classrooms and research labs. Using advanced technologies like digital twins, augmented reality, and AI-driven tools, we enable groundbreaking research that drives medical innovation forward.

Our journey of innovation has been supported by leading incubators in Australia and Pakistan. In Australia, we were incubated at Spacecubed as part of the Perth Landing Pad Program, supported by the Government of Western Australia, and at iAccelerate at the University of Wollongong. In Pakistan, we were incubated at the National Science and Technology Park (NSTP) by NUST University, Islamabad. These opportunities have provided us with invaluable support, mentorship, and resources to develop our vision and expand our global reach.

Kashmeta's mission extends beyond education—it’s about shaping the future of healthcare. By leveraging the metaverse, we aim to make medical education more accessible, enhance professional development, and drive global healthcare innovation.

Description:

iZ Precious core values are: Certified and Traceable Precious Metals, CO2 Reduction and Social Responsibility. We create reliable macro-regional supply chains which operate transparently and responsibly to guarantee the distribution of precious metals that have a positive impact on people and the planet.
Urban Mines (56 million tons of unused smartphones, PCs, tablets, appliances) represent a remarkable environmental and social problem (82% of E-waste is not documented generating 50 Ton of mercury annually) but at the same time an opportunity for the fashion and jewellery industry: the possibility to use an alternative and sustainable source of gold, silver, and palladium.
Consumer, Gen-Z in particular, are indeed changing the way of doing business. They are looking for sustainable products and expect brands to do their part in protecting the planet and securing safe, healthy, and equitable working conditions.
iZ Precious wants to support jewellery, watches, and fashion accessories brands in offering products that meet the expectation of a new consumer. By working closely with its Members (collectors, recyclers, recovery plants) and by tracking precious metals from their e-waste status to their recovery, iZ Precious develops social initiatives local communities can benefit from and invests in compensation projects to mitigate CO2 negative impact. Consumers will therefore buy a product with a powerful story behind it.

Please follow us on Instagram!!! @iZ Precious

Seja você também Connectmix.

Name: Cobble
Description:
Hi! Cobble is an app that ends decision fatigue. Our mission is to get people back out into the world doing the things they love with the people they care about. No more "What do you want to do?" "I don't know...what do you want to do?" With Cobble, everything we build is for getting people to a collaborative agreement—faster, easier, and way more fun than texting back and forth with no end in sight. 

We do this through a combination of excellent curated content, and a suite of social decision-making tools. You might discover...your new favorite restaurant, a TV show everyone can't stop talking about, a one-time-only event, and so much more. Best of all? You'll actually do it because that's what Cobble is made for. Not another list app. A do it app. 

We are an early stage company growing at the speed of light. We launched in June of 2020 in a fear-filled pandemic that had many people questioning if we'd ever be out in the world together again. Cobble always had that vision to say yes, and we're going to be a part of making it happen. That's how our solo, first-time, female founder raised $3.3M in the middle of the pandemic. 

Now, we're finding our footing in the world and looking for brilliant people to join our team—help us grow, help us continue nailing our product, and making Cobble a household name. 

Our team is distributed across the world, across cultures and backgrounds, and our leadership team is 80% female. Cobble was built with a spirit of inclusion and we're proud to keep up that reputation. Being remote isn't always easy, but we're pros at this point. Every year, we host Camp Cobble where all of our people come to New York for one epic week (you bet we use Cobble to make the best plans of all time). 

Be sure to check out our job page at trycobble.com/careers and throw your hat in the ring. We'd love to meet you.

Shunya's fodder production is done in its custom-built Growth & Logistics Centers (GLCs) which provides controlled & safe environment for its hydroponics based production process. The green fodder produced is not just fresh (of the day), but is also chemical-free and highly nutritious for the animals. 
The dairy farmers within the geography covered by the GLC can order / subscribe to fodder using the Shunya mobile app. 
Our objective is not just to ease the life of our dairy farmers, but also improve their incomes by helping them increase the quantity and quality of produce.

Name: OdessaConnect
Description:
OdessaConnect is on a mission to make technology safe and simple for the older person.  We believe that breaking the technology barrier is critical to improve health outcomes and the patient experience.

Technology can be challenging for older adults who did not grow up using computers, smartphones, and the internet. That’s whyOdessaConnect runs on a device that is familiar and comfortable: the TV.

OdessaConnect turns the TV into a two-way portal, eliminating the need to manage apps, downloads, passwords, or confusing digital devices.

We set out on a mission to learn everything we could about how seniors think and feel about technology, in order to design a digital experience just for them.

After three years and hundreds of interactions, we arrived at a set of design principles that form the foundation of our platform.

Fonts, colors, contrast, density of information, ease of navigation – every component of OdessaConnect is optimized for the older user.

The platform consists of proprietary hardware and software that has been developed in collaboration with a distinguished medical advisory board, and rigorously field tested.

After proving the success of the platform in senior living communities across the country, Odessa is now developing applications for other sectors of the healthcare industry including in-home care, primary care, health plans, and more.

Name: PC Locs
Description:
Introduction
PC Locs is a global technology company (known as LocknCharge outside of Australia & New Zealand). With billions of devices in use, PC Locs is solving the rapidly growing problem of physically managing the deployment of these devices. 

Our Vision
To be the most innovative and trusted brand in developing solutions for managing deployments of mobile technology. This vision is quickly becoming a reality as we continually improve our design, manufacturing and distribution of innovative solutions in the education, government, healthcare and corporate markets. Our latest smart locker systems have been adopted by some of the most successful organisations in their fields.

Our Purpose
To make peoples' lives easier.

Devices are deployed for a reason. They are used to teach, train, inform, enable, and entertain. To be effective and serve the intended purpose, technology must be operational and accessible at all times. PC Locs exists to make life easier for the users and managers of devices by creating solutions that ensure accessibility and usability at any time. 

The Story
In 1998, PC Locs began operating out of a backyard shed at the home of Paul Symons, founder and director of the global company. Paul was a school teacher who identified a need for securing desktop computers. In 2001, Paul developed a solution to store, charge, secure and transport laptops in schools. This led to over a decade of product development, and the distribution of innovative carts for managing technology. Today, Paul's son, James is the CEO, and the business has expanded worldwide and helped millions of mobile device users - and saved hundreds of thousands of hours for teachers, trainers, managers and workers in different industries.

Name: eeva
Description:
Meet eeva: your fav AI assistant that organizes all your tasks, schedules, and house details for you.

 Our mission is simple: lighten the mental load of the modern adult. Because let’s be real—life is busy, running a home is a full-time job (without the paycheck), and none of us got a how-to manual.

 While the corporate world gets all the shiny tools, our personal lives are stuck with sticky notes, paper piles, half-useful apps, and brain cells on overdrive. That ends here.

Think of eeva as your household’s digital brain to help manage everything from weekly schedules and grocery lists, to warranties and chores, in one collaborative platform that adapts to your lifestyle. Slowly but surely, your mental load gets lighter, collaboration gets smoother, and adulting gets easier. *Cue massive sigh of relief*

 We’re here to make the hard stuff easier, so you can enjoy the good stuff more. Simple as that.

 Built by a global, woman-led team of AI experts, world-class engineers, and ultra talented humans who get it, eeva’s already been named #1 Canadian Company at CES (Founders Press 2025), one of Canada’s Top 100 AI Startups (ALL IN 2024), and our CEO Adrienne Jung was crowned a Top Female Founder to Watch (Founders Beta 2025).
We’re shaping the future of home life, and having a blast while we do it.

 Follow us to join the eeva-verse. We’re so excited to have you along for the ride.

Name: Taproot Publishing Inc.
Description:
Taproot Edmonton is a home for curiosity-driven stories about our city, cultivated by the community.

We are building a new way to do local journalism, and a new way to fund it. We don't sell eyeballs, and we don't put up paywalls. We enlist our members to tell us what they're curious about, we commission writers to answer their questions, and we pay those writers from the membership fees we collect. Then we publish the story for all to see.

The business model that used to support local journalism is broken. We want to replace what is being lost with something that is sustainable and responsive to the community we serve.
